## Musk Wins $1 Trillion Package
Tesla shareholders overwhelmingly [approved an unprecedented $1 trillion](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LEO2yAQxvGnwdtFHI5NPHjowpauHS2Mj0BDAMElUd6-SqU-QedP-knf_9d1u9qYYr79tA9a2Zct07snYqa2cSDkFlOKJTsqPsVbYPfkfVNSTYAIUm-HjemznYdj9USKxoFW1LOacJzUMoT1osfZyUUuZ4veu32RePE4O6_9jgvtQ1y_GqLUiHJSy0l7dxl37S9uWnbUXpwlHZFLO_0uMXMgnz7lRe3kymNIa2CuXYw_hDJCmfyppfN3Esp8YaEMolBGzkKZ_dljpt6FMkw9WejBNgolHdQ62FpbeRFQKhkez37vEGLn0qIDhH8loNoPVOvu9kYQqFGHd6AMgcCVZzqgFncnBg4E75gPb1MSygxtPer7S_RZi7O8PWxMfy_wf3V_repPAAAA__9ZzZl7) potential compensation package for CEO Elon Musk on Thursday, a record-setting deal he had suggested was necessary for him to remain with the company. The approval, with more than 75% of shareholders voting in favor, serves as a significant show of confidence despite a recent dip in the company's stock performance and concerns raised by proxy advisory firms and major investors. The colossal compensation is contingent on Musk hitting [a series of aggressive performance](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ_G7hwBNmAXFNu4y7ZbWvwcDLvHJoKTRHn7la90n-CW8400o5k_9-1uM-Zz_20PMBTLdsK7IRBB3SgBp5oRczk9lIh5T-Sf5DbBhBw4H5jegs342aY-mAggYOzBcK2E5KMUS59MYM7yqAJMTrEoJy6Ysm52krtRzZPqs7nSOGeacybFctPRz6PTcfZycVzHbmIQMpV6-1vySQkifsoL6s2Xo0eTiB6tG391Yu3ESglSRry8TqyPgtl_Lgw-nQXLfgkpl3FSeiBoaIeWbIVUMEBtA2A5h-PZ_g3fw22u0Im1ryY83hdqSncT2w-bv1p6-tFtLyP-BwAA__-baIJK) and valuation targets for Tesla over the next decade, which include achieving a market capitalization of up to $8.5 trillion and meeting production goals for vehicles and its Optimus humanoid robots. This newly approved package replaces a previous $56 billion plan that was struck down by a Delaware judge, prompting the company to hold a fresh vote and argue that Musk's leadership is crucial for achieving complex future goals, such as the "robot army" and self-driving taxis. Take a look at the [chart explaining the package](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL-OhCAYxJ8GOwwf_kELim3s9nLdlgbxQ7lFMMCu59tfvOSe4NqZyWTm97iPd2Wd9cuH2lBmE0aPR3KYM8Yxrwg5Wuds8BqDcXZZs37laeSMNxSAMjHOyrpzrItZGkSOVYESRMsbqBreF6tsmBZd289zp8Bw7MGYqWfA6qkTYJQprLzaAJgAYA3vS2F0V03CdLrpJxCG1Axnm0Msv4L1eUXjzvDGWOqwFU6uOe-JVDfCB8KH4zjKLfnLI3xAT1-J8GELHk_CBx22XXmLl4bfu1PW40zRBU-3V3omCvTvMM2YnKK7Oumu9FMtSPigIr3d4PPRRiyinPfjyqZWkJotm7Lud1L-F8e35D8BAAD__6yciEM).
## Deal Cuts Weight-Loss Drug Prices
President Trump announced a deal with Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly to lower costs and [expand coverage for their popular GLP-1](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2unTAQRldjOl_Zw48vBUUaupc2JTL2GCYyNrKHd8PuI7KF1J909J3z62v5shQpbT_tgROHvCT81IjMWBbeUXOhGCknhzlE2nZ2F68LKOil1lKZxVuK99I1fgqIgG2DkzYD9LrtYWz26a3M6EY1mO7t1ajaYehh7Qz23gbsNTQ0PTStldFa9TC-THDvdjXh7fpx1SaITqEnzuX1O1PiHUO88zeWl8tHE6ed-ayi_SFgFjCn-8yVn0nA_IAFzFoLmNUgYL6qfPwEzFyu45ScpU0pX8mhjPmDRZ6FHFYZcpEffHxlzLVKX66tSvxz2uTRywM9OVtQYqSNVorEt4C5KZM_P0-wOhjRqe2wFP_d5P9q-z3B3wAAAP__uVmOKg) medications, including Ozempic, Wegovy, and Zepbound, which are used for diabetes and weight loss. The agreement establishes a lower "most favored nation" rate for Medicare and expands government-run coverage to include obesity indications for severely overweight senior citizens with specific comorbidities. Under the plan, future FDA-approved oral medications will be available for approximately $149 per month on the [forthcoming ](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzz9yhCAUgPHTQLcOfwULijR2mzYlg_hQMigOvnWzt89srpADfN_M7-vu7yGXvC-fYQOHqfodnmcBRGgeV-DYcim57hFqKnlZMT5w8oIJfeP8xoyfQy4vr-jsEoAAScFx0wvNpRYDXR2TUgEoG9KsrDZWGWZjHwYVJUQtFc3ufeOcGc6ZFkNnUrRyMslGPUzcJKIYzBlr675r3nGFVF71gtbFutHiVsTjJPKDiJGIEdtjO9pPt9SLiJE2Nx_Pt-DsDVFs2UIufx3-C3s58RsAAP__lGFnuQ)[TrumpRx](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzz9yhCAUgPHTQLcOfwULijR2mzYlg_hQMigOvnWzt89srpADfN_M7-vu7yGXvC-fYQOHqfodnmcBRGgeV-DYcim57hFqKnlZMT5w8oIJfeP8xoyfQy4vr-jsEoAAScFx0wvNpRYDXR2TUgEoG9KsrDZWGWZjHwYVJUQtFc3ufeOcGc6ZFkNnUrRyMslGPUzcJKIYzBlr675r3nGFVF71gtbFutHiVsTjJPKDiJGIEdtjO9pPt9SLiJE2Nx_Pt-DsDVFs2UIufx3-C3s58RsAAP__lGFnuQ)[ platform](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzz9yhCAUgPHTQLcOfwULijR2mzYlg_hQMigOvnWzt89srpADfN_M7-vu7yGXvC-fYQOHqfodnmcBRGgeV-DYcim57hFqKnlZMT5w8oIJfeP8xoyfQy4vr-jsEoAAScFx0wvNpRYDXR2TUgEoG9KsrDZWGWZjHwYVJUQtFc3ufeOcGc6ZFkNnUrRyMslGPUzcJKIYzBlr675r3nGFVF71gtbFutHiVsTjJPKDiJGIEdtjO9pPt9SLiJE2Nx_Pt-DsDVFs2UIufx3-C3s58RsAAP__lGFnuQ) and for Medicare beneficiaries. Existing injectable GLP-1s, which can [currently cost over $1,000 monthly](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2SozAQRk8DmSip-ZEdKNiEzJtuSAnUAu00kktqzPj2U_gKk7_66nvv32N62EAhrn_tjoZ9miKehZAZ88QbKs6BKKS4YPIU1o2Xg-cJJPRCKSH15Gyg99TVznhEwLZGo_QAvWp7uNebQdSutzBI2baDdb6ddS9hGDo_S38DVQdzrSkltVKyh3uj_XJrZ-1vS3-flfZVJ9EFTrn5n0LkDT290wtzs6S9JrMxP0vV_qlgrGA8z7Px6Xs-SohYysVUMFLwWPhNWMHI-difwsaYjrhgEQ4tCZePdbdfmIugdGIWSyosTryMBaVSPkSps3HP8ypSBl11ct1toM8P_lW8l4GfAAAA___wgIbg), will see their direct-to-consumer price drop to $350 initially, trending down to $245 over two years, in exchange for the companies receiving regulatory certainty and relief from the administration's threat of 200% tariffs.
## Nancy Pelosi Announces Retirement
U.S. Representative Nancy Pelosi, D-Calif., announced Thursday that [she will not seek re-election](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uhDAQxfHTmA7kGT68W7hIQ7dpUyJjxjCRsVdmsmhvH5ErpH7S_0m_r8f0cBw5rZ9uJyshT4nOI5IIlUk2AikcI-fkKYfI6yb-R-YJNfY1QK3NtDiO76mrFhuIkNqKLJgBe2h7vFebxYCkXWtmBwEHBxp7cNiZTnfYasSK7VUD0AZA93hvTPC3djbh5vv7DCaoTtPCkkvznTnJRiG-84tK4_NeRbuJPA_VfigcFY7neTY-zf4aFY5XWuEIoHDUg8IxueTf9ZNiPrj2Oa2FjqMuRJG8cE51IeHCaW022WNV7PI8L4FjMKrT6-44_v3Kv7BeFn8DAAD__93nfK8), ending a nearly four-decade career in Congress that culminated in her becoming the first and only woman to serve as Speaker of the House of Representatives. Pelosi held the top position for two non-consecutive terms and was instrumental in securing the House passage of key legislation, including the [Affordable Care Act](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0E1uwjAQQOHTJDsizyTGycILVIkd3XZp-WcmcWViZKYgbl_RK_QCn_Te18VdfC55Xz_9laxwdTs974VEqDnZCKTlUnLdI1Uued0k_khwqFAfAA7KuORzebmpT5aJkMaeLJgjahg1Lv1mPWpveIE46mAwgOL5OHtAmINhnLjP9q0BKAOgNC6D4TiPwfAc9RLAcDcpSllqG75r3mUjLq_6oDbEeu2L3URu9248dXju8Bx8KVVulLIfals7PJ-Ya0s-FHIfvpE7RembTbfnO-x-NN2k1qvP5Y-Tfz14WPwNAAD__4k6cGk) under President Barack Obama. Her later tenure as speaker included presiding over two House votes [to impeach President Trump](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHSpCAQBOCn0QwLcF00ILjEbC-90EIYdO5YxoLZ9fbt__J_hT_uqq7u789jeThMmLff7gmWIy0ZzpqAGcrCOygumBJS9kAx4bazf_G6aKkHoZSQZgkO02e5tcFGAA19C1aZux5UP-ip3a2M0q0evJPjGMCs4xCm1d2lMcaFsR9btFebUtIoJQc9dSb6sV9NHP0wrcrE5iYhIFPp_hJm3iGmD72hdJ6ebbI781Gb_lej50bP53l2kf5fL6680fNBCRl9bfScXfYfcUCiiiITiwrwTxQQkMAzUhaQA-ZNBPAuQBWJ8iZ2elUQ3hWA0hYbjvMiqXfT3OT2dJi-h_CP9N5WfwUAAP__4DiHIQ). After her retirement announcement, Trump released a statement saying he was "very honored she impeached me twice and failed miserably twice." Pelosi will conclude her current term as a representative for California in January 2027.

clean_body: Tesla shareholders overwhelmingly potential compensation package for CEO Elon Musk on Thursday, a record-setting deal he had suggested was necessary for him to remain with the company. | | | | | | Friday, November 7, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1962, after losing the governor’s election in California, Richard Nixon gave what he called " telling reporters that “you don’t have Nixon to kick around anymore.” Six years later, he was elected president. 🎄 In yesterday’s poll, we asked if it was too early for Christmas music. 78% of our poll respondents said Nov. 1 is too early. We suspect the other 22% probably work for Big Santa. (Though we did discover after our own vigorous debate that our founder, Guy, already has his Christmas lights up.) Thanks for voting! If you’re ready to scale your next big idea without slowing down, today's sponsor, , makes it easy to hire top freelancers fast—so you can focus on growth, not guesswork. | Musk Wins $1 Trillion Package Tesla shareholders overwhelmingly potential compensation package for CEO Elon Musk on Thursday, a record-setting deal he had suggested was necessary for him to remain with the company. The approval, with more than 75% of shareholders voting in favor, serves as a significant show of confidence despite a recent dip in the company's stock performance and concerns raised by proxy advisory firms and major investors. The colossal compensation is contingent on Musk hitting and valuation targets for Tesla over the next decade, which include achieving a market capitalization of up to $8.5 trillion and meeting production goals for vehicles and its Optimus humanoid robots. This newly approved package replaces a previous $56 billion plan that was struck down by a Delaware judge, prompting the company to hold a fresh vote and argue that Musk's leadership is crucial for achieving complex future goals, such as the "robot army" and self-driving taxis. Take a look at the . Deal Cuts Weight-Loss Drug Prices President Trump announced a deal with Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly to lower costs and medications, including Ozempic, Wegovy, and Zepbound, which are used for diabetes and weight loss. The agreement establishes a lower "most favored nation" rate for Medicare and expands government-run coverage to include obesity indications for severely overweight senior citizens with specific comorbidities. Under the plan, future FDA-approved oral medications will be available for approximately $149 per month on the and for Medicare beneficiaries. Existing injectable GLP-1s, which can , will see their direct-to-consumer price drop to $350 initially, trending down to $245 over two years, in exchange for the companies receiving regulatory certainty and relief from the administration's threat of 200% tariffs. Nancy Pelosi Announces Retirement U.S. Representative Nancy Pelosi, D-Calif., announced Thursday that , ending a nearly four-decade career in Congress that culminated in her becoming the first and only woman to serve as Speaker of the House of Representatives. Pelosi held the top position for two non-consecutive terms and was instrumental in securing the House passage of key legislation, including the under President Barack Obama. Her later tenure as speaker included presiding over two House votes . After her retirement announcement, Trump released a statement saying he was "very honored she impeached me twice and failed miserably twice." Pelosi will conclude her current term as a representative for California in January 2027. subject: Cowboys Player Dies, Fugitive Arrested, and Texans Buy Volleyball Team
body:
Dallas Cowboys defensive end Marshawn Kneeland [died yesterday morning](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SpSAQhZ8GMyxof3ACgk3IZtMNrVaaK7UIFjA6vv2WW_cNJuqkz6nvfH8-50_0wcfXb9xJ12-X5khXCVQr5XlN15LucgS8KVtPxX29fPUnzSBg4FJyoWaLPtxz31i9CPshG9JSjTDIcfqQzaYHNcqFVuhlD6BogcFZsjC5RSyim4bG66dMSqEkCAlj61ZB6LqlU_2KAw6sF2R9TbmtG1X6xuLCnU7K7Zr2Juit1qOw7hcDw8Bc19V-FazJ4v08MDClpnw_90i5FgYmusDAvNcxMA8AAyMlAyNGBmbHXDa8Iv8biQJGyy2GgIW_M_yRwS05isWfxClaBmZSEjqhQAjFwDRZ2-PyIfgyKtaL144-_EeuPxN9avgXAAD__3Cbkco) from a self-inflicted gunshot wound after a police chase in Frisco. Kneeland, 24, was the team's second-round pick in last year's draft and had scored his first career touchdown in Monday night's game against the Arizona Cardinals.

# Friday, November 7, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1972, Texas voters approved the [Texas Equal Rights Amendment](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFygzAQQNHTiA5GEiDZhYo0dE6bklnQAjsRkiOtjbl9Jr5CLvD-zP-6jTegQHH9hB0dv5Y0RjxKQGbM45yOKZ3lHuDE7AnL8liJ6YmjlrqvlaqlHT1QOMeu8m6S_qoqdMoa3Stzuapqc3hZZH-1UhrTaalM17X9RRnr_aSMsVNF7g9TSlqlpdKmWWaJsLRTa7sZeuhFJ9ETp9zwhowvKEs40xNzM6e9Cm5jvhfRfgg9CD0cx9Fw2SDFQBGblFehhw2in1L6FnrAyJmwCD28qRp_HhDqTOvGpYYdo98xcpWdvx8UAhVjRSfXHSi8e_y_S0-nfwMAAP__7m992w), granting the same legal rights to men and women in the state constitution. The amendment provided the basis for several new state laws, including one that ended sex-based discrimination in processing loan and credit applications. A Lubbock man was rescued by helicopter from a Crosby County canyon on Wednesday. Check out the video of the operation [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u4yAUBOCnwR0WHPwTFxTbuMu2W1pwOCQo2ESA4_jtV76vcLuRRvpGmn_35W5CDNvjr1lJ169Py0ZHiVQr5QXTYdNZ3tGclF2g4vdHqOFDCwjouZRcjIszIZ5L1zhthZtkQ1qOA_RyuE2yeWpA6P2tU50i1asR_TRJqUggDtbfuqEJ-sKkFKMEIWFoPQoyXlk1dmh607NOkAs15bY-qdLXFB_P9KHcYlqbqJ-1vgtTfxjMDObjONoXWneVDObLZjBLyWAWV1rNxjMV3MlxNNuZNo45FXtyTPtWT25CjsFXcjzu1iZ8MZibrN37CDGGMoysE4_VhPgzX3932kfD_wAAAP__aGKA9w). If constant tingling, burning, or numbness in your hands and feet has been holding you back, today's sponsor, [Nervovive](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOgyAUAL8GbzU8QKkHDk0ab-11jwbkUV-CxQil9e833V_Y8yQzyfzcppulSM_H3a5oyiek6YnvHLEU3Kc5vV068hbtgbsnzOH1oEIVJ8FFdwI4cT15S_GYVOON436ABg3oXnTQnwdoFhO0cLPsueokqPPMUZ2FGgY3OADrg2rIfGUAXIPgIPo2zBxtkE5qNdvOdkxx9FTS3pYFC35sDvFIFfd2TmsTzVLKlpm8MDEyMT5xr6lSxS9lYqzkMbXbsjE52hAoki3I5NWl6O2GH2CiL-SZvIa4vnLx6Lm-pyq6S7Mbv70pRsq9Zoo_VkvxL1r-t6oa8RsAAP__UnV-fw), could provide the natural relief you’ve been waiting for. It’s already helped thousands ease neuropathic pain without pills or side effects.

## Flight Cuts Ordered at Four Texas Airports
Four Texas airports are affected by [mandatory flight reductions](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGutCAQBeCn0Q7DoOhuQfE3dvu3tzQIg5KgGBiX9e1v3Fe43RST7-Scn9f00j74ffmvN1T0cXHaseSARJgmE8scr3wEfWGyHrM7F0_-jZPgQjIAxofJah-uqautmrl9Qo0Khl5I6B9PqFc1P6HtTKdB9FZKOXOpH63jA8cZENDUXt0YAB9AcBB94wxH7dq5HTqjpZZVx9F6iqmhFQk_OrtwxTemxsStDmolOnLV_qvEWImxlNK4-OnuGvdDJcb7rMRoXWHzmVemfTpiIva1mAt-WYmZkzJbbnbfcCeW15NsLHudlD2KD8Hnfqg6vmzah28y_W2vtxK_AQAA__8iXYMF) ordered by the FAA in 40 high-volume areas nationwide: Dallas-Fort Worth International Airport, Dallas Love Field, George Bush Intercontinental Airport, and William P. Hobby Airport. In response to the ongoing government shutdown, the FAA has directed U.S. carriers to [reduce flights](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOhCAYBOCnwU4DiLoWFNfY7bVXml_4URIEA_-u69tfvFe4fvJlZn6e8xN88HH9hh01fVyaI54lIBHm2aRzSVc5AlyYrcfiXqsn_8ZZctnVQtR8mC34cM2qsnrhdhQVajH0shP9YxTVpk3bW6MEWqu4G4XlD-TduAxWPRZA5Sqvb0wIPgjJhewbZziCa5d2UAY66JjiaD2l3NCGhB8oLlzpjbkxaa-C3oiOwtovJicmp_M8m_0qECFSij7dISanexWTU0gGApMTZPImIJPTektxx0h12V5k0xlrB1CDz0fKVGophJLDyJtjO6qs7XH6EHzpB6b4uoMPfzXof-e9tfwNAAD__-58hoU) by 4% starting today and increase the cuts by 1% per day until a 10% reduction is achieved by next week. "_I’m not aware in my 35-year history in the aviation market where we've had a situation where we're taking these kinds of measures_ ," FAA Administrator Bryan Bedford [said Wednesday](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAQhJ8GOp9sY2P-wkVS0P1pUqREC17DSj58spfjePuIvELqkWbm-_58T99Aifb1FzzR8yfmacezJmTGMi35nPNVXwkuLIGwxmMlpjdOWmorlBLSTQEoXZNpg59l-FIteuV6bVU_fKl28zBbZ-UwzMMgoZNOK9ADzCBNB9F0tiV_lyklndJS6f4RF4kQu7lzZgELtjESA3EuD96Q8QM1piu_sTyW_GyT35hftel-NHps9AjzchM81nzHjR5_HpV2rLXR40kFf3MuV6PHCCAKwk0lElUWQOWVC1dRMBwLBhETrRtXsd5b-xN3FnU7OORzF0o7bYw1fVt8eJ2UEtXeNUauT6D07xj_n863138DAAD__59KjGs). "_We’re in new territory in terms of government shutdowns_." Texans planning to travel in the near future should monitor their flight status and expect delays at the airport. Most airlines are [offering refunds](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHO4yAQBOCnwR0RYLChcHGNu__aK601rOPVkWDBOv7z9qfcK_z1J41m5s_X8gWU6Xn_DQ-c-HsryxOvlpEZ6xLLtZZ3OzK8sSbCtp13YnrhYpRxUmupxiUB5fdiuzStKgXd4aTHwTg9-KC7fQq9DdZqZzzo3uoImx-Nt872YV09ho6mT5jWatRGaTPctqgQtn7tRxvBgRNWYSIu9cY7Mn5D2_K7vLDeYnl0edqZjyb6X8LMwszXdd3-7uX8oDAzVKaYUZj5s0uYOZcI-QNUj1JZbpnuO8uK6YxM5SnPIwFjk-eTGJNs5eT9wsYSHlgpwlOY2XgnnR2UWt0oRw9O2kFF6ZMLskdnQvCDGaLt6pSOi3KmNozCqvsDKP-vzT87-zWZfwEAAP__Na-SbA) or waiving fees to reschedule travel if customers' flights are canceled.
## Cowboys Player's Death Mourned
Dallas Cowboys defensive end Marshawn Kneeland [died yesterday morning](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SpSAQhZ8GMyxof3ACgk3IZtMNrVaaK7UIFjA6vv2WW_cNJuqkz6nvfH8-50_0wcfXb9xJ12-X5khXCVQr5XlN15LucgS8KVtPxX29fPUnzSBg4FJyoWaLPtxz31i9CPshG9JSjTDIcfqQzaYHNcqFVuhlD6BogcFZsjC5RSyim4bG66dMSqEkCAlj61ZB6LqlU_2KAw6sF2R9TbmtG1X6xuLCnU7K7Zr2Juit1qOw7hcDw8Bc19V-FazJ4v08MDClpnw_90i5FgYmusDAvNcxMA8AAyMlAyNGBmbHXDa8Iv8biQJGyy2GgIW_M_yRwS05isWfxClaBmZSEjqhQAjFwDRZ2-PyIfgyKtaL144-_EeuPxN9avgXAAD__3Cbkco) from a self-inflicted gunshot wound after a police chase in Frisco. Kneeland, 24, was the team's second-round pick in last year's draft and had scored his first career touchdown in Monday night's game against the Arizona Cardinals. Shortly after 10:30 p.m. on Wednesday, state troopers tried to pull Kneeland over for a traffic violation on the Dallas North Tollway, but he [refused to stop](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdCB7MfalcHENXa69Ei3edbDOQIR9cXj7X0T_G_ztjGZG3_y9T3eMKW6PP7iyK--wTxvXnLgUPia_13k_8zPhyQdFzuH_I5b44gkkDK1SrbQTYUznpBtys6Sbatgpa2BQ5tdNNYvjYIl0rzxpOSDNJgzW655hDuFmDDTRXWVKSatAKjBd8JIx9HNvtccBB6ElUyz70ZWFC78xh3TuLz46v69Nckspzyz63wJGAWOttfNzviguX8D4iQgYL0nASJgS5vabrV3xyAvWrf23MSfcqCVGEjA2h6NnjSnFbKzQ8rFiTJ_J8rOjXg6-AgAA___OgH_P). Later, police found his damaged vehicle abandoned and located the deceased Kneeland nearby using search dogs and drones. Meanwhile, Kneeland's girlfriend [requested a welfare check](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u5CAQhE-DM0aAf5gJCDZx9jbd0GpD29PaNljA2M-3X3mv8OL69FWp_nxNX0BMcf0NG7r6vaQp4lkYa8U8-XTO6So7w4U5EJbls1KlAyejTC-1lspOAYivqWuCm1V46QadtoPp9fB86ebtbN9B17-80e2As37aZR6edrZt2yujuldD7pZpraw2SpvhsXiFsLRzazsPPfSiUxiopvyob6z4DWXhKx2YHz5tDbt3rXsR7S9hRmHGeO2p1DsSZrzNwoxaCzOqQZix7CnXIsy4UuYlE8YgTyjSp3hQ9Bgk5A2D3CCXN5xR_o2IDDeVPhzkzVOVwCwDlfrJM8VV7onJo4RPoCQzHgh8dzTZhf0kZiqDFZ1aNyD-P7r-7OrDmX8BAAD__6aSlQA) at his Plano residence, informing authorities he was armed, had a history of mental illness, and might "end it all." In a statement, the Cowboys remembered Kneeland as a "beloved teammate." His former coach at Western Michigan [described him](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAYhJ8GOwwgihYU19jttVeaX_hdySFsgF3Wt794uTe4biaTzOSbr9tyA-dduH_Cgbq8t7gErNljKZgWE-saz_zwcGKyDvP2vLviXrgIJnrKOWVqseD8ucjG6pXZiTeouRpEz4dx4s2uRzPh1I0w8l5ZNSplYZoYjKobJIJYG6evMs6Z4oJxMbSbYQhbt3ZKGuihJ5KhdSWmtuxY8A1582d8YWpNPBqv91IemXQfRMxEzLXWNqzmorhyIuZLEjHH1ZUnJIeXseA9ZPoHSA9IeYca6HdA9BAsvWhpMgGEFJ1kTdL2UZ33Lg-KSHY_wPnf_fK_115a_AQAAP__gLmDgQ) as "a remarkable young man who meant so much to our program and to me personally." Kneeland's [great uncle called him](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuhDAQRU9jOpBtDF4KF2noNm1KNMYDWBrWyJ4sy-2jjXKD9F__6b2v-3SHSPGxfsKOjl9Lmh54FkJmzNOcTp-uchBcmEPEsnyvkeMTJy11VytVSzsFiHRNpgrOyzCoCp2yve5UfxtUtTlvvUH0xne9D1bKDrvbPPhBLYO1EqCK7n2mlLRKS6X7ZpklwtL61poZOuiEkRgip9zwhowvKAtd6Ym5mdNekduYjyLaD6FHocfzPJvCkGtGwjXD_l4JPZYjZS5Cj4-FhB4DEEGp_wyFHiFznAlbpW_KmN42G-9UZReOMxLF0lth5LpDpF8s_y_W0-mfAAAA__8cjX_O) a "gentle giant" and an "outstanding young man." Kneeland's mother passed away shortly before he was drafted. In [two seasons](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOtCAUBeCnwQ4DVxQtKP6Gbv52S3NHriNZBAPsOL79Zjb7Bluf5OSc7-M239AHHx__cSdTX2uaI50lUK2U5yWd93SVI-BF2Xkq69fDV_-kGQT0XEou9OzQh2tWjTN34SbZkJF6gF4O4ySbzVCn1NiRcjiBBq2nTq2d0IJ6Ny2jGBpv3mVSCi1BSBjadRGEa3fvtFqwx54pQc7XlNu6UaUXljVc6Um5XdLeBLPVehTW_WNgGdjzPFsqR3yHDGxcAwNbasoXAzszsN4xsGoYh2lUEwP7e5IXWlJ0_CLM3BHfMZcNz8g_I1HA6PgbgINqsnHH6UPwZdBMiceOPvxMqX8DfBr4DgAA__8rqYSQ) with the Cowboys, he recorded 26 tackles and one sack over 18 games.
## UT Tyler Grad Named NCAA Woman of the Year
UT Tyler softball standout Sam Schott has been named the 2025 NCAA Woman of the Year, becoming the first athlete from the university to [earn the honor](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuOtDAQhE9jMiO_gH8CB39CNptuiBq7DZYMRnbPMNx-xV5hswpK9fi-n9MTYor78gUbWvqEPO141oREWCaXzzlf9UhwYfERa3gtkeIbJyVUx6XkYpg8xHRNpvF2Fv4hG7Ry6FUn-38P2axWK21QDn3v0MwOhFBBO90LM2tjOg9NtHeYlGKQSkjVt8EJhKBnPRgHHXTMCPSRcmlpRcIP1JCu_MbSurw1ya5ER2X6P1MjU-OL6EpYDqASM9Xbw9R4n2JqvJuYGqVkarxFzYFmSIlXt2YijlD2yo-CleIS86vy3QHwM2-w8xw4rcgvhNJCPT5Nsf44Y0qx9gMzYtkgpt9N9DeSb6t-AgAA__9gFYoF). Schott was one of 631 nominees for the award, which recognizes student-athletes who have graduated and excelled in athletics, academics, and community service. In a [record 235 games](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOpDAQAF9jskZugzETEFxCtpdeiBq7GSwZPLJ7h-X3p7kv3AdKVfXna_mimOL5_E0HT_Kz5eXkqyYW4bL4fK35rq9EN5cQuW7fzyjxzYvRxgIiaLcEiule-iZMqw4PbHhCNxiLw_jAZp8G7PvedV1nBw40BNJdCGwH32tHZqQmTh8YonZoNJqh3bxm2rq1c70nS1b1mkOUXFrZWfiH6pbu_ObS-nw0adpFXlV1v5SZlZmv62r9WvHRyluZmYpEn1iZ-dOlzJyyp6TMXOmA6vcsAiv7fHCFLZYq8C0gd-ICJHtiYbjiCacngisfdILsDDdTUWa2GmG0Dt2GKzjjA_QhrPDwawA3IuG4WasNNmUKryumFOvgVK-fB8X0z17-7_l7Mn8DAAD__8gylVw), Schott hit .327 with 59 extra base hits and 137 RBI. She received All-Conference honors three times, and she's a two-time Golden Glove winner. Schott is currently studying to [become a doctor](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3O4yAQRZ8Gd1iAf1NQbOMu225pjWEco2BjMZM4vP0qW-wLfOXVlY6Ozp_7fIcQw_H4DTta_qxpPvCiiMyYZ5euJRU6IxTMPiCtr0fg8MbZKNNJraUaZg8hlrmtvF2Uv-kKrR560-l-vOlqsw32bnSNUt516Hu_jAugW8ab6Ydu9EMV7BemtRq0Udr09eoUwtoszdA66KATrUIfOOWaN2T8AK2xpDfm2qW9inZjPkk0v4SZhJmu66qfyM_vKcxEZ8pMwkwxOYjy_3yx5BIxkyTYJbktMcsdnkhyC8QpFwkkDwcgr7TDIdMqeUNZELIwU5WtP68QY6B-EK167BDiPx_-WcW3NX8DAAD__x2hiqM) at the UT Tyler School of Medicine. She is a two-time CSC Academic All-American honoree and the 2024 Lone Star Conference Academic Player of the Year. Schott has volunteered for the Special Olympics, Miracle League, and the East Texas Food Bank. She has also traveled to Guatemala several times with Refuge International, providing supplies and support for medical missions. Schott said the award "is a beautiful reminder of God's goodness and how He has worked through me during my four years at UT Tyler."

Cowboys Player's Death Mourned Dallas Cowboys defensive end Marshawn Kneeland from a self-inflicted gunshot wound after a police chase in Frisco. Shortly after 10:30 p.m. on Wednesday, state troopers tried to pull Kneeland over for a traffic violation on the Dallas North Tollway, but he . In a , Schott hit .327 with 59 extra base hits and 137 RBI. She received All-Conference honors three times, and she's a two-time Golden Glove winner. Schott has volunteered for the Special Olympics, Miracle League, and the East Texas Food Bank. She has also traveled to Guatemala several times with Refuge International, providing supplies and support for medical missions. name: Don Davis
subject: I have good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
Which do you want first?
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e40e229-ea3e-441f-9e7b-eced842f2e94/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| I have good news and bad news, Peter. I’ll start with the good news. Good news: We are off to a strong start for this month’s fundraising! Thanks to people like you, our grassroots campaign is able to begin building up the resources we will need to protect this seat in 2026. But here’s the bad news: Republicans have just redrawn North Carolina’s congressional maps in an unprecedented attack on our democracy. North Carolina voters did not want this and their effort undermines everything North Carolina stands for. I’m on the GOP’s list of top targets, and since we only won by about 6,000 votes last year, we know we’re facing an even tougher battle this time. Growing up in the tobacco fields of eastern North Carolina, I learned the importance of working hard to create opportunity. I continue to live those values and will continue working every day to bring real results to North Carolinians. My team and I are working hard to expand healthcare access, bring jobs back home, and reduce education costs. But Peter, I can’t do this without you. [Unlike my opponent, I don’t have millions of dollars to pour into my campaign. My number one priority and supporter is people like you. So, can I count on you to be a part of my team and split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to ensure we can keep delivering results?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6e7b9e6-e337-46ab-9d96-d378749861ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1526447-ed88-4234-8a98-ba74e160cb98/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $20](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e2be7ad-449f-409d-9f1b-639bf2540d7c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17b2dcab-c078-4dcb-97b9-679acf754399/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks, Don [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T808101d5-f3e1-480a-9f92-593548966bcc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampaction.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20251107_davis-news_b1_f1_s1_c1_warmup_n-t0?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d8f0592-88fe-41f4-8e9f-9b0e7d2740e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Confirmed via independent polling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
We’re BEATING Hochul by 1 POINT...
This poll changes everything...
| Friend,
---
Ever since the Democrats’ government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign’s fundraising.
---
With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts.
In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that _YOU_ are our ONLY priority, which is why I’ve had my own salary withheld during the Democrats’ senseless shutdown.
**_But today, I have to at least break my silence because I just received information that will _UPEND_ the 2026 elections. _**
**A BRAND NEW POLL in New York just dropped, showing that once voters are aware of our positions, I would _BEAT_ Democrat governor Kathy Hochul by _1 POINT_!**
Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum.
There’s no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She’s even being labeled the **MOST VULNERABLE** Democrat governor in the country.
_And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory._
_So long as we reach every last voter, so long as our message isn’t drowned out by the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys, and so long as I have YOU in my corner, we can SAVE New York!_
_...But all this depends on having the resources necessary to get the job done._
**That is why I’ve made the calls to secure a 5oo% MATCH for the next 24 hours to ensure we capitalize on this moment. **
Now that our path to save New York is clearer than ever, now that we have all the momentum, will you stand with me in our fight to FIRE Hochul?

clean_body: We’re BEATING Hochul by 1 POINT... This poll changes everything... | Friend, Ever since the Democrats’ government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign’s fundraising. With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts. In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that YOU are our ONLY priority, which is why I’ve had my own salary withheld during the Democrats’ senseless shutdown. But today, I have to at least break my silence because I just received information that will UPEND the 2026 elections. A BRAND NEW POLL in New York just dropped, showing that once voters are aware of our positions, I would BEAT Democrat governor Kathy Hochul by 1 POINT! Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum. There’s no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She’s even being labeled the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat governor in the country. And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory. So long as we reach every last voter, so long as our message isn’t drowned out by the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys, and so long as I have YOU in my corner, we can SAVE New York! ...But all this depends on having the resources necessary to get the job done. That is why I’ve made the calls to secure a 5oo% MATCH for the next 24 hours to ensure we capitalize on this moment. Now that our path to save New York is clearer than ever, now that we have all the momentum, will you stand with me in our fight to FIRE Hochul? | Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I am officially running for governor of New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Governor
body:
You deserve to be among the FIRST to know.

You deserve to be among the FIRST to know.
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5ov1ljh45dnqjnspc278aq9p2346u0lt70brnmg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clj61ob1cdh2bs)
---
**_OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Friend,
---
As one of my biggest grassroots supporters, I wanted to tell you this HUGE news personally...
---
**_I’m officially launching my campaign for governor of New York – and I’d like _YOU_ to be one of our very first Founding Members!_**
---

[ACCEPT YOUR
FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl58k67jg0jf5i5oj7ksak3ncbsgp6nb4p0abh30_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clj61ob1cdh2bs)
---

Kathy Hochul is the WORST governor in America, and she’s brought our once great state to its knees with her crippling taxes, crushing government regulations, and pro-criminal agenda.
---
__But her embrace of communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani was the FINAL straw.__
---
**As I watched the results come in on election night, I felt it was my duty to step up to the plate and fight with everything I have to SAVE New York from this communist takeover!**
---
This isn’t just another election, Friend.
---
**_It’s the _FINAL_ _BATTLE_ to SAVE New York before it’s lost forever!_**
---
Hochul will rubber stamp Mamdani’s dangerous communist agenda that seeks to abolish prisons, seize private property, drown us in taxes, let violent illegal aliens torment U.S. citizens, and tyrannically weaponize the power of the state against anyone who disagrees.
---
**But as the next Governor of New York, I will be the _FINAL_ _FIREWALL_ that protects New Yorkers from this insanity!**
---
We’re starting off in a strong position. Back-to-back polls just showed us with a _**ONE-POINT LEAD**_ – _and that’s before I even officially launched our campaign!_
---
As long as we raise the funds we need to fight back against Hochul’s attacks, cut through her multimillion-dollar ad buys, and get every last Republican to the polls, we have a clear path to victory.
---
That’s why the most important thing we can do right now is show a SURGE of grassroots support with thousands of Founding Members joining the ranks of our campaign.
---
Make no mistake, this will be the KEY to victory. Your support today could help us move one step closer to unlocking MILLIONS of dollars in matching funds from New York state!
---
**_That’s not a gimmick – it’s a REAL, authentic,_600% MATCH_!_**
---
When I’m sworn in as the next Governor of New York, I’ll know exactly who I have to thank...
---
**_Our Founding Members like _YOU_ who had my back on day one!_**
---
[**So please, make a contribution of ANY amount to become an official Founding Member of my gubernatorial campaign to FIRE Kathy Hochul – and help unlock a 600% MATCH.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqfhf4gmnnmcmnlq4d618h7o7n8tsd4erij1u09o_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clj61ob1cdh2bs)
---

Thank you,

clean_body: You deserve to be among the FIRST to know. You deserve to be among the FIRST to know. | OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK Friend, As one of my biggest grassroots supporters, I wanted to tell you this HUGE news personally... I’m officially launching my campaign for governor of New York – and I’d like YOU to be one of our very first Founding Members! Kathy Hochul is the WORST governor in America, and she’s brought our once great state to its knees with her crippling taxes, crushing government regulations, and pro-criminal agenda. But her embrace of communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani was the FINAL straw. As I watched the results come in on election night, I felt it was my duty to step up to the plate and fight with everything I have to SAVE New York from this communist takeover! This isn’t just another election, Friend. It’s the FINAL BATTLE to SAVE New York before it’s lost forever! Hochul will rubber stamp Mamdani’s dangerous communist agenda that seeks to abolish prisons, seize private property, drown us in taxes, let violent illegal aliens torment U.S. citizens, and tyrannically weaponize the power of the state against anyone who disagrees. But as the next Governor of New York, I will be the FINAL FIREWALL that protects New Yorkers from this insanity! We’re starting off in a strong position. Back-to-back polls just showed us with a ONE-POINT LEAD – and that’s before I even officially launched our campaign! As long as we raise the funds we need to fight back against Hochul’s attacks, cut through her multimillion-dollar ad buys, and get every last Republican to the polls, we have a clear path to victory. That’s why the most important thing we can do right now is show a SURGE of grassroots support with thousands of Founding Members joining the ranks of our campaign. Make no mistake, this will be the KEY to victory. Your support today could help us move one step closer to unlocking MILLIONS of dollars in matching funds from New York state! That’s not a gimmick – it’s a REAL, authentic,600% MATCH! When I’m sworn in as the next Governor of New York, I’ll know exactly who I have to thank... Our Founding Members like YOU who had my back on day one! Thank you, Rep. subject: Jewish “reconaissance” tours???
body:
Accusing Jews of conducting recon tours and spying on the Capitol is par for the course for Boebert.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZeBrJ95_SN06BFYEsv0mvYSGKRSAkG6b3MkqOqoaUyXhgYgR8hWynKFHk6ZUjl9Y3PZ1rEPq0WWKkOScX7yEQG3qMY4ovbawEyih7STW0yxgGoH9lhVa8TTHtQYDXy1LHsUgSHanD1lYw9Xr09MwfppFAC-u51ZuE_atrNJCUTCQl9VZzyyfGFslngVnZZ0wIaTTYn3XA08LBVoaW8HUhZKKecvcc6G7&c=s5zGoKVTsGaV_G2SrrOZRw5B4gmwn6IOEQmncL4EnCF-2lSuF426mw==&ch=3DJBHkgBsipfWUwAh30CdzEyU4k2knxaBiGwTCkrkWYSwTg9BDhWmQ==)

|

Peter,
This year marked the four year anniversary of the January 6th attack on our nation's Capitol.
Congresswoman Lauren Boebert was not a bystander, she played a key role in setting the stage for the attack. In the days leading up to the insurrection, she led groups of MAGA militia on "tours" of the Capitol, pointing out entrances and security weak points.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZeBrJ95_SN06BFYEsv0mvYSGKRSAkG6b3MkqOqoaUyXhgYgR8hWynKFHk6ZUjl9Y3PZ1rEPq0WWKkOScX7yEQG3qMY4ovbawEyih7STW0yxgGoH9lhVa8TTHtQYDXy1LHsUgSHanD1lYw9Xr09MwfppFAC-u51ZuE_atrNJCUTCQl9VZzyyfGFslngVnZZ0wIaTTYn3XA0-ILrWA6d3O3-aUEcmp54eA&c=s5zGoKVTsGaV_G2SrrOZRw5B4gmwn6IOEQmncL4EnCF-2lSuF426mw==&ch=3DJBHkgBsipfWUwAh30CdzEyU4k2knxaBiGwTCkrkWYSwTg9BDhWmQ==)
---

Boebert never faced accountability. She even voted against honoring the brave Capitol Police officers. And later, she mocked a group of Jewish visitors in the Capitol, asking them if they were "doing reconnaissance" -- a callback to how the media framed what she did in the leadup to Jan. 6.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZeBrJ95_SN06BFYEsv0mvYSGKRSAkG6b3MkqOqoaUyXhgYgR8hWynKFHk6ZUjl9Y3PZ1rEPq0WWKkOScX7yEQG3qMY4ovbawEyih7STW0yxgGoH9lhVa8TTHtQYDXy1LHsUgSHanD1lYw9Xr09MwfppFAC-u51ZuE_atrNJCUTCQl9VZzyyfGFslngVnZZ0wIaTTYn3XA0-eNmaleSH8nYxLiPVRLxxP&c=s5zGoKVTsGaV_G2SrrOZRw5B4gmwn6IOEQmncL4EnCF-2lSuF426mw==&ch=3DJBHkgBsipfWUwAh30CdzEyU4k2knxaBiGwTCkrkWYSwTg9BDhWmQ==)
---

In 2022, while walking through the House of Representatives, Lauren Boebert encountered a large group of Jewish tourists that included Rabbis and Orthodox Jews with traditional beards and yarmulkes. She came up to the group and asked them if they were "doing reconnaissance."
This behavior isn't new. Boebert and her allies thrive on spreading hate and conspiracies especially about Jews. Take for instance the conspiracy propagated by Boebert co-conspirator Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene that "Jewish space lasers" were causing wildfires across America.
Accusing Jews of conducting recon tours and spying on the Capitol is par for the course for Boebert. In her five years on Capitol hill, her callous hate fueled speech has alienated Palestinians, Jews, Muslims, the disabled, Ranchers, the list goes on and on. This behavior caught up to her and forced to her to flee old district where her constituents had turned against her. Now, the constituents in her new district are turning on her too, she is more vulnerable than ever and Democrat Trisha Calvarese can beat her.
[If there was ever an election to beat her, it is this one. Can we count on you to make a donation of $25, $15, or even $5 to help Team Trisha remove Boebert once and for all?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZeBrJ95_SN06BFYEsv0mvYSGKRSAkG6b3MkqOqoaUyXhgYgR8hWynKFHk6ZUjl9Y2qc34cUShLPNkknVCkc4pmbnY9ZT39e4zazxBWaTzwJL8EvswDgKaaDmy4XFueEAihVqaCWDBtnbnKy8-rYo85IA8kAd60fNTvas2DYcqXSvT-J2LOK6j4dpgwAKvU1YcMkjcpocW6tiqXGpGvf4vAHUSFVfb2vBPZzXP01OOis=&c=s5zGoKVTsGaV_G2SrrOZRw5B4gmwn6IOEQmncL4EnCF-2lSuF426mw==&ch=3DJBHkgBsipfWUwAh30CdzEyU4k2knxaBiGwTCkrkWYSwTg9BDhWmQ==)

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: RSVP -- Utilities Fair Thursday, November 13
body:
|

---
Friends and neighbors, I know many had the opportunity to visit our Utilities Fair at Coppin State last month, and I am happy to share that we will be hosting another Utilities and Internet Services Fair on Thursday, November 13, in Baltimore County. The event will feature utility and internet service providers from across the state and serve as an opportunity for consumers to get information, help with their bills, and learn about affordability programs and rate structure. Representatives from utility and internet providers will be on-site to offer assistance to consumers. Space is limited so please RSVP [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15321.13507611.5741041.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fdocs.google.com%2fforms%2fd%2fe%2f1FAIpQLSfeLmw59AmKXg8rNr3UoVCesKdVixhWgWVI8souj4OsnPyx2Q%2fviewform&redir_log=316124308542676) to reserve your spot. Stay tuned for an upcoming Utilities and Internet Services Fair in Montgomery County next month. [](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15321.13507611.5741041.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fdocs.google.com%2fforms%2fd%2fe%2f1FAIpQLSfeLmw59AmKXg8rNr3UoVCesKdVixhWgWVI8souj4OsnPyx2Q%2fviewform&redir_log=316124308542676) Sincerely, Angela Alsobrooks
United States Senator
[Click here to Unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/EForm.aspx?__cid=SenAlsobrooks&__fid=100022&__crop=15321.13507611.5741041.7190525)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: DANGER: Prop 50 Power Grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
What California just did could stop President Trump’s agenda

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-yLaw)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, California has just pulled off one of the biggest and most sinister political power grabs in modern American history. We can't ignore this serious threat... **Prop 50 wasn 't about fairness. It was a power grab. ** _California is already one of the most heavily gerrymandered states in America. And now, the Democrats just rewrote the rules to make it even worse. _ With **Prop 50** , Democrats have paved the way to carve out **FIVE new Democrat-controlled districts** , locking Republicans and millions of California voters out of power and potentially throwing control of the House to Democrats in 2026! _**Let 's look at the math**_**:** Democrats already hold around **80% of the seats** , even though only about **60% of Californians vote Democrat.** Now they're moving to push out almost every Republican member of Congress from California to potentially lock in **90% of all Californian House seats**! They're not just redrawing maps. They're _**erasing opposition**_**.**
---
[ **CHIP IN TO HELP ME FIGHT BACK >> ** ](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---
And make no mistake -- this was a **national operation** : Governor **Gavin Newsom** flooded the airwaves, manufacturing panic and pushing a false sense of urgency. National Democrat icons -- **Barack Obama, AOC, Elizabeth Warren** -- lent their names and faces, dressing this up as a fight for "fairness." But the truth? It was always about **cementing power.** _Even Newsom eventually told donors to_ stop giving money _ -- that's how massive and well-funded this machine was! _ California just showed us what the radical left is willing to do to stay in control -- and unless we stand up now, the rest of America could be next.
---
[ **DONATE NOW TO HELP ME FIGHT BACK >> ** ](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---
**We can 't let this go unanswered. **
---
[ **DONATE NOW** ](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-ikaw17czh6-79jjkyw)
---
For Liberty,
Ted Cruz
---
[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-S18f-o8Npmzg)
---
**PS:** _California 's Democrats just want power and they're ok with breaking every principle of fairness they pretend to stand for to get it... _
---
[ **DONATE NOW** ](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-hXqrA)

name: Rural Americans United
subject: ICYMI: Why Washington’s Fourth District May Hold the Line for American Democracy
body:
District 4 may now be the key battleground where Washington’s pro-democracy movement proves that rural voices can still shape the nation’s future.
| | | | |
---
| What Is In This Newsletter?

* 14,152! Together, We're Reaching New Voters
* Why Washington's Fourth District May Hold the Line for American Democracy
* Progressive Strategies: Data
* The Hatch Act Is Dead -- And So Is Accountability in Washington DC

---
| 14,152!

### Together, We're Reaching New Voters

This October, Rural Americans United is mailing 14,152 pro-democracy postcards to newly registered voters across Washington State ahead of the election.
Why newly registered voters
Because this constituency is made up primarily of young people and members of the Latinx community, two groups that have been historically underrepresented in the political process. Our data shows two troubling trends:

1. These voters are less likely to cast ballots, and
2. They are increasingly being targeted by far-right messaging.

Our goal is simple: to make sure the first political message these new voters receive is one that celebrates participation, inclusion, and democracy. By the end of 2025, we will have mailed nearly 50,000 pro-democracy messages across the state. But we are not stopping there. Our next phase includes expanding into social media, radio, and billboards to reach even more rural voters and strengthen civic engagement.
You make this possible
Your continued support allows us to amplify rural voices, empower new voters, and protect democracy in communities that are too often overlooked.
---
| | [Your Donation Is Important](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QhCBvD1R1xoAXkxox-KFu9tDAls-YZjWjYBMfgSa7lEXZlx6joo24ySCodniC5fBP3vQqVAXXr7Ie1z2X9zUi1QVMS6KNvBsZojLRQjO8nvn2BHnu1PqzkFG2rn-2nmVLpm2pUPsqMfYEHlvIENljmty0tP517b-yP6tgL2d2AnEYWdwS0dJL84G-_uMJb-r6omQScnVfbU42E_36_wN3AgikE0ExBgP5mrPTYYdnIE=&c=l2z5MYe84gbDc3O19AeJ9vl2kaYV7i2_9C9Pojgwf3mHtIRf2HvFlw==&ch=A6Z6QvawZj3Dnz4RXUjZJfzsnlbDN6oJRbGhObdfmHuYx_wg_TRAGA==)
---
| |
---
|
## Why Washington's Fourth District May Hold th Line for American Democracy

If you are one of the many people who believe Washington State's Congressional District 4 is not a fight worth taking seriously, as it has not been for the last thirty years, you are dangerously mistaken. Unlike many other states, we have a real chance to make a stand and a meaningful difference.
"47" loudly and proudly declared during his 2024 presidential bid that if people voted for him, they would never have to vote again. That was not a warning shot across the bow; it was the opening salvo of a MAGA revolution. Steve Bannon recently echoed this in an interview with [The Economist](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QhCBvD1R1xoAXkxox-KFu9tDAls-YZjWjYBMfgSa7lEXZlx6joo24z8cvi8zrc_X6jXbD8dHDDT_xMuBuCDTvgEvMbsYsXcyP4TODuyW8m1Bj6WTnICn59LZ_pvKhzCxiHFAXtfEvkGlZdMVy4ijb53GMZa9Bo3C4BEk0VnRgEBdyS0ohqb3WQ==&c=l2z5MYe84gbDc3O19AeJ9vl2kaYV7i2_9C9Pojgwf3mHtIRf2HvFlw==&ch=A6Z6QvawZj3Dnz4RXUjZJfzsnlbDN6oJRbGhObdfmHuYx_wg_TRAGA==), stating that "47 will be president in 2028 because of divine providence."
Washington State remains a stronghold of democratic values and may be one of the few states left where fair and just elections will continue to be held. So far, "47" has not called in the Idaho National Guard to occupy Spokane or Seattle as he has attempted to do in other Democratic cities such as Memphis, Los Angeles, Chicago, Portland, and Washington, D.C.
Frighteningly, "47," despite his complete disconnect from reality, has proven disturbingly effective at turning his fantasies into our, very real, nightmares.
In addition to his unthinkable efforts to deploy the National Guard into American cities, there have been even more ominous moves within his vanguard. These dangerous and outrageous actions include, but are not limited to, requesting a standing militia of 500 "quick reaction troops" per state, ready to be deployed to American cities at a moment's notice ([The Hill)](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QhCBvD1R1xoAXkxox-KFu9tDAls-YZjWjYBMfgSa7lEXZlx6joo24z8cvi8zrc_X4SoaLyvXbX3mTUeQobpv-jaL7qBfoeOjmksfGbV80XnttPTMeS_lw47PSBppZ7wK_XovMUeHS1VqzPhHkLWSr0wvgHeXj3uknLwyb75uXnPRP6CAdnmP6G5kJgsAaJmzgq-DDzsE-THPGxi-fZK9xTE0p9ASFCzm7Mb5C0SDPBxqBX4OF30oakoPUMgJL19OBWb9dP1aRXrrv78_ZXKGYA==&c=l2z5MYe84gbDc3O19AeJ9vl2kaYV7i2_9C9Pojgwf3mHtIRf2HvFlw==&ch=A6Z6QvawZj3Dnz4RXUjZJfzsnlbDN6oJRbGhObdfmHuYx_wg_TRAGA==). [CBS News](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QhCBvD1R1xoAXkxox-KFu9tDAls-YZjWjYBMfgSa7lEXZlx6joo24z8cvi8zrc_X_2GszCUZKoNkMbILhEidUdeKB_8eCMpg02p2kYEs3ZKPJnWSxqs1K04EkJZedU4JCPoG9Cb92yvyEsti_Hji0oYQDIhjcaKdqwl5u47kqOVD1SNbDJaH05kr9civxt3SEp24HYHZ2Q1Bk3dFFe2R-WKcMxHDug8Y15-AVV3k2UbCNBfq8GuL3opo11MhPqqc&c=l2z5MYe84gbDc3O19AeJ9vl2kaYV7i2_9C9Pojgwf3mHtIRf2HvFlw==&ch=A6Z6QvawZj3Dnz4RXUjZJfzsnlbDN6oJRbGhObdfmHuYx_wg_TRAGA==) also reported that "47," referring to the Insurrection Act, claimed he could send the Army, Navy, Air Force, and Marines into American cities and that the courts would not stop him. His use of the Insurrection Act is a biting irony. "47" has demanded that Republican-held states gerrymander their congressional maps to favor Republicans, and he has instructed the [DOJ to deploy election observers](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QhCBvD1R1xoAXkxox-KFu9tDAls-YZjWjYBMfgSa7lEXZlx6joo24z8cvi8zrc_XXgkaxL7KyklULXkDMSDlhzxPtnzzdGmamxhAgS13yKmK_zYl5M8IWyG3LJx_EvO7IZvZhKYuiFZrr6AgecPeOoiscWAopQ2p8lyDqL-Q5W3_HPHGuWSz4k66GWKntFJXBPu9Rb5TYcgHYR4WV6Cc16E4lueIb9PN2EpR7sPXhRs1BYSiaKwTRo1VDmaopKlgje1ehj6p7TM=&c=l2z5MYe84gbDc3O19AeJ9vl2kaYV7i2_9C9Pojgwf3mHtIRf2HvFlw==&ch=A6Z6QvawZj3Dnz4RXUjZJfzsnlbDN6oJRbGhObdfmHuYx_wg_TRAGA==) as if we were a banana republic. These actions are unprecedented, unnecessary, and, if not entirely illegal, certainly trample on the line of legality.
At the congressional level, Washington State has consistently punched above its weight. With Representative Dr. Kim Schrier successfully holding Congressional District 8 and Marie Gluesenkamp Perez flipping Congressional District 3, we have already seen that it can be done. We now need a victory in Congressional District 4, and it can be won, but it requires serious people doing serious work to make it happen.
In the last election cycle, we had two capable candidates who both failed to launch. This cycle, we again have a strong candidate, but their campaign has yet to show clear momentum. I have personally reached out to encourage people to do what is necessary, but to date, I have heard only faint rumblings. Taking back at least one chamber of Congress is not a loss we can afford. Our country and our way of life hang in the balance, and the scales are tipping in the wrong direction. Now is not the time to look off into the distance at races far away; it is time to focus on what is attainable here and now. We can flip Congressional District 4. We can.

---
| |
---
The data and narrative below is provided by Progressive Strategies Northwest
Voter Turnout
As the saying goes, "all politics are local." And in years where most politics are local -- odd-numbered years, in Washington State -- "local effects" matter a lot.
Rural, working-class counties number among Washington's lowest- and highest- turnout counties. Southeastern Washington's diminutive Columbia (56.7% historic turnout, county seat Dayton) and Garfield (52.8%, Pomeroy) are near the top of the list; yet, demographically similar counties are also near the bottom, including Skamania (34.0%, Stevenson) and Pend Oreille (34.3%, Newport). What explains the difference? Rigorous demographic analysis suggests: County and city-level elections in Garfield and Columbia seem to excite voters in a way they don't in Skamania and Pend Oreille.

---
| |
---
Still, demographics do matter. Ballot returns among Hispanic voters lag across elections, especially in odd years. That's a common finding across the United States -- and a major concern for voter turnout advocates. It's also a big factor driving the rankings of Yakima (27.9%) and Franklin (29.3%) counties -- although Washington's most Latino county, Adams County (35.0%), is only slightly below state average. This year -- local matters!
---
Bluest Cities
Rural Washington has a reputation as "deep red", but the reality is more complex. Outside of the Puget Sound metro core, Washington State tilts red, but by a margin of only about 55-45%. It also contains many deep-blue islands, which provide important insights into rural voting patterns.
In past years, this list would have been dominated by Hispanic and Native American communities. The #1 entry, technically more Democratic than Seattle, remains the Colville Reservation's Nespelem (Harris 46, Trump 2, Other 1). As Democrats have sustained losses among Hispanic voters, formerly top-ranking towns have fallen down the list, including Mabton (73.7%), Wapato (68.5%), Mattawa (68.3%), and Toppenish (66.4%).
---
|
---
| |
---
The Hatch Act Is Dead -- And So Is Accountability in Washington DC
A pamphlet published by the [Department of Justice](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QhCBvD1R1xoAXkxox-KFu9tDAls-YZjWjYBMfgSa7lEXZlx6joo24z8cvi8zrc_XWX-FK0ubYnQzzid1eGKVcBoAV25iQLkxVhh4CCzCJi-DFHZr_DINI2b7jwbUT8wL888EkaUKoPcTZMiEQ1P7zOjttXueF7eLIw5CuhrPZOXQsTvCx0FwiqDp58vSP4fj&c=l2z5MYe84gbDc3O19AeJ9vl2kaYV7i2_9C9Pojgwf3mHtIRf2HvFlw==&ch=A6Z6QvawZj3Dnz4RXUjZJfzsnlbDN6oJRbGhObdfmHuYx_wg_TRAGA==) in January 2024 defines the Hatch Act as:
"The Hatch Act generally prohibits federal employees from engaging in partisan political activity while on duty, in a federal facility, or using federal property. Political activity is defined as any activity directed toward the success or failure of a political party, candidate for partisan political office, or partisan political group."
It is easy to see why this law matters. It is meant to protect the integrity of government service from political manipulation. But under an administration that denies the rule of law and fills key positions with loyalists rather than qualified public servants, this safeguard has been trampled. Visit almost any federal website today and you will find a banner blaming Democrats for the government shutdown. Earlier in the week, the message even claimed the shutdown was due to Democrats pursuing healthcare for illegal immigrants and "gender mutilation." That line has since been softened to simply call it a "Democrat led shutdown," but the damage is done. The propaganda is blatant, and while it would be laughable in its absurdity, it is instead terrifying because so many Americans believe it.
Why is this allowed to continue? The answer lies in Project 2025. One of its primary objectives was to replace influential government officials with unwavering loyalists. The Hatch Act is enforced by the Office of Special Counsel, which at the time of 47's inauguration was led by Hampton Dellinger, a Biden nominee confirmed by the Senate. Dellinger was immediately targeted and fired.
A lawsuit followed, as the president cannot legally dismiss the head of the Office of Special Counsel or many other officials without cause. But the Supreme Court, corrupted and compliant, sided with 47, ruling that such protections limited his executive power. Soon after, the same Court granted 47 nearly unlimited authority and immunity, declaring that he, and he alone, was above the law.
And where are the Democrats? As usual, standing on the sidelines, issuing press releases with trembling lips and "stinging rebuttals." The only formal response I found was from [Senator Raskin](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QhCBvD1R1xoAXkxox-KFu9tDAls-YZjWjYBMfgSa7lEXZlx6joo24z8cvi8zrc_XZBT1Xd1liLEHFiztuy8bQ8DL63_d997CW_pz6LPMHbTxLkcrKghYL1dytVE9tFzQaTmKzM_ixzAhLbW2JTdFxg2IpcypydQqqM10P9AqQds4kJc5RwNxqtV_5sy29NGSP8IzU9n1RO7tks0BxZUUiPCKBsW7yPxNdh8cHOFcg3tB9WNaa7tGv0-vZ70N97GO-FzZXpjF3Jyn3CQbkPlfSfukr5ybI8CSC4UB5h7kTU0ub5NAbH6PXsGSN932ifIUIZ3wmkG8u-Q=&c=l2z5MYe84gbDc3O19AeJ9vl2kaYV7i2_9C9Pojgwf3mHtIRf2HvFlw==&ch=A6Z6QvawZj3Dnz4RXUjZJfzsnlbDN6oJRbGhObdfmHuYx_wg_TRAGA==), who said the actions "may be a breach of the Hatch Act." May be? That is like saying birthright citizenship is "open for debate." The violation is clear and undeniable. Since Dellinger's unlawful dismissal, there has been a sad procession of acting heads at the Office of Special Counsel because the only nominee put forward by 47, Paul Ingrassia, is so disreputable that even Republicans refuse to confirm him.
This is more than just another political scandal. It exposes a deep failure in how we enforce laws, especially against those who make or interpret them. Violations of the law bring no consequences, only press statements and public scolding. Our "independent" agencies and counsels are proving to be anything but independent. As 47 replaces oversight with obedience, he continues to fire at will and appoint without restriction.
Acting heads do not require Senate approval, and that suits him perfectly. It allows him to install whoever he wants, without resistance or accountability. Why would he ever seek approval when he already behaves as if he needs none?
The death of the Hatch Act symbolizes something larger: the decay of accountability itself. Once a guardrail against corruption, it now stands as a hollow reminder of what used to restrain power. Unless Congress reclaims its authority and the people demand the restoration of independent oversight, this will not stop. The erosion of law is not gradual anymore; it is deliberate and accelerating. If America cannot uphold its own laws against those who govern, then the idea of a government by the people is already gone.

clean_body: District 4 may now be the key battleground where Washington’s pro-democracy movement proves that rural voices can still shape the nation’s future. | | | | | | What Is In This Newsletter? 14,152! Together, We're Reaching New Voters Why Washington's Fourth District May Hold the Line for American Democracy Progressive Strategies: Data The Hatch Act Is Dead -- And So Is Accountability in Washington DC | 14,152! Together, We're Reaching New Voters This October, Rural Americans United is mailing 14,152 pro-democracy postcards to newly registered voters across Washington State ahead of the election. Why newly registered voters Because this constituency is made up primarily of young people and members of the Latinx community, two groups that have been historically underrepresented in the political process. Our data shows two troubling trends: 1. These voters are less likely to cast ballots, and 2. They are increasingly being targeted by far-right messaging. Our goal is simple: to make sure the first political message these new voters receive is one that celebrates participation, inclusion, and democracy. By the end of 2025, we will have mailed nearly 50,000 pro-democracy messages across the state. But we are not stopping there. Our next phase includes expanding into social media, radio, and billboards to reach even more rural voters and strengthen civic engagement. You make this possible Your continued support allows us to amplify rural voices, empower new voters, and protect democracy in communities that are too often overlooked. | | == | | | Why Washington's Fourth District May Hold th Line for American Democracy If you are one of the many people who believe Washington State's Congressional District 4 is not a fight worth taking seriously, as it has not been for the last thirty years, you are dangerously mistaken. Unlike many other states, we have a real chance to make a stand and a meaningful difference. "47" loudly and proudly declared during his 2024 presidential bid that if people voted for him, they would never have to vote again. That was not a warning shot across the bow; it was the opening salvo of a MAGA revolution. Steve Bannon recently echoed this in an interview with ==, stating that "47 will be president in 2028 because of divine providence." Washington State remains a stronghold of democratic values and may be one of the few states left where fair and just elections will continue to be held. So far, "47" has not called in the Idaho National Guard to occupy Spokane or Seattle as he has attempted to do in other Democratic cities such as Memphis, Los Angeles, Chicago, Portland, and Washington, D.C. Frighteningly, "47," despite his complete disconnect from reality, has proven disturbingly effective at turning his fantasies into our, very real, nightmares. In addition to his unthinkable efforts to deploy the National Guard into American cities, there have been even more ominous moves within his vanguard. These dangerous and outrageous actions include, but are not limited to, requesting a standing militia of 500 "quick reaction troops" per state, ready to be deployed to American cities at a moment's notice (==. == also reported that "47," referring to the Insurrection Act, claimed he could send the Army, Navy, Air Force, and Marines into American cities and that the courts would not stop him. His use of the Insurrection Act is a biting irony. "47" has demanded that Republican-held states gerrymander their congressional maps to favor Republicans, and he has instructed the == as if we were a banana republic. These actions are unprecedented, unnecessary, and, if not entirely illegal, certainly trample on the line of legality. At the congressional level, Washington State has consistently punched above its weight. With Representative Dr. Kim Schrier successfully holding Congressional District 8 and Marie Gluesenkamp Perez flipping Congressional District 3, we have already seen that it can be done. We now need a victory in Congressional District 4, and it can be won, but it requires serious people doing serious work to make it happen. In the last election cycle, we had two capable candidates who both failed to launch. This cycle, we again have a strong candidate, but their campaign has yet to show clear momentum. I have personally reached out to encourage people to do what is necessary, but to date, I have heard only faint rumblings. Taking back at least one chamber of Congress is not a loss we can afford. Our country and our way of life hang in the balance, and the scales are tipping in the wrong direction. Now is not the time to look off into the distance at races far away; it is time to focus on what is attainable here and now. We can flip Congressional District 4. We can. | | The data and narrative below is provided by Progressive Strategies Northwest Voter Turnout As the saying goes, "all politics are local." And in years where most politics are local -- odd-numbered years, in Washington State -- "local effects" matter a lot. Rural, working-class counties number among Washington's lowest- and highest- turnout counties. Southeastern Washington's diminutive Columbia (56.7% historic turnout, county seat Dayton) and Garfield (52.8%, Pomeroy) are near the top of the list; yet, demographically similar counties are also near the bottom, including Skamania (34.0%, Stevenson) and Pend Oreille (34.3%, Newport). What explains the difference? Rigorous demographic analysis suggests: County and city-level elections in Garfield and Columbia seem to excite voters in a way they don't in Skamania and Pend Oreille. | | Still, demographics do matter. Ballot returns among Hispanic voters lag across elections, especially in odd years. That's a common finding across the United States -- and a major concern for voter turnout advocates. It's also a big factor driving the rankings of Yakima (27.9%) and Franklin (29.3%) counties -- although Washington's most Latino county, Adams County (35.0%), is only slightly below state average. This year -- local matters! Bluest Cities Rural Washington has a reputation as "deep red", but the reality is more complex. Outside of the Puget Sound metro core, Washington State tilts red, but by a margin of only about 55-45%. It also contains many deep-blue islands, which provide important insights into rural voting patterns. In past years, this list would have been dominated by Hispanic and Native American communities. The #1 entry, technically more Democratic than Seattle, remains the Colville Reservation's Nespelem (Harris 46, Trump 2, Other 1). As Democrats have sustained losses among Hispanic voters, formerly top-ranking towns have fallen down the list, including Mabton (73.7%), Wapato (68.5%), Mattawa (68.3%), and Toppenish (66.4%). | | | The Hatch Act Is Dead -- And So Is Accountability in Washington DC A pamphlet published by the == in January 2024 defines the Hatch Act as: "The Hatch Act generally prohibits federal employees from engaging in partisan political activity while on duty, in a federal facility, or using federal property. Political activity is defined as any activity directed toward the success or failure of a political party, candidate for partisan political office, or partisan political group." It is easy to see why this law matters. It is meant to protect the integrity of government service from political manipulation. But under an administration that denies the rule of law and fills key positions with loyalists rather than qualified public servants, this safeguard has been trampled. Visit almost any federal website today and you will find a banner blaming Democrats for the government shutdown. Earlier in the week, the message even claimed the shutdown was due to Democrats pursuing healthcare for illegal immigrants and "gender mutilation." That line has since been softened to simply call it a "Democrat led shutdown," but the damage is done. The propaganda is blatant, and while it would be laughable in its absurdity, it is instead terrifying because so many Americans believe it. Why is this allowed to continue? The answer lies in Project 2025. One of its primary objectives was to replace influential government officials with unwavering loyalists. The Hatch Act is enforced by the Office of Special Counsel, which at the time of 47's inauguration was led by Hampton Dellinger, a Biden nominee confirmed by the Senate. Dellinger was immediately targeted and fired. A lawsuit followed, as the president cannot legally dismiss the head of the Office of Special Counsel or many other officials without cause. But the Supreme Court, corrupted and compliant, sided with 47, ruling that such protections limited his executive power. Soon after, the same Court granted 47 nearly unlimited authority and immunity, declaring that he, and he alone, was above the law. And where are the Democrats? As usual, standing on the sidelines, issuing press releases with trembling lips and "stinging rebuttals." The only formal response I found was from ==, who said the actions "may be a breach of the Hatch Act." May be? That is like saying birthright citizenship is "open for debate." The violation is clear and undeniable. Since Dellinger's unlawful dismissal, there has been a sad procession of acting heads at the Office of Special Counsel because the only nominee put forward by 47, Paul Ingrassia, is so disreputable that even Republicans refuse to confirm him. This is more than just another political scandal. It exposes a deep failure in how we enforce laws, especially against those who make or interpret them. Violations of the law bring no consequences, only press statements and public scolding. Our "independent" agencies and counsels are proving to be anything but independent. As 47 replaces oversight with obedience, he continues to fire at will and appoint without restriction. Acting heads do not require Senate approval, and that suits him perfectly. It allows him to install whoever he wants, without resistance or accountability. Why would he ever seek approval when he already behaves as if he needs none? The death of the Hatch Act symbolizes something larger: the decay of accountability itself. Once a guardrail against corruption, it now stands as a hollow reminder of what used to restrain power. Unless Congress reclaims its authority and the people demand the restoration of independent oversight, this will not stop. The erosion of law is not gradual anymore; it is deliberate and accelerating. If America cannot uphold its own laws against those who govern, then the idea of a government by the people is already gone. | | | | == | == == mailto:doug@ruralamericansunited.org Rural Americans United | | | | Rural Americans United | 420 South 72nd Avenue Suite 180 PMB 110 | Yakima, WA 98908 US | |

clean_body: URGENT- We invoked the Nuclear Option URGENT- We invoked the Nuclear Option | | | Fellow American, I'm following-up on the important email I sent you recently. I just want to make sure you saw it. If you haven't done so, please read it now. Thanks, Ted \------------------- Forwarded message ------------------ From: Ted Cruz Date: Tue, Oct 14, 2025 at 1:33 PM Subject: We invoked the Nuclear Option To: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | Democrats have been throwing a temper tantrum to try and thwart President Trump's agenda. And so, Senate Republicans did what we had to do... ...We invoked the "Nuclear Option." Please read my emergency briefing to you. For liberty, Ted Cruz . Senator - Texas | " "From the oil fields of West Texas, to the farm lands of the Panhandle, to the United States ' southern border and into space, Ted Cruz has been Texas' leading fighter for over a decade. Since day one, creating jobs, defending freedom, and ensuring security have been Ted's priorities. Ted has a proven record of standing up to any politician or special interest group to defend the Lone Star State. body:
CNN just gave airtime to Russian propaganda—and a Trump ally helped.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K9F944FN5ZZ3KZ555KPKZ2HE_0)
---
| | | | Hey Peter, This week, American airwaves put a Kremlin envoy on air—someone who denied Russia’s hospital bombings in Ukraine. Sitting across from him? MAGA Rep. Anna Paulina Luna, one of Trump’s closest allies. While Russian bombs fall, Trump’s circle gives Putin’s mouthpiece a platform. It’s dangerous—and it’s deliberate. Their disinformation isn’t just about Ukraine. It’s about 2025, our elections, and the future of truth itself. We are demanding an answer for it, and we’re working to expose how foreign propaganda keeps creeping into our politics. Because America deserves facts—not Russian propaganda [See what happened and why it matters.](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K9F944FN5ZZ3KZ555KPKZ2HE_1)

subject: Urgent: Do you have my back? – Need to Pay by Friday to Keep Fighting
body:
Just when we thought we were turning the corner in this endless legal war against Project Veritas and me, another bill slammed down from the attorneys.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10277516/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvS1hUYmZ3WXhiYQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMDc/LbmNsMFpyU3hvUA/qP2hpZHM9bmNkQUJ1NHltY0RvMW1scw/gaQ4AmA/sdhc207c596)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Dear Patriot,

Just when we thought we were turning the corner in this endless legal war against Project Veritas and me, another bill slammed down from the attorneys. **$16,432.** That's what we need to scrape together by the end of this week – Friday at the latest – or we risk grinding to a halt right before the finish line.

You've been with me through the raids, the smears, the court battles meant to crush truth-tellers like us. We're so close to wrapping discovery on those terabytes of data they've dumped to bury us. But this surprise invoice? It's their latest dirty trick to bleed us dry and delay justice.

**We can't let them win now.** Every cent gets us back on track to trial, where we'll finally expose the full corruption and end this nightmare that's sidelined my work for years.

[**Donate Now Before It's Too Late**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

I'm not asking lightly – this is crunch time. If we miss this payment, momentum stalls, and the deep state laughs. But with your help, we pay up, push forward, and hit them harder than ever.

**[**Chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can right now.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Imagine the victory when we reveal it all and get back to the undercover exposes you rely on.

[**Secure Your Gift Today**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Thanks for standing strong. Let's crush this deadline together.

In the fight,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

[ DONATE NOW ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10277516/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMDc/LbmNsMFpyU3hvUA/qP2hpZHM9bmNkQUJ1NHltY0RvMW1scw/gaQ4AmA/s1oa50093bb)

name: Pro Life or Pro Death
subject: Boebert thinks if kids want food so badly they can get a job
body:
Slashing Medicaid, cutting SNAP, and opposing universal child care and free healthy meals for school kids: Boebert is the embodiment of the hypocritical conservative pro-life movement.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b76s9Bgua3Rz_EHkbOq0PKUaaMK6hzNb_DxxB4gbfoXw8Yn6-1F5dWAokbxppBG7tMc5yyC6TaGrGAA5-Os2VCrDO2WdhePvAFLTt4-XCQBES2Wo7jyIjnXqAPFMd8sNMVkuBKZD8T5ThZZf5-iPKTgp08cc6IW7LppaszYdppgRJCbhUX59ngSuBChQmBCeuMI_1-sWmh0gWzGgfnKcuWH2ydlOxZ3yNp6z2vxVPRY=&c=kEu3sUbJSG0eTuaix-9-0R85CjePOYln0WX66PNgroKfGwkhlFZzeA==&ch=LP2FQwmPvseaBsylgexZWUUNam6cKJwFFAfhDd9kgGUP3NBDvAv8FA==)
---
|

Peter,
Lauren Boebert is the perfect embodiment of conservative "pro life" hypocrisy.
First, Boebert and her fellow MAGA anti-abortion extremists scold and shame women who want to control their own bodies and plan their families.
Then, they fight like hell to make sure working parents get zero support to raise a family.
Boebert voted to gut Medicaid by over $800 billion, slash SNAP for hungry kids and families, and gut low-income housing programs. How is it pro life to deny hungry kids food, medicine, and safe housing?
But now, the tide is turning. The American people just came out in force on Tuesday to reject the Trump agenda and MAGA extremists like Lauren Boebert.
In Colorado, voters overwhelmingly guaranteed healthy meals for all public school kids throughout the state. Naturally, Boebert opposes this, and thinks our tax dollars are better used blowing up fishing boats off the coast of Venezuela and remodeling the White House.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b76s9Bgua3Rz_EHkbOq0PKUaaMK6hzNb_DxxB4gbfoXw8Yn6-1F5dWAokbxppBG7tMc5yyC6TaGrGAA5-Os2VCrDO2WdhePvAFLTt4-XCQBES2Wo7jyIjnXqAPFMd8sNMVkuBKZD8T5ThZZf5-iPKTgp08cc6IW7LppaszYdppgRJCbhUX59ngSuBChQmBCeuMI_1-sWmh0gWzGgfnKcuevxjSUtPmFPD4KHNyuytJY=&c=kEu3sUbJSG0eTuaix-9-0R85CjePOYln0WX66PNgroKfGwkhlFZzeA==&ch=LP2FQwmPvseaBsylgexZWUUNam6cKJwFFAfhDd9kgGUP3NBDvAv8FA==)
---

Boebert is cooked. Voters are abandoning the MAGA agenda at the exact time that she has gotten more and more die hard MAGA.
Lauren Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. When she last faced Trisha Calvarese, her Democratic opponent, our campaign had the best performance by any Democrat in the district ever. Now, Trisha is back to finish the job.
[Boebert is unpopular, unwanted, and voters are ready to unseat her and elect Trisha this Midterm. Trisha Calvarese is a labor leader who is building the coalition to defeat her--but we need your help to keep up the incredible momentum right now:](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b76s9Bgua3Rz_EHkbOq0PKUaaMK6hzNb_DxxB4gbfoXw8Yn6-1F5dWAokbxppBG7tMc5yyC6TaGrGAA5-Os2VCrDO2WdhePvAFLTt4-XCQBES2Wo7jyIjnXqAPFMd8sNMVkuBKZD8T5ThZZf5-iPKTgp08cc6IW7LppaszYdppgRJCbhUX59ngSuBChQmBCeuMI_1-sWmh0gWzGgfnKcuelPvNrz1w09rfZFhHpu9CA=&c=kEu3sUbJSG0eTuaix-9-0R85CjePOYln0WX66PNgroKfGwkhlFZzeA==&ch=LP2FQwmPvseaBsylgexZWUUNam6cKJwFFAfhDd9kgGUP3NBDvAv8FA==)

🐾 **And Haley herself? She’s like me – tough, loyal, and totally pawsome at protecting the people she loves.** 🐕💙
That’s why I’m begging: **[Will you chip in $5 today to help Team Haley flip the Senate and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8028?t=4&akid=1297%2E49239%2EWuKr96)**
