clean_body: Election News Update from the Grant Institute | | | | | | | | | | | | | | On Election Day and Teachable MomentsBy Justin Riemer, President, USGI, and Marshal Trigg, Junior Counsel, USGI On Tuesday, millions of Americans in several states voted in contests ranging from governorships to local initiatives. The process went smoothly for most voters. But not everything went off without a hitch. A spate of bomb threats briefly disrupted voting in one polling place and several in New Jersey, leading to an and a extending polling hours in Passaic County. Then there were the unforced errors like in Chester County, Pennsylvania. Shortly after polls opened, election officials they had omitted 75,000 unaffiliated and third-party voters—about 19 percent of the county’s electorate—from all poll books. To their credit, county officials appeared to respond diligently by alerting the Department of State, deploying supplemental poll books, getting a court order to extend polling hours, and communicating their response to county voters and the public. Poll workers also reportedly followed proper protocol by offering provisional ballots instead of turning voters away or letting them vote regular ballots. The county there were sufficient provisional ballots available, although some precincts ran out of provisional envelopes. The county that voters cast over 12,100 provisional ballots, certainly enough to strain local polling locations. Overall, this was an orderly response, especially compared to another recent breakdown that occurred in in the 2022 election. But the damage was done. Fixing a countywide error across 230 polling locations while voting is underway is a real challenge. It took until 3:45 p.m. to deploy all the supplemental poll books. Chester voters who dutifully showed up only to find their names missing were understandably unsettled by the inconvenience. And the incident was bound to feed suspicion, particularly given that the system error had categorically excluded certain voters on the basis of party affiliation (or lack thereof). The error reportedly in the poll book extract, i.e., the database query that generates precinct-level voter lists. Somehow, that process only extracted voters registered with one of the two major parties, suggesting it may have been a setting used for primary elections. Whether a software glitch, user error, or some combination of both, the issue was preventable. For instance, Alleghany County avoids such mishaps by conducting a “ before printing paper poll books. This or other simple quality control processes would have likely caught the error. The incident also raises questions about why SURE, the state’s voter registration system, allows a county to extract an incomplete list in a general election open to all voters – or at the very least, why it wouldn’t display a warning message. Chester also uses paper instead of electronic pollbooks (“e-poll books”). Fayette County's on Tuesday shows that e-pollbooks do not necessarily guarantee accuracy. The county said the Pennsylvania Department of State sent it the 2024 voter file for use in e-pollbooks instead of the current 2025 data. E-poll books would have at least made it easier for Chester to provide supplemental lists to polling locations quicker than printing them. Chester has to conducting a “detailed and comprehensive . . . investigation.” That’s a good start, but the review should be conducted independently and thoroughly examine all root causes, including any oversight lapses by the county election board and Department of State. There’s a delicate balance between piling on and ensuring accountability. The latter doesn’t equate to discrediting our elections or election officials. These are consequential mistakes because they risk disenfranchising voters, eroding voter confidence, and providing fodder for conspiracy theorists. | | | Arkansas The Secretary of State's office found approximately listed on the state’s voter registration rolls after comparing the voter rolls with federal citizenship verification data. Letters have been mailed to the identified voters requesting proof of citizenship, and local election officials will be notified of the office’s findings. California The U.S. Department of Justice poll monitors to polling locations in five California counties during Tuesday’s elections. Voters on Tuesday passed which amends the California Constitution to allow the legislature to adopt a new congressional district map for 2026 through 2030. Republicans the next day arguing the map is an unconstitutional racial gerrymander. Georgia In , election officials reported that an unknown number of absentee ballots from a batch of 533 total processed by an out-of-state vendor were lost in the mail. The county sent replacement ballots to affected voters. Hawaii The bipartisan state elections commission 5-3 to request that the Legislature ban mail-in and early voting and return to in-person only voting on Election Day with an ID, while limiting absentee ballots to military families and voters with special needs. Kansas Attorney General Kris Kobach the filing of against Coldwater Mayor Jose Ceballos: three counts for voting without being qualified and three counts for election perjury. The charges, which were announced one day after Ceballos was reelected, allege that he voted in Kansas elections despite not being a U.S. citizen. The states that his office expects to find more illegally registered voters. Maine On November 4, voters Question 1, a citizen initiative that would have mandated photo ID to vote and changed multiple absentee voting rules, including limiting drop-boxes and ending phone application requests. The measure was defeated by 63.9% to 36.1% of votes counted. Incarcerated Mainers retain the right to vote via absentee ballot, the state being states to permit imprisoned felons to vote. In Brewer, an “” by a UPS employee resulted in 250 absentee-ballot packets for the November 4 election being sent to a private residence in Newburgh instead of the intended destination. The Secretary of State’s Office confirmed that one of two boxes delivered to the municipality of Ellsworth on September 30 was missing five packets (totaling 250 ballots) and noted that detectives retrieved the ballots from the town office in Newburgh. Because of the incident, the office announced it will no longer use UPS or the United States Postal Service for handling the remainder of the 2025 ballots. Maryland Governor Moore has the creation of a “Governor’s Redistricting Advisory Commission” to consider mid-cycle redrawing of the state’s congressional map ahead of the 2026 elections. The move comes despite opposition from the state Senate president. The voted to table consideration of adopting ranked-choice voting, putting on hold discussion which had sought to introduce the alternative voting method for future municipal elections. Montana A requires voters using mail-in ballots to next to their signature on the ballot envelope, and any ballots without that detail are subject to rejection. County election offices in Montana say that () are being flagged under the rule, and officials are ramping up outreach and cure efforts. New Jersey , the reported that multiple polling locations in seven counties were temporarily evacuated or redirected after receiving bomb threats. Law enforcement investigated and determined that the threats were not credible. The state cleared some polling places, while redirecting some voters to alternate polling locations, and allowing polling locations to . The U.S. Department of Justice to key polling sites in Passaic County during Tuesday’s election. The deployment follows the state Republican Party raising concerns about mail-ballot security and alleged prior irregularities. The New Jersey Attorney General the deployment “highly inappropriate.” No incidents regarding the deployment were publicly reported on Election Day. Ohio Secretary of State LaRose has referred for review potential election-related violations to the U.S. Department of Justice, including cases involving possible noncitizen registrations, double voting, and ballot-harvesting. The Secretary said he of suspected voter fraud to county prosecutors, with only 12 being prosecuted. Secretary LaRose Senate Bill 153, a proposal requiring proof of U.S. citizenship for voter registration. He also endorsed Senate Bill 293, which would require the receipt of absentee by election day, noting the change would align Ohio with about two-thirds of states. As of November 4, reported that roughly 17,000 mail-in ballots (nearly 30% of those requested for the general election) had not been returned by Election Day. This would be its lowest return rate in ten years. A candidate running for the Talawanda City Board of Education was removed from his role as a precinct election official after the board found he was working at a polling location . The candidate, who had previously served as a poll worker at that location for six elections, left the site promptly once notified of the violation. The Board of Elections noted the incident is under review and that it was implementing corrective procedures to prevent similar errors. Oregon Officials announced they will not pursue for individuals who cast ballots they were not eligible to vote. The elections director noted the cases were administrative mistakes by Oregon DMV workers who erroneously registered the voters. Pennsylvania announced criminal charges against six canvassers and one field-director for submitting falsified voter registration forms ahead of the 2024 general election in multiple counties. Cambria County election officials invited the public to a for voting equipment, where voters can fill out sample ballots and witness the tallying of results. As noted above, , a poll book extract error omitted third-party and unaffiliated voters, prompting use of provisional ballots, creation of supplemental poll-books, and an order to keep polling places open until 10:00 p.m. In Dauphin County, a at a polling site caused about a 20-minute suspension of operations and turned away approximately 20 voters before reopening under county supervision. , election officials have implemented a new technology-driven system for over-the-counter ballot requests, and the results are striking. Previously, voters requesting ballots in person often faced wait times of 25-30 minutes. With the new system in place, wait times have fallen to around 5-10 minutes. were charged in a voter registration-fraud investigation in Monroe County after allegedly submitting false voter registration and absentee ballot applications in 2024. Officials say the alleged fraud involved forged signatures and fictitious information. , the Department of State mistakenly sent the 2024 voter file to election officials instead of the updated 2025 file, causing some electronic poll books to incorrectly mark voters as having already cast a ballot. Officials switched to backup paper poll books once it discovered the error. Tennessee Secretary of State Hargett announced that his office identified flagged as possible noncitizens. Secretary Hargett said these cases will be referred to the FBI for further investigation and hailed the state’s use of the federal Systematic Alien Verification for Entitlements (SAVE) system to screen the electorate. Texas Proposition 16 on November 4, adding a constitutional amendment that explicitly requires U.S. citizenship to vote in state and local elections. In , voters discovered that two constitutional amendment items, Propositions 14 and 15, appeared on the ballot out of their numerical order (jumping from 13 to 15, then back to 14). County officials acknowledged the error, explained it stemmed from a formatting issue that was not caught by the logic and accuracy testing board. Wyoming Over the , the Secretary of State received 80 formal election-related complaints, with six (about 7.5%) alleging possible voter fraud. The bulk of complaints instead focused on errors or misconduct by election officials, campaign mailers, or improper campaigning. | | | Georgia The State Election Board will meet on and the agenda includes a presentation on cybersecurity and an update on pending investigative matters in a report from the Secretary of State’s office. The State Election Board on December 9 and 10. The Board will consider proposed rules relating to the use of voting equipment during its December 10 meeting: Kentucky The State Board of Elections has filed over with the state’s Legislative Research Commission. Michigan Michigan has multiple pending rulemakings nearing completion. They include: : Voter Registration Cancellation, Challenge, and Correction : Use of Electronic Pollbook : Election Challengers and Poll Watchers : Disqualification from Ballot Based Upon Contents of Affidavit of Identity Nevada The Secretary of State’s Office is holding to receive feedback on its Elections Procedure Manual. The first meeting was scheduled for and covered Chapters 3 (Elections), 4 (Candidates and Campaigns), and 5 (Petitions). The second meeting will be held today () at 9:00 a.m., focusing on Chapters 6 (City Clerks), 7 (Election Security), and Appendix A. Oregon A proposed implements legislative mandates found in HB 4133 (2022) and requires the electronic voter registration system to allow a qualified person to complete and deliver a registration card electronically by providing the last four digits of their Social Security number and an image of their signature. Washington In accordance with HAVA, the rule clarify that a voter who asserts the signature on a ballot declaration is not theirs prior to 8:00 PM on Election Day is entitled to vote a provisional ballot, and provisional ballots are subject to investigation per RCW 29A.60.195. The regulation previously entitled a voter to receive a replacement ballot. | | | Arizona Santa Cruz County v. Audit USA , No. 2 CA-CV 2024-0328 (Ariz. Ct. App. Div. 2) On October 20, the Arizona Court of Appeals a unanimous decision holding that a county may not preemptively sue a public-records requester simply for making a request, even when the county fears litigation. The county had preemptively brought litigation in an attempt to force the courts to determine whether cast vote records were a public record. Heap v. Galvin , No. CV2025-020621 (Ariz. Super. Ct. Maricopa Cnty.) On November 6, a state court Maricopa County Recorder Justin Heap’s petition to halt a third party audit of the county’s voter registration and IT systems. Heap had argued he was excluded from key decisions and that sharing sensitive voter-registration data with the third party group raises security concerns. The lawsuit, which was filed five months ago, arises from a dispute in Arizona’s largest county over who controls election infrastructure. A hearing on the merits is set for January 2026. Arkansas Democratic Party of Arkansas v. Sanders , No. 60CV-25-12782 (Ark. Cir. Ct. Pulaski Cnty.) On October 31, a state court that the special election to fill the vacant House District 70 seat must be held on March 3, 2026, rejecting the governor’s claims of complete discretion over setting special election dates. The court cited Arkansas law requiring a governor to fill a vacancy within 150 days unless this was “impracticable or duly burdensome.” Evans v. Harrison , No. 12CV-24-209 (Ark. Cir. Ct. Cleburne Cnty.) On October 30, the Arkansas Supreme Court two state statutes governing the timeframe for county-level initiative petitions. The Court held that the laws conflicted with the Arkansas Constitution, which mandates that local initiative petitions be filed no earlier than 90 days and no later than 60 days before the election. California People of the State of California v. City of Huntington Beach , No. 30-2024-01393606-CU-WM-NJC (Cal. Super. Ct. Orange Cnty.) On November 3, a state appellate court Huntington Beach’s voter ID measure, finding it conflicted with state election law prohibiting cities from implementing voter ID requirements. The measure would have required city voters to show ID at the polls beginning in 2026. District of Columbia LULAC v. Executive Office of the President , No. 1:25-cv-00946 (D.D.C.) On October 31, 2025, the U.S. District Court for D.C. the presidential directive requiring documentary proof of U.S. citizenship on the federal voter-registration form. The court cited separation of powers doctrine, stating that the U.S. Constitution assigns the regulation of elections to Congress. Michigan United States v. Benson , No. 1:25-cv-01148 (W.D. Mich.) On October 30, 2025, the League of Women Voters of Michigan in the federal suit in which the U.S. Department of Justice is suing the State of Michigan and Secretary of State Benson for refusing to turn over voter registration data. Nebraska State ex rel. Hilgers v. Wyss , No. (Neb. Dist. Ct. Madison Cnty. 2025) On November 5, Nebraska Attorney General Mike Hilgers that the state had filed suit against Swiss national Hansjörg Wyss and six Wyss-backed entities, alleging violation of Nebraska’s 2022 statute that prohibits foreign nationals from making direct or indirect contributions to ballot question committees. New Jersey New Jersey Democratic State Committee v. Board of Elections of Bergen County , No. BER-L-7347-25 (N.J. Super. Ct. Law Div.) On November 3, 2025, the New Jersey Democratic State Committee (NJDSC) the Bergen County Board of Elections after approximately 300 mail-in ballots submitted without the required inner secrecy envelope (i.e., “naked ballots”) were flagged for potential rejection. Republican National Committee v. Burlington County Board of Elections , No. BUR-L-002476-25 (N.J. Super. Ct. Law Div.) On October 24, the Republican National Committee the Burlington County Board of Elections, alleging violations of New Jersey’s Open Public Records Act (OPRA) and common-law right of access after officials refused to release video footage of ballot drop boxes and related chain-of-custody logs. The complaint can be found . New York New York Republican State Committee v. State of New York , No. 2:25-CV-6083 (E.D.N.Y.) On October 30, 2025, the New York Republican State Committee, joined by county and town governments and local elected officials, challenging a 2023 statute which moves most town and county elections in New York from odd- to even-numbered years. Virginia NAACP Virginia State Conference v. O’Bannon , No. 1:25-cv-01937 (E.D. Va.) On October 31, 2025, the NAACP Virginia State Conference and the Advancement Project against state and local election officials. The complaint alleges that Virginia registrars are unlawfully rejecting voter registration applications from college students because the forms lack dormitory names, room numbers, or campus mailbox details. The lawsuit contends these omissions are immaterial under federal law. Wisconsin Cerny v. Wisconsin Elections Commission , No. 24-cv-1353 (Wis. Cir. Ct. Waukesha Cnty.) On October 31, a state court of the same voter verification requirement the court had ordered just a few weeks earlier. The October 3 order had directed the Wisconsin Elections Commission to verify the citizenship status of all registered voters in the state, and to halt accepting any new voter registration applicants without citizenship verification. The Wisconsin Department of Justice asked the court on October 6 to suspend the decision pending a statewide election in February. | | | | The administration is pursuing a plan to launch a of the federal voter-registration form, which would include identity verification and citizenship checks via the U.S. Department of Homeland Security before forwarding registrations to states. body:
|

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118849383/581093401/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQ0YjkzNi1mMGJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pensqxb4eUHnA_F-vkhyQLRFAHRbJni8nUEhUS1Q78o=&emci=fef0bbe0-ecbb-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=2ad4b936-f0bb-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=4925535)_ [_**If you'd like to donate to the INDems' Reorganization Fund, you can do so by clicking here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118849384/581093402/1764064610?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQ0YjkzNi1mMGJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pensqxb4eUHnA_F-vkhyQLRFAHRbJni8nUEhUS1Q78o=) ****
_Democrats Start Nationwide Comeback with Wins Across America_ [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118849385/581093403/-118075184?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQ0YjkzNi1mMGJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pensqxb4eUHnA_F-vkhyQLRFAHRbJni8nUEhUS1Q78o=&emci=fef0bbe0-ecbb-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=2ad4b936-f0bb-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=4925535) Tuesday was an historic night for Democrats across the country, winning important races in New Jersey, Virginia, Georgia, and New York City. Virginia Democrats picked up 13 seats in the House of Delegates, extending their majority and bringing them to 64 seats. It’s time to use this momentum to our advantage to have an incredible 2026 election. We can make life more affordable for Hoosiers by fully funding healthcare and childcare in our state. Republican control of Indiana has utility bills skyrocketing out of control, and it’s time for change in our state. ****_Hoosiers Pass Five of Six School Referendums, Including the One Beckwith Campaigned Against_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118849386/581093404/-711126264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQ0YjkzNi1mMGJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pensqxb4eUHnA_F-vkhyQLRFAHRbJni8nUEhUS1Q78o=&emci=fef0bbe0-ecbb-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=2ad4b936-f0bb-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=4925535) While the vast majority of Hoosiers did not have anything to vote for on Tuesday, six school districts held critical local funding referendums, and Hoosiers passed them in five of the six elections. That includes Avon, where Lt. Governor Micah Beckwith had knocked on doors opposing the referendum. Despite his involvement, Avon passed the question to fund dozens of staff and classrooms. Hoosiers are fed up with the Republican supermajority and Governor Braun underfunding our schools and our communities. They know that good schools increase our property values and build stronger futures. It’s time for a state government that respects our schools and provides children the opportunity to succeed. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** Democrats Start Nationwide Comeback with Wins Across America Tuesday was an historic night for Democrats across the country, winning important races in New Jersey, Virginia, Georgia, and New York City. Virginia Democrats picked up 13 seats in the House of Delegates, extending their majority and bringing them to 64 seats. It’s time to use this momentum to our advantage to have an incredible 2026 election. We can make life more affordable for Hoosiers by fully funding healthcare and childcare in our state. Republican control of Indiana has utility bills skyrocketing out of control, and it’s time for change in our state. Hoosiers Pass Five of Six School Referendums, Including the One Beckwith Campaigned Against While the vast majority of Hoosiers did not have anything to vote for on Tuesday, six school districts held critical local funding referendums, and Hoosiers passed them in five of the six elections. That includes Avon, where Lt. Governor Micah Beckwith had knocked on doors opposing the referendum. Despite his involvement, Avon passed the question to fund dozens of staff and classrooms. Hoosiers are fed up with the Republican supermajority and Governor Braun underfunding our schools and our communities. They know that good schools increase our property values and build stronger futures. It’s time for a state government that respects our schools and provides children the opportunity to succeed. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. This week, Republican leadership at the State House and State Senate announced that the session on redistricting would be pushed back until December. They are going through with this blatant power grab despite the fact that Hoosiers are overwhelmingly opposed to any new maps. Democrats know this, and we know that Hoosiers want action on the cost of living. State House Democratic Leader Phil GiaQuinta is calling for this next session to be laser-focused on the affordability crisis facing Hoosiers. It’s time for action to control skyrocketing healthcare premiums and utility bills. Information on County Party events, Town Halls, protests, volunteer opportunities, and more can be found on our Save Your Spot at This Year’s Holiday Party = This year’s Holiday Party is coming up quickly on December 5, 2025. Please join us for an exciting night of fellowship with Hoosier Democrats in Downtown Indianapolis. = Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Thursday, November 17th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on So You Want to Run for Office. INDems IN the News IndyStar: WTHR: Indiana Capital Chronicle: * Indiana Capital Chronicle: [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

body:
“If you can’t beat em kill em.” This is the new strategy that many on the extreme-right, including those in positions of power, are adopting.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y1Na5BiJfJa6iVlFj1eq8tGpJKPRV9P76IIdxetd2sI8dj3plueCmepU8gMCmpjA1tQR6kZRSaO31tR-GRkSYRIr1_hjQ1WEewjhyV1MsKyrX-KHoJxSLlUa1PiJkUxQ65rUbc5wDSdzHULKEfgr3Hk55kk7b580uZJ3a5oQLIGt25o0TWz1tUtuODgxIFsAbLXgdoaELmZAnWX4UKJqdwkIoFwb6IXntmDWHOL1FD9-JpoOl0qPJQ==&c=APLHuPmuGiKqk2D720qni3Kbad3uqGOmvWdmc8FArNphlJvdF8TnEw==&ch=Je-mAP3nCnvaoVRsp4t7KPxmGhn792PJ-u1I2sMtxAEpGMVeeAXlDA==)
---
| Peter,
Following MAGA's blowout defeat in the critical Pennsylvania Supreme Court election the right has found themselves in an existential crisis.
Yesterday at a meeting of the Federalist Society (the far-right organization focused on judicial capture and responsible for the GOP majority on the US Supreme Court), Chad Mizelle, a former Trump DOJ appointee laid out a new approach to winning judicial fights in the aftermath of PA:
Putting down Justices like "stray cats."
---
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y1Na5BiJfJa6iVlFj1eq8tGpJKPRV9P76IIdxetd2sI8dj3plueCmepU8gMCmpjA1tQR6kZRSaO31tR-GRkSYRIr1_hjQ1WEewjhyV1MsKyrX-KHoJxSLlUa1PiJkUxQ65rUbc5wDSdzHULKEfgr3Hk55kk7b580uZJ3a5oQLIGt25o0TWz1tUtuODgxIFsAbLXgdoaELmZAnWX4UKJqdwkIoFwb6IXntmDWHOL1FD-895PCLk44yA==&c=APLHuPmuGiKqk2D720qni3Kbad3uqGOmvWdmc8FArNphlJvdF8TnEw==&ch=Je-mAP3nCnvaoVRsp4t7KPxmGhn792PJ-u1I2sMtxAEpGMVeeAXlDA==)
---
|
This is the new strategy that many on the extreme-right, including those in positions of power, are adopting: "If you can't beat em kill em."
Already we've seen this strategy begin to play out. Just last month a South Carolina Supreme Court judge who ruled against Trump had her home burn down in a suspicious massive explosion that many suspected was arson.
The reason why they are resorting to this is because the left is making a comeback in the fight for our nation's courts. On Tuesday, Defend our Courts helped orchestrate a landslide victory that will all but guarantee Democratic control for the next decade. It sent a resounding message to MAGA: Don't f*** with our courts.
MAGA can't win these judicial fights when voters are educated on the stakes of what right-wing capture of our judiciary entails. They can try to circumvent the voters' will and win through violence but in the long run that strategy will only alienate them with the American people.
These courts are the only thing standing in the way of the full implementation of Trump's agenda and if we can keep up the pressure and keep pulling off victories in supreme court races like we just did in Pennsylvania - we will survive these next three years of Trump and reclaim America.
Winning the fight in PA required going for broke, literally, and we owe tens of thousands of dollars to our hardworking staff. [To move on to the coming judicial fights in MI, AZ, and GA, we need to close the books on PA. Can you please make a donation of $50, $25, or whatever amount is meaningful to you to help us pay our team? ](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y1Na5BiJfJa6iVlFj1eq8tGpJKPRV9P76IIdxetd2sI8dj3plueCmepU8gMCmpjA3aWR51n4pHRZn2QIVE7Oue4z_whTba1K1O4ywiVCPDxs913p_040VcDO9KQuN4QM-I5figGf-WSQ44Ufrh5nwlC_WQTJbWsFD9mmouBSNjP54pBhw94ikdlNrZIbL0__PGjZTXXZ1TwyPItxVJKX23FQAffLwP3mgIldLcjbT45OAyiN_NMu8DVCPFDvMbvL2mthwqO4hGc=&c=APLHuPmuGiKqk2D720qni3Kbad3uqGOmvWdmc8FArNphlJvdF8TnEw==&ch=Je-mAP3nCnvaoVRsp4t7KPxmGhn792PJ-u1I2sMtxAEpGMVeeAXlDA==)
---

clean_body: “If you can’t beat em kill em.” This is the new strategy that many on the extreme-right, including those in positions of power, are adopting. | | | | | == | Peter, Following MAGA's blowout defeat in the critical Pennsylvania Supreme Court election the right has found themselves in an existential crisis. Yesterday at a meeting of the Federalist Society (the far-right organization focused on judicial capture and responsible for the GOP majority on the US Supreme Court), Chad Mizelle, a former Trump DOJ appointee laid out a new approach to winning judicial fights in the aftermath of PA: Putting down Justices like "stray cats." | | | | | == | This is the new strategy that many on the extreme-right, including those in positions of power, are adopting: "If you can't beat em kill em." Already we've seen this strategy begin to play out. Just last month a South Carolina Supreme Court judge who ruled against Trump had her home burn down in a suspicious massive explosion that many suspected was arson. The reason why they are resorting to this is because the left is making a comeback in the fight for our nation's courts. On Tuesday, Defend our Courts helped orchestrate a landslide victory that will all but guarantee Democratic control for the next decade. It sent a resounding message to MAGA: Don't f*** with our courts. MAGA can't win these judicial fights when voters are educated on the stakes of what right-wing capture of our judiciary entails. They can try to circumvent the voters' will and win through violence but in the long run that strategy will only alienate them with the American people. These courts are the only thing standing in the way of the full implementation of Trump's agenda and if we can keep up the pressure and keep pulling off victories in supreme court races like we just did in Pennsylvania - we will survive these next three years of Trump and reclaim America. Winning the fight in PA required going for broke, literally, and we owe tens of thousands of dollars to our hardworking staff. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Thank you for standing beside us in PA and in the battles to come. subject: Tennessee’s clean water is at risk—let’s guard our wells, lakes, and families.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Clean water shouldn’t be a luxury.

| | | | Hi Peter, From the Highland Rim to the Mississippi floodplain, Tennesseans rely on clean water—yet infrastructure is aging, clean water regulations are under attack, and many rural communities are being over developed. When pipes fail, when wells run dry, and when our rivers are polluted, it’s not just an inconvenience—it’s a community in jeopardy. We believe every Tennessee family deserves clean, safe water. Period. **Secure Tennessee's Drinking Water**

name: =?UTF-8?B?QnJ5Y2UgUmVldmVz?=
subject: I was in the Army
body:
I know they're living paycheck to paycheck.
| | |
---
| | [](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fsupport-serive-men-and-women%3Futm_campaign=20251103_Reeves_SupportService%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/1/0100019a5f0dfd40-314f9385-553e-4910-b84e-1f7f46fecbce-000000/TaLLE98aIrQFy3fX381cWvD9WJ0=451)
---
| |
---
| Peter, I was in the Army – I know most of the young families, in particular, live paycheck to paycheck. And now that U.S. Senators like Mark Warner have voted to keep those young men and women from receiving pay... _I am enraged on their behalf._ I guess Mark doesn't know what it's like to not know when you're going to see your family again. I guess Mark doesn't know what it's like to make ends meet on a $38,451.60 salary – that of a Corporal in the Army. I guess Mark doesn't know what it's like to uproot your life every 2 years, due to orders. _**And I know Mark doesn 't know what it's like to be willing to sacrifice your well-being and even your life for love of this country.**_ _But the 2.1 million service members who he voted not to pay know all of those things, and know them well._ The _least_ we could do is vote to support them and pay them so that they can keep food on the table for their families. The job Mark Warner has done as a U.S. Senator is disgraceful – and I'm fired up and ready to kick him out of office for good. _Can I count on you to join me?_ [** _All it takes is a contribution of $35 or more – that would go a long way in ensuring my campaign has the resources it needs to go up against him and his millions. >>>_**](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fsupport-serive-men-and-women%3Futm_campaign=20251103_Reeves_SupportService%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/2/0100019a5f0dfd40-314f9385-553e-4910-b84e-1f7f46fecbce-000000/9qI-gonUDYfClZu0aQhKLZtv1QI=451)

---

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118852389/581103532/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.11.07_Election25_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjk5MGQwYi1mM2JiLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LCzQw0Slgyx8-_HWPc0CgQKcgRANdz1yvAlAQK0ikac=&emci=700a1778-73bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=9f990d0b-f3bb-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=23483442) | Congratulations to my friend **Deb Krishnadasan** , who will continue to represent me and my neighbors in Olympia! The 26th District couldn’t ask for a better State Senator. Early results show Deb in a strong lead despite the millions of dollars spent attacking her and distorting her record. Folks, what's happening is so clear: Trump and his MAGA cronies are fundamentally transforming our Department of Justice and **turning it into a tool for undermining voting rights, not protecting them.** Under his watch, the DOJ and its Civil Rights Division -- _once lauded as the "crown jewel" of the Justice Department_ \-- has **abandoned its nonpartisan mission of defending the freedom to vote.** Instead, it’s targeting election officials, amplifying debunked voter fraud claims, and trying to intimidate states into giving election data. Voter Action Project was founded in 2020 to fight for the use of mail-in ballots under a hostile Trump administration during a global pandemic. **We're still fighting right now, working every day to protect our fundamental right to vote** under yet another vicious administration that's looking to trample all over American citizens and our ability to make our voice heard through our elections. **[In the face of escalating attacks on our right to vote, increasing amounts of voter disinformation, and voter intimidation tactics on the rise – will you stand with us and chip in $25 today to help us defend voting rights?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118853009/581105673/1498593520?refcode=110725_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0NzYzODNiLWYzYmItZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eCg7tdpJdXF8K11r6fM0Z4kSRqWM_bOeYaVrm-VpaOs=)**

clean_body: CNN: Inside Trump’s gutting of the Justice Department unit that enforces voting laws| | | | | = Folks, what's happening is so clear: Trump and his MAGA cronies are fundamentally transforming our Department of Justice and turning it into a tool for undermining voting rights, not protecting them. Under his watch, the DOJ and its Civil Rights Division -- once lauded as the "crown jewel" of the Justice Department \-- has abandoned its nonpartisan mission of defending the freedom to vote. Instead, it’s targeting election officials, amplifying debunked voter fraud claims, and trying to intimidate states into giving election data. Voter Action Project was founded in 2020 to fight for the use of mail-in ballots under a hostile Trump administration during a global pandemic. We're still fighting right now, working every day to protect our fundamental right to vote under yet another vicious administration that's looking to trample all over American citizens and our ability to make our voice heard through our elections. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | | We've tried to keep you updated on what's going on at DOJ under Trump , to make every American aware of MAGA's relentless campaign, executed by the department’s political leaders, to smear the work of the longtime attorneys, dismiss noncontroversial cases, and reassign career supervisors. CNN has reported that: "During President Donald Trump’s first term, DOJ officials forced voting section attorneys to abandon the more high-profile work that had often been opposed by conservatives. But the gutting of the section during Trump’s second administration goes far beyond that, according to former department attorneys and outside voter advocates." We know our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government as they try and consolidate their control forever. That's why we need to stand up and defend things from the outside. = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. = = Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). name: Team Tina
subject: Oregon is special, help Tina protect it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
**Climate change is threatening how we live in Oregon and we can’t just stand by while it happens.** That’s why Governor Tina Kotek has taken strong executive action to protect our state’s forests, farms, wetlands and waterways. clean_body: | Climate change is threatening how we live in Oregon and we can’t just stand by while it happens. That’s why Governor Tina Kotek has taken strong executive action to protect our state’s forests, farms, wetlands and waterways. | Tina is investing in the health of Oregon’s forests, rangelands, farmlands, rivers, and streams. Thank you for standing with her. — Team Tina | Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services. Can you chip in any amount now to support her work? | = Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

I got the call on a Tuesday. 20 days later, I was in Iraq — leading missions to hunt down terrorists. No time to hesitate. No time to overthink. Just serve. For nearly a decade, I’ve lived by one rule: **_when your country calls, you answer._** From the Southern Border to the Middle East, I’ve watched evil crumble because America had the courage to lead. And now, as chaos spreads abroad and weakness grows here at home — my country is calling again. This time, the fight isn’t overseas. It’s right here, for the future of Michigan and America. **I’m Captain Mike Bouchard — Iraq veteran, Army Paratrooper, Bronze Star recipient, and proud Michigan conservative — and I’m running for Congress.** **If you believe America is still worth fighting for,[I need you with me from Day One.](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=579e2c6d6d6447aaa8b895e0033d0a0f&_e=ny9PukMQCLEskiXnHMf9cRmaibSQ7iVlAsYw1nHpCxbjBlOJ9w0q6RjjjVVRkqsx-Uh4KI-uxmK7uO2EjE96k-yjpcgEALFXEHXJcGb-edXlfRfhBa3fvDT86XUMDNyLwHdev2f9-Tsd7YH_Lf5Qe8gqupe6nf1rmfNpSnSB2vvaCnhnJ6e9IeoqPhBmNB6RNwPl-utr2s0Yx37vW-f2HAyqRQXNsTF2Ut70DKu8rkbAEz91LfHFX6PCmxCEWA-uadCQt6ymMSEqWcdrevfGc26VHhUlpJ76WBMaEQMxs6On9VKk-SZR3Hhit1a6b-8XMfkLbrgzyBmws5gLNcItbrU1q_VTlNc3GUW3r4O-gP3ZP0-VRuWtrdMqj50ZhcTA8AhTht1lajzrMCNHjV3_M6ATj1oXYFVmxicq1rFZAtWNXjE4Dft5odIappPHzz5nNOthFlKIzgOnxUx_HZMNHLVZ2qkEgoDrE5AyJoweyu0di_aaUNvtjGDhPMG9Q3Qjqabm586nOSINOJ1w5rAtrmXOHkCsWL_TU1Ru0Hzp4nSJlPqzxbW7VNnkniaXVyFhGbpmpE694qMLHCWtZO3uEJUzLkYi3-nAdKLCbU0Wj36nKIJDQDzkgsTYaqDWFE3F3Xii7W-vpjF2Vtt-VLhfT-im8vkRe6V00wpxPhRd-aOyhryJDbeMIiGTiGy-j1pyORa320iNVhNs_w2WxsGbxIyMNS1_vjuxWQYaJKOmYZkENAoDN5z5byj1FAwP8RM1)[](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=579e2c6d6d6447aaa8b895e0033d0a0f&_e=ny9PukMQCLEskiXnHMf9cRmaibSQ7iVlAsYw1nHpCxbjBlOJ9w0q6RjjjVVRkqsx-Uh4KI-uxmK7uO2EjE96k0bzk5JmZcPo2cCa4_JM1VBMplEsQ2k0dTHOdTvUegza3FniQziLkrrXv-dpKkzwlcFPn6WHy_EJMsjtzTiUSMjIitGaYLY3K21zwydSNkHCSSZ2SC3WU3munzWcw6owtkFu4Btr2bYYwTDFEZj7tmxScKr71jSy9ZUoZR-5f_MY_T0IGOsm7dzQMfF47uEXMHc8e1uVl3zo4KJ020FCYh22LeTk7kYUHWViJA1lEJf7kWPXYkMLySt1IHbcWHMvmwAjHtI6eo-AZzuSQkTr9i_1e0nIovIJv-erJnjYoxx8Vn3Wnv0Ke6aWJIlCQIR6PiUIx625M6279nLHm5mXMjilSozsxbX1yRbhphltQ_XWud9haLi3iVRv85X3WpBuM1lujzfJQ-ipE39fn8D4oFt12lik_3AyfflHMZraK4Qy)**

Thank you in advance for standing with me. **I want to be honest with you — I just got home from Iraq.** _I don’t have a political machine behind me. I’m not a career politician. I’m an everyday patriot, just like you, who believes this country is worth fighting for._ My dad served our community as a sheriff. My grandfather worked the factory floor at GM. _Service isn’t just what my family does — it’s who we are._ After nearly a decade in uniform, I’m ready to serve again. But I can’t do it alone. **I’m counting on grassroots patriots like you — the same hardworking Americans who built this country — to help me launch this campaign.** **If you believe America is still worth fighting for, I’m asking you to stand with me _today_.** **[](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=579e2c6d6d6447aaa8b895e0033d0a0f&_e=ny9PukMQCLEskiXnHMf9cRmaibSQ7iVlAsYw1nHpCxbjBlOJ9w0q6RjjjVVRkqsx-Uh4KI-uxmK7uO2EjE96k-yjpcgEALFXEHXJcGb-edW84meGSbGwr3EaUkSEpRwbYuIwzhNmSGPWlEQjXP8mClyo3SLhkkpP9QKIGSTLKdAXJo1ov29RgBFmS8jjPElkBQ4ERVX3m9WHTcQmOS41acI31iJobashFwCFWado6FgL8kGg2pDaQAmbIj7CrVn5rA58A-6fkAwgE1-S0F1dwhGN4HzYi5InE8LrrpI65npUvKjvY4D0E2-LZNATTL854CNYEbd6SyXgOHwkSrPZyGM6M57o0fB8QvrBiyBCnxnxscJ1yLeCLihKLxbcGL4JorGwblrQVOCrwgqPnHD7mszDqtlR8aWRK6CuXxrwqLJeeniCfDvsRXpxQzzdzJBz8Ap0O4dOxSobDiFlKjwCvkHHYBVrd8WptRcyu_l8a_amkKdHYNOvWsyTywBm6DjS)[Whatever you can give — $5, $10, $25 — it all makes a difference. clean_body: | | | I got the call on a Tuesday. 20 days later, I was in Iraq — leading missions to hunt down terrorists. No time to hesitate. No time to overthink. Just serve. For nearly a decade, I’ve lived by one rule: when your country calls, you answer. From the Southern Border to the Middle East, I’ve watched evil crumble because America had the courage to lead. And now, as chaos spreads abroad and weakness grows here at home — my country is calling again. This time, the fight isn’t overseas. It’s right here, for the future of Michigan and America. I’m Captain Mike Bouchard — Iraq veteran, Army Paratrooper, Bronze Star recipient, and proud Michigan conservative — and I’m running for Congress. If you believe America is still worth fighting for, Thank you in advance for standing with me. I want to be honest with you — I just got home from Iraq. I don’t have a political machine behind me. I’m not a career politician. I’m an everyday patriot, just like you, who believes this country is worth fighting for. My dad served our community as a sheriff. My grandfather worked the factory floor at GM. Service isn’t just what my family does — it’s who we are. After nearly a decade in uniform, I’m ready to serve again. But I can’t do it alone. I’m counting on grassroots patriots like you — the same hardworking Americans who built this country — to help me launch this campaign. If you believe America is still worth fighting for, I’m asking you to stand with me today. For Family and Freedom, Captain Mike Bouchard U.S. Army, Bronze Star Recipient Republican Candidate, MI-10 | | Friends of Michael Bouchard, Inc. | | USE OF MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY, THE DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY, OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Friends of Michael Bouchard.

Peter Willis,

We need to be blunt: if you care about taking back our democracy from
Trump and building real power for working people, ALL eyes need to be on
Maine in 2026.

Why Maine? Because it’s ground zero to take back control of Congress.
Corporate special interests and billionaire-backed Super PACs are ALREADY
pouring dark money to prop up Republican Susan Collins to try to protect
her Senate seat – right now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34621?source=email-20251107&t=1061&akid=9797%2E5885482%2Ek3id5G ]Scoop: New $250k ad campaign boosts Susan Collins in Maine Senate race

Our Revolution is ready. We’ve been investing, not just in ads, but in
people – growing our grassroots GOTV team, setting up a network of local
leaders, and building out our database to make the biggest impact we can
in these KEY 2026 races.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34620?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251107nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9797%2E5885482%2Ek3id5G ]But organizing at this scale takes resources, plain and simple. rely on supporters like you to drive our movement forward. We’re going

It’s not just the Senate. This week, Rep. Jared Golden, a Democrat who
represents a Maine district that Trump won by 9 points in 2024, announced
he won’t seek re-election next year, giving Republicans an opportunity to
pick up a seat if we don’t step up.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34621?source=email-20251107&t=1060&akid=9797%2E5885482%2Ek3id5G ]Democratic Rep. Jared Golden announces retirement in Trump district

Maine’s Governor is also up for election – and Our Revolution has already
endorsed Troy Jackson – a fifth-generation logger and former Senate
President with the grit and heart to take on corporate power. And on
Monday, grassroots champion Graham Platner and candidate for Senate will
join our Live 2026 Kickoff Call to fire up the grassroots on what it takes
to defeat corporate money and ignite a people-powered movement.

That’s the spirit driving our campaign: standing shoulder-to-shoulder with
workers, fighting for economic justice, and protecting our democracy from
dark money and special interests.

The other side knows what’s at stake – and that’s why they’re striking
early. They’re laying their groundwork for 2026 NOW. So are we. But we can
only match their resources and launch the grassroots surge needed in Maine
and our other battleground states with your help.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34620?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20251107nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9797%2E5885482%2Ek3id5G ]Our Revolution is mobilizing like never before – and to win, the
organizing has to start NOW. Please, donate today and help us deliver a
people-powered victory in Maine in 2026 and take back power in Congress.

When we organize, we win.

We rely on supporters like you to drive our movement forward. We’re going full steam ahead but we need to keep rapidly scaling up – can you donate now to help us go all in for Maine in 2026? If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. [ ]CHIP IN $9 [ ]CHIP IN $22 [ ]CHIP IN $27 [ ]CHIP IN $46 [ ]CHIP IN $66 [ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT It’s not just the Senate. This week, Rep. Jared Golden, a Democrat who represents a Maine district that Trump won by 9 points in 2024, announced he won’t seek re-election next year, giving Republicans an opportunity to pick up a seat if we don’t step up. [ ]Democratic Rep. Jared Golden announces retirement in Trump district Maine’s Governor is also up for election – and Our Revolution has already endorsed Troy Jackson – a fifth-generation logger and former Senate President with the grit and heart to take on corporate power. And on Monday, grassroots champion Graham Platner and candidate for Senate will join our Live 2026 Kickoff Call to fire up the grassroots on what it takes to defeat corporate money and ignite a people-powered movement. That’s the spirit driving our campaign: standing shoulder-to-shoulder with workers, fighting for economic justice, and protecting our democracy from dark money and special interests. The other side knows what’s at stake – and that’s why they’re striking early. They’re laying their groundwork for 2026 NOW. So are we. But we can only match their resources and launch the grassroots surge needed in Maine and our other battleground states with your help. [ ]Our Revolution is mobilizing like never before – and to win, the organizing has to start NOW. Please, donate today and help us deliver a people-powered victory in Maine in 2026 and take back power in Congress. When we organize, we win. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Cancel flights or sell Trump’s billion-dollar jet? Easy choice.
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Pay Airport Workers By Selling Trump’s Qatar Plane](https://default.salsalabs.org/T211e184e-fc29-4dd6-a52e-5a2e3f0bbf05/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3102e555-19c9-44da-95e7-0aefc9fd4aca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Because of their own asinine shutdown, Republicans say they don't have the money to pay critically important airport workers, and have started [canceling flights](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc98a4cb2-6511-44f5-aa06-2f021bf31292/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) in massive numbers. **Why do that when there's a perfectly good billion dollar plane just waiting to be sold?** You may remember that Trump got this [super-luxury jet](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae10363f-e4a9-4b87-bbe4-863b62c0a187/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) as a gift (bribe) from Qatar a few months back. And that he wants us to spend billions more to make it the new Air Force One. Well, we already have one. Two, in fact. We don't need another. But we could use the money right now to pay these workers for weeks or months, and keep our air travel system going. [**Add your name: Pay Airport Workers By Selling Trump's Qatar Plane**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta5e31642-9f20-46b7-a93b-86d7b79a2094/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tade75666-ba5c-41b4-8c17-e2edf3eb9285/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1929404-4b33-4e26-90b0-56b9acb36f5b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Marc Elias
subject: We're suing Donald Trump...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Marc Elias. **I beat Donald Trump 64 times in court. And now, working with the DSCC,_I'll beat him again._**

[**Before I tell you more, will you chip in $5 to the DSCC to help power the work to stop Trump's allies and take back the Senate majority? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251107-MarcElias-EliasSuingTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251107-MarcElias-EliasSuingTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=21682%2E9716520%2EsDeyWX)

Right now, Donald Trump is attacking our longstanding values and principles. He's ignoring due process, flaunting anti-corruption laws, and, worst of all, **attacking our democracy and voting rights -- the very bedrock of American society.**

It's disgusting, but not surprising from the guy who claimed he wanted to be a dictator on his first day in office.

That's where my team and the DSCC come in -- the very moment Trump signed an executive order to interfere in our elections and threaten the rights of voters, we _immediately_ filed suit against him on behalf of Democrats across the nation. And we've already notched some key victories in the case!

**But the fight isn't over.** We all know that Trump and his allies will keep trying to break American democracy. We can't let them, so we need ALL Democrats -- from leaders like Barack and Michelle Obama to supporters like you -- working together.

clean_body: As chief legal officer, I assure you: Mamdani’s agenda will end at my desk. | Peter, It’s honestly hard to believe... ...A communist and Hamas sympathizer just became Mayor of the largest city in America. Who put Zohran Mamdani in office?The INDICTED Attorney General of New York,Letitia James. Letitia James embraced Mamdani even when other Democrats were too scared to go near him with a ten-foot pole. Every single disaster that happens under Mamdani’s watch will be OWNED by Tish James. Our campaign to FIRE Letitia James just became twice as important. Not only is it mission critical that we remove Letitia James from office for weaponizing the legal system and trying to sentence President Trump to the “corporate death penalty”... ...But also, as the next Attorney General of New York, I will serve as the FINAL LEGAL FIREWALL against Mamdani’s unconstitutional and radical agenda. As chief legal officer, I will ensure that Mamdani’s agenda ENDS at my desk. And let me be clear: this election is 100% winnable. We’re running in a SINGLE-DIGIT race. Letitia James’ approval numbers are underwater – all while she’s engulfed in a serious fraud case. In fact, back-to-back polls also show Elise Stefanik can win the governor’s race here too. Newsweek : “Republican Could Flip New York for First Time in Two Decades—Poll” Come Election Day, Democrats will regret making a communist the face of their party. And let’s prove it RIGHT NOW with a surge of grassroots contributions. Thank you, Michael Henry Republican for Attorney General (NY) PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF MICHAEL HENRY |

clean_body: By BANNING Stock Trading by Congress| | | | | | | Peter, Nancy Pelosi is retiring. Has she satisfied the greed that prompted her decades of stock trading and millions in profit? Not likely. Her whole racket makes me sick, which is why I introduced new legislation to stop it:P reventingE lectedL eaders fromO wningS ecurities and I nvestments Act The PELOSI Act isn't complicated and shouldn't be controversial. Members of Congress simply won't be able to profit from information they have and you don't. | | | | | | There's nothing more outrageous than the fact that members of Congress trade millions of dollars' worth of stock every year. They make huge sums of money with information the hardworking, tax-paying, law-abiding citizen doesn't get. The way Nancy Pelosi has exploited her public office is criminal; at least it should be. And if Congress finally musters up the courage to pass the PELOSI Act, it will be. In Liberty, Josh Hawley | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | | | |

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUrYW1vdW50PTQ1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEwN19XVC02Wi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NDc2NjgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMDdfV1QtNlouMTEwMTE3X3QxNzQ3NjY4LTI4OTkifQ/ODbxfbG_60tovCA7JI24JQ) Peter,
I'll never forget the first time I saw Top Gun - Tom Cruise made flying fighter jets look easy. But let me tell you, __it's not all glamour and glory.__
I know firsthand because I'm one of only a few people trained to fly the F-22 Raptor.
**My name is Rep. August Pfluger, and I never thought I'd trade in my flight suit for a suit and tie to run for public office.**
As a combat pilot, I took out radical terrorists and logged over 300 hours of direct combat action.
**_After years of serving in my country in battle, I was honored to serve on President Trump's National Security Council, advising him on all threats to our nation, foreign and domestic._ **
I’ve never been one to back down from a fight. I've promised to defend our country, but I need your help.

Hi Peter,
If we don’t take action now, Trump’s Bureau of Land Management (BLM) may succeed in proposing to repeal a rule that places drilling, mining, and grazing over conservation. This means that our public lands would fall into the destructive hands of oil and gas, and other extractive industries. The public comment period closes on Monday, November 10th at 2 pm PT . Will you take action to protect our public lands and conservation? [https://secure.everyaction.com/6NJD6d9vxUCf_FDf8BKrFA2]
Take action now! [https://secure.everyaction.com/6NJD6d9vxUCf_FDf8BKrFA2?contactdata=rVuIZIAyrgtpVgaSGu0glwbDJwRuzNKz0MnJTAbkI1ppxlq4JojoHxHO40F3QMwdjE9xpl64BU5d7roqcUSydlgNg+ytbcr/cdT7Eia1hM6+LjfMYLInNsadZ0oAGXtt]
The Conservation and Landscape Health Rule — that is at risk of being repealed — states conservation is a “use” equal to drilling, mining, and grazing, ultimately protecting our public lands. By repealing this rule, conservation, protecting water resources and wildlands, then becomes a second-class consideration to drilling, mining, and grazing.
As recent data shows, around 80% of BLM lands are already open to oil and gas leasing; a number that would surely increase if this rule is overturned. That’s not something I want to imagine.
Take action now! [https://secure.everyaction.com/6NJD6d9vxUCf_FDf8BKrFA2?contactdata=rVuIZIAyrgtpVgaSGu0glwbDJwRuzNKz0MnJTAbkI1ppxlq4JojoHxHO40F3QMwdjE9xpl64BU5d7roqcUSydlgNg+ytbcr/cdT7Eia1hM6+LjfMYLInNsadZ0oAGXtt]
Americans love our public lands. There is immense bipartisan support for protecting them. It’s an issue that unites us, because we all have a connection to these special places. Our public lands also benefit our ecosystems, wildlife, and economy.
If we don’t value conservation on the same level as drilling, mining, and grazing, we may very well lose our precious public lands. Take action now before 2pm on Monday, November 10th to protect conservation! [https://secure.everyaction.com/6NJD6d9vxUCf_FDf8BKrFA2]
Thank you for supporting our public lands,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Britney_signature-removebg-preview.png]
Britney VanCitters (she/her)
OLCV Political & Organizing Director
P.S.: You can also give a gift to make your action go farther, because this fight to protect our public lands isn’t over. Give now! [https://secure.everyaction.com/JxkJ6ys7PUGmqohXVRrhKg2]

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Re: SNAP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
That’s what leadership is all about.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=957%2E181023%2Ed63xmJ)
Hey team:
Food assistance through the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program, or SNAP for short, is _at risk._
**That means about 1.4 million Michiganders, or 13% of households in our state, could lose access to essential food benefits and wake up in the midst of the holidays not knowing how they'll afford groceries next week.**
These programs matter deeply to families in our state. I’m married to a veteran, and I know how much programs like SNAP matter to families who've served our country and to families who are simply working hard every day just to get by.
There are almost _500,000_ kids in Michigan who rely on these benefits to make sure there's breakfast before school and dinner before bed. And seniors who live on a fixed income. And parents who are doing everything right but still can't keep up with the skyrocketing costs.
**_These are the people who will pay the price if the government does not get its act together._**
It's time for Republicans in Congress — including my opponent John James — to come to the table and reopen our government to protect food assistance, healthcare, and the basic dignity every family deserves.
**[If you agree, add your name alongside my own calling on the GOP to reopen the government. It’s about time.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2511-SNAP?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251107_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=957%2E181023%2Ed63xmJ)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2511-SNAP?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251107_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=957%2E181023%2Ed63xmJ)
---
When we make sure veterans, kids, working families have the support they need, we're not just helping them — we're helping _everyone_ in our state.
That’s what leadership is all about.
— Jocelyn
**[P.S. If you’re able to help, pitch in here to donate to the Food Bank Council of Michigan to help families in your community.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/2166?t=4&akid=957%2E181023%2Ed63xmJ)**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=5&akid=957%2E181023%2Ed63xmJ)

PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR

23133 Woodward Ave, Number 116,
Ferndale, MI 48220

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Children need to know
body:
Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement.

| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,If you agree that it’s time for Christians to boldly and unashamedly lead our schools and our culture back to our country’s founding values......will you help me teach children the true meaning of the rainbow?The Bible tells us that God gave us the rainbow as a symbol of his covenant with the earth:
---
**“I have set my rainbow in the clouds, and it will be the sign of the covenant between me and the earth.” Genesis 9:13**
---
Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement.After all, it was back in 1999 that Bill Clinton first recognized June as “LGBTQ+ Pride Month.” And LGBTQ+ “rainbow” flags now fly year-round in stores, libraries, schools, and the halls of Congress...and even in some churches. **[That’s why I’m hoping you will take just one simple action today to help me teach children the true meaning of the rainbow and God’s word.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt8m7rj1adlm72fp4ridkc8vs9k6i25v8ih82o10_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clim4o76c1h2bs)** With Christianity under attack in America, our nation desperately needs Christians who are willing to stand up and defend our faith.My name is Kirk Cameron.Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Monumental.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me.I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandfather, and a Christian.When I saw the anti-God, anti-family, and anti-America messages the Left was pushing on young parents and children, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.But that’s not all they are doing.BRAVE Books is giving parents, grandparents, and teachers the necessary tools to combat the Left’s hijacking of our children’s hearts and minds in schools, libraries, and elsewhere.And now, because of faithful Americans like you, God’s Word is being heard in the public square once again.Friend, I’m used to receiving hate mail from atheists and radical Left-wing activists who don’t like our faith message.But their responses make me realize just how much the LGBTQ+ community has changed our culture in just one generation.In the past, the gay community largely claimed they just wanted “tolerance.”But now that’s not enough.Today, they want everyone to celebrate and approve of their lifestyle – and they’re accusing those who don’t of “hate speech.” But by not standing up for God’s Word, Christians have allowed the Left’s indoctrination to creep into our churches, schools, and into our nation.And now we’re seeing the terrible effects of our inaction: our young children are being corrupted and led astray from the Faith. Think of all the drag queen story hours being held in public libraries, or the soft porn being promoted as teen reading, or even the classrooms where leftist teachers are sharing their “sexual orientation” and pronouns with kids as young as 5-years-old.More and more people are calling good evil...and evil good (Isaiah 5:20). My heart is heavy when I think of what’s in store for this nation if we don’t protect our children from these demonic influences.Never before has our culture so desperately needed parents and teachers to point our children towards the truth and away from the lies of man.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziecjcet7k1fnig1jhh81ok1gahrrkosrq4k22a0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clim4o76c1h2bs)
---
| That’s exactly why **BRAVE Books** started the “See You at the Library” movement and my children’s TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” -- to boldly, publicly and unashamedly remind Christians and non-believers alike of the truth of God’s Word and the Christian values our country was founded on.
---
| | That’s exactly why **BRAVE Books** started the “See You at the Library” movement and my children’s TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” -- to boldly, publicly and unashamedly remind Christians and non-believers alike of the truth of God’s Word and the Christian values our country was founded on.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv9uu5p5bmejhk1s76s07suf4ejbo0fbmucpq9oo_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clim4o76c1h2bs)
---
| | Our national “See You at the Library” movement has reached tens of thousands of children in thousands of libraries across the country – including the Library of Congress!At each event, we pray together, say the pledge of allegiance, and read books that instill Godly and patriotic values in our kids.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr1fe5q91ta5je3tl191ppkhbk6mt1lvbo31nbg0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clim4o76c1h2bs)
---
| | Our national “See You at the Library” movement has reached tens of thousands of children in thousands of libraries across the country – including the Library of Congress!At each event, we pray together, say the pledge of allegiance, and read books that instill Godly and patriotic values in our kids.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgtb8ljsm10cmolpucqvbilufv7acedibnj2h940_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clim4o76c1h2bs)
---
| | Just the thing we need to counteract the evil “Drag Queen Story Hours” and every other leftist lie.And with our TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” we are reaching hundreds of thousands of families with timeless Christian values.Giving parents and kids an alternative to the filth being shown on screens today. As you can imagine, secularists despise our mission. They do not want us engaging the culture with biblical truths. And they are doing everything in their power to discredit, shame, and silence us. If you agree that we must introduce thousands of more children to the truth of God’s Word in these troubled times, [**then I would like to invite you to be a part of our life-changing mission here at BRAVE Books.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc8lh4a6rafgo5o073env05i1l927fma7hke2efo_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clim4o76c1h2bs) Will you help us teach children Christian virtues and proclaim truth to a hurting world that needs God’s Word more than ever?So many children simply don’t know the truth about God or His love for them. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll help us reach even more families through **BRAVE Books** ’ crucial projects, like our Christmas “Mouse in the House,” a Godly alternative to that secular “elf” game that so many families use, or producing the next season of “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” giving children wholesome content that entertains while building their character. [**Would you prayerfully consider making a gift to BRAVE Books today?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsi9qdf4mk2huo2se0uu10p6fc232fojgg2s2cug_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clim4o76c1h2bs) America’s public schools are “normalizing” the ungodly agenda of the radical Left by decorating classrooms and hallways with “Gay Pride” rainbows, filling library shelves with LGBTQ+ books, and pushing movies and TV shows that glorify sinful behavior.They’re leading our children away from Christ...and toward an empty, godless and hopeless secular doctrine. But **BRAVE Books** is giving parents and grandparents a way to fight back and teach the next generation that God’s word is GOOD. Thank you for supporting BRAVE Books – and for helping us protect our precious children and grandchildren!
---
| | Sincerely,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zetgs0c84jjmmlcpa5coh5s2vavbcv2fk5reo048_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clim4o76c1h2bs)
---
Kirk Cameron

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: they’re weaponizing hunger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
Peter, let me be clear

---
| | Peter, let me be clear: Donald Trump and Republicans are illegally withholding SNAP benefits. Millions of children could go hungry. It’s despicable. Republicans are weaponizing hunger against the American people by withholding food for children, seniors and veterans. Instead of working with Democrats to reopen the government and reinstate SNAP benefits, House Republicans remain on a taxpayer-funded vacation for the sixth consecutive week. Republicans created this crisis. Their One Big Ugly Law included the largest cut to nutritional assistance in American history to provide massive tax breaks to GOP billionaire donors. You deserve better. We should be helping the American people, not hurting them. Keep the faith, Hakeem If you can support organizations on the frontlines fending off this Republican assault on America’s largest anti-hunger program, please consider contributing time or resources to the New York-based groups below:

clean_body: Peter, let me be clear | | Peter, let me be clear: Donald Trump and Republicans are illegally withholding SNAP benefits. Millions of children could go hungry. It’s despicable. Republicans are weaponizing hunger against the American people by withholding food for children, seniors and veterans. Instead of working with Democrats to reopen the government and reinstate SNAP benefits, House Republicans remain on a taxpayer-funded vacation for the sixth consecutive week. Republicans created this crisis. Their One Big Ugly Law included the largest cut to nutritional assistance in American history to provide massive tax breaks to GOP billionaire donors. You deserve better. We should be helping the American people, not hurting them. name: Michigan COV
subject: In Case You Missed It: Texas Just Took a Big Step - Now It’s Michigan’s Turn
body:
Let's make Michigan #16

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7a4958e9994b/breaking-news-citizens-only-voting-amendment-submitted-to-board-of-canvassers-8371211?e=ecf60db114)

---
|
---
| |

In case you missed it, on Tuesday, _Texas voters overwhelmingly approved a constitutional amendment ensuring that only U.S. citizens can vote in their elections._
This victory sends a clear message: Americans want confidence in their elections and safeguards that protect the integrity of every American citizen vote.
Now, it’s Michigan’s turn.
The Citizens Only Voting initiative is gaining momentum, but we need your help to take it across the finish line. With petition drives underway and misinformation spreading fast, grassroots support is more important than ever. Every signature collected and every dollar raised helps ensure that only _citizens_ decide Michigan’s future.
Will you join us?
[👉 [Sign up to volunteer]](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=0937a231cc&e=ecf60db114)
[👉 [Chip in to support the campaign]](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=8beee7dbed&e=ecf60db114)
Together, we can protect the principle that defines our democracy: _American elections for American citizens._
Thank you for standing with us,
Citizens Only Voting - Michigan

---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Children need to know God’s Word is GOOD
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18981436/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZ0o0WmY4NlVibg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMDc/LbmNsM0VYSVFYUA/qP2hpZHM9bmNhb0JTZ1pZSHZSOTBscw/gaQ4rog/sfq53a87f5d)
| |
---
| |
---
Dear Friend, If you agree that it’s time for Christians to boldly and unashamedly lead our schools and our culture back to our country’s founding values... ...will you help me teach children the true meaning of the rainbow? The Bible tells us that God gave us the rainbow as a symbol of his covenant with the earth:
---
**“I have set my rainbow in the clouds, and it will be the sign of the covenant between me and the earth.” Genesis 9:13**
---
Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement. After all, it was back in 1999 that Bill Clinton first recognized June as “LGBTQ+ Pride Month.” And LGBTQ+ “rainbow” flags now fly year-round in stores, libraries, schools, and the halls of Congress...and even in some churches. **[That’s why I’m hoping you will take just one simple action today to help me teach children the true meaning of the rainbow and God’s word.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** With Christianity under attack in America, our nation desperately needs Christians who are willing to stand up and defend our faith. My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Monumental.” I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood. But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandfather, and a Christian. When I saw the anti-God, anti-family, and anti-America messages the Left was pushing on young parents and children, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit. But that’s not all they are doing. BRAVE Books is giving parents, grandparents, and teachers the necessary tools to combat the Left’s hijacking of our children’s hearts and minds in schools, libraries, and elsewhere. And now, because of faithful Americans like you, God’s Word is being heard in the public square once again. Friend, I’m used to receiving hate mail from atheists and radical Left-wing activists who don’t like our faith message. But their responses make me realize just how much the LGBTQ+ community has changed our culture in just one generation. In the past, the gay community largely claimed they just wanted “tolerance.” But now that’s not enough. Today, they want everyone to celebrate and approve of their lifestyle – and they’re accusing those who don’t of “hate speech.” But by not standing up for God’s Word, Christians have allowed the Left’s indoctrination to creep into our churches, schools, and into our nation. And now we’re seeing the terrible effects of our inaction: our young children are being corrupted and led astray from the Faith. Think of all the drag queen story hours being held in public libraries, or the soft porn being promoted as teen reading, or even the classrooms where leftist teachers are sharing their “sexual orientation” and pronouns with kids as young as 5-years-old. More and more people are calling good evil...and evil good (Isaiah 5:20). My heart is heavy when I think of what’s in store for this nation if we don’t protect our children from these demonic influences. Never before has our culture so desperately needed parents and teachers to point our children towards the truth and away from the lies of man.
---
