And they are doing everything in their power to discredit, shame, and silence us. If you agree that we must introduce thousands of more children to the truth of God’s Word in these troubled times, [**then I would like to invite you to be a part of our life-changing mission here at BRAVE Books.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Will you help us teach children Christian virtues and proclaim truth to a hurting world that needs God’s Word more than ever? So many children simply don’t know the truth about God or His love for them. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll help us reach even more families through **BRAVE Books** ’ crucial projects, like our Christmas “Mouse in the House,” a Godly alternative to that secular “elf” game that so many families use, or producing the next season of “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” giving children wholesome content that entertains while building their character. [**Would you prayerfully consider making a gift to BRAVE Books today?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) America’s public schools are “normalizing” the ungodly agenda of the radical Left by decorating classrooms and hallways with “Gay Pride” rainbows, filling library shelves with LGBTQ+ books, and pushing movies and TV shows that glorify sinful behavior. But **BRAVE Books** is giving parents and grandparents a way to fight back and teach the next generation that God’s word is GOOD. name: Right Wing Report
subject: Extraordinary Courage. Extraordinary Comeback.
body:
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

“I did everything I could for him ...”

https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=pj1vplhuyxhr2sloub4h3xi6hk8fdtjmydoffrfmp9cqjwocpxmf5kpw0ai9n3qpmogvcii51fiio9ejyrk1l3r16ce8moo824gvshadmhxyrjvcklag3ur9dxm8i08h2a1dbebasibigpk2464i1j371j&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5d9tb&__onlt=t

https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=pj1vplhuyxhr2sloub4h3xi6hk8fdtjmydoffrfmp9cqjwocpxmf5kpw0ai9n3qpmogvcii51fiio9ejyrk1l3r16ce8moo824gvshadmhxyrjvcklag3ur9dxm8i08h2a1dbebasibigpk2464i1j371j&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5d9tb&__onlt=t

Not long ago, Dr. Shafir Botner, director of MAGEN DAVID ADOM’s paramedic school and a Medevac helicopter paramedic, was treating injured civilians at the scene of a rocket strike in Be’er Sheva, Israel, when he looked up and recognized a familiar face. There, working alongside the MAGEN DAVID ADOM team to assist the injured civilians was Chief Inspector Or Yosef of the Israel Police.

The last time Dr. Botner had seen him, Inspector Yosef was fighting for his life after being critically wounded by an RPG while helping civilians during the Nova Music Festival massacre on October 7, 2023.

A MAGEN DAVID ADOM paramedic was treating the inspector when he realized Yosef would not survive long enough to make it to the hospital in his ambulance. So, he immediately called for a helicopter.

When Dr. Botner and his crew landed, they quickly loaded Inspector Yosef into the helicopter.
They knew every second mattered
https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=pj1vplhuyxhr2sloub4h3xi6hk8fdtjmydoffrfmp9cqjwocpxmf5kpw0ai9n3qpmogvcii51fiio9ejyrk1l3r16ce8moo824gvshadmhxyrjvcklag3ur9dxm8i08h2a1dbebasibigpk2464i1j371j&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5d9tb&__onlt=t
.

“He was in very serious condition and had lost a massive amount of blood.

I did everything I could for him.”

But now, this patient who so nearly died on October 7 was not only still alive, he was also outside helping others. Seeing Inspector Yosef up on his feet and back on the job filled Dr. Botner with emotion.

“Or Yosef is truly an inspiration. To return to the field after such a devastating injury and help others injured in a missile attack — that’s extraordinary.”

I wish you could go with me sometime when I visit the MAGEN DAVID ADOM National Dispatch Center just outside Tel Aviv or one of the 206 MAGEN DAVID ADOM emergency medical stations located across Israel. There you will encounter some of the most extraordinary men and women you may ever meet.

There is something about the determination and compassion I see in their faces that always moves me. They are there to save lives.

HELP SAVE LIVES IN ISRAEL ►
https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=pj1vplhuyxhr2sloub4h3xi6hk8fdtjmydoffrfmp9cqjwocpxmf5kpw0ai9n3qpmogvcii51fiio9ejyrk1l3r16ce8moo824gvshadmhxyrjvcklag3ur9dxm8i08h2a1dbebasibigpk2464i1j371j&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5d9tb&__onlt=t

It takes grit and guts to do what they do every day. When a call comes in, they respond without hesitation — missiles may be falling, active shooters may be on the scene, buildings may be burning, but they are committed to going above and beyond to save as many lives as possible, even if it means putting their own lives on the line.

Again and again, these paramedics, EMTs, and first responders rise above fear, push beyond limits, and stand in the gap. Their bravery, their sacrifice, their relentless dedication — it’s nothing less than extraordinary.

May I ask you today to
give to support these exceptional women and men
https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=pj1vplhuyxhr2sloub4h3xi6hk8fdtjmydoffrfmp9cqjwocpxmf5kpw0ai9n3qpmogvcii51fiio9ejyrk1l3r16ce8moo824gvshadmhxyrjvcklag3ur9dxm8i08h2a1dbebasibigpk2464i1j371j&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5d9tb&__onlt=t
?

MAGEN DAVID ADOM relies almost entirely upon private donations and not government funding — which means the people of Israel are counting on the faithful financial support of generous friends like you so that help is able to come in moments of dire need.

Your gift
https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=pj1vplhuyxhr2sloub4h3xi6hk8fdtjmydoffrfmp9cqjwocpxmf5kpw0ai9n3qpmogvcii51fiio9ejyrk1l3r16ce8moo824gvshadmhxyrjvcklag3ur9dxm8i08h2a1dbebasibigpk2464i1j371j&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5d9tb&__onlt=t
will provide the medical supplies and equipment, blood reserves, and emergency vehicles that these extraordinary modern-day heroes must have to save every man, woman, and child possible.

God bless you,

Catherine Reed

Chief Executive Officer

GIVE TO SAVE LIVES ►
https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=pj1vplhuyxhr2sloub4h3xi6hk8fdtjmydoffrfmp9cqjwocpxmf5kpw0ai9n3qpmogvcii51fiio9ejyrk1l3r16ce8moo824gvshadmhxyrjvcklag3ur9dxm8i08h2a1dbebasibigpk2464i1j371j&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5d9tb&__onlt=t

MAGEN DAVID ADOM is Israel’s emergency services system, providing critical medical care and ambulance services for victims of terror, natural disasters, automobile accidents, and all other emergencies in Israel. It is also responsible for Israel’s national blood supply. MAGEN DAVID ADOM saves lives in Israel every day. Become a
Lifeline Partner
https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=1q5eswb79jl8ptnr1jdsm7lbew3e6c26tz2qt5lv5l600mlntxisbuwxixocsq2dh01kjklyx0wiowbx3aezicba9lnvzaf9eo19dqggh1n34cpltke3mptp0ffe6py87g6ay42ruozs29wbptirtd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5d9tb&__onlt=t
now.

Unsubscribe
https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xul=2qq8ny3595o85h60939os39vgzai2q9ghk4ng9em1ac4wok37pp53eaptp67hi9ipgwf06mpae1fl17y0s3q08n2od2pi1fnu7svp27t6&__stmp=t5d9tb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh
/
Privacy Policy
https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021zrj1i2v14fqni2y6q4ujw3byi9gx6voqrqp70z55axmarlm16wiupv5ne3war5qq1ifxvdsekufuj64dtotw5fci0iad852m327j66krvr2cf6v060fariwtdo78g359d&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5d9tb&__onlt=t
/
Contact us
https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=4zp2igrzkq7xp4vllln5rs1g0gvk30sslf5bodxmibizcnffc03zrxw8vqqgqel22uskucl2fp9kipsoz21rslyntjg87wsk43xnaslssssxg25j9py740w1whthrjbm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5d9tb&__onlt=t

# LEAKED MEMO: They're Trying to Take Out RFK Jr
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2ce8bc53-3f8a-44ad-9eea-b3933c3eeb87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,

A leaked memo from a secret Big Pharma meeting reveals they're plotting to destroy RFK Jr's political future...
Here it is:
Is Big Pharma TERRIFIED of RFK Jr. uncovering the **[biggest health controversy](https://substack.com/redirect/2ce8bc53-3f8a-44ad-9eea-b3933c3eeb87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of them all?

**[>>Click here to discover what this RFK Jr controversy is.<<](https://substack.com/redirect/2ce8bc53-3f8a-44ad-9eea-b3933c3eeb87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/2ce8bc53-3f8a-44ad-9eea-b3933c3eeb87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Rep. Elise Stefanik announces 2026 New York gubernatorial bid**
Rep. Elise Stefanik, R-N.Y., **[officially launched her 2026 gubernatorial campaign](https://substack.com/redirect/0193c0f7-d4c8-4504-b95f-c5be0424b8e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Friday, vowing to defeat Democratic incumbent Kathy Hochul and become New York's first Republican governor in two decades.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/48624f5b-ab3a-4c93-bf36-d266399e1b90?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Campaign focus** : Stefanik pledged to make New York "safe and affordable," attacking Hochul for high taxes, energy costs and rising crime under her administration. Her campaign video, titled "From the Ashes," promises to "restore New York's greatness."
* **Sharp attacks** : The upstate congresswoman called Hochul **["the worst governor in America"](https://substack.com/redirect/0193c0f7-d4c8-4504-b95f-c5be0424b8e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **and accused her of supporting "defund the police, tax hiking" policies. The campaign video also slams Hochul for backing New York City Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani.
* **Party unity** : New York GOP Chair Ed Cox endorsed Stefanik's candidacy, calling her "the warrior we need" and announcing there will be no Republican primary. Early polls show Stefanik running neck-and-neck with Hochul.
* **Trump ally** : The high-profile congresswoman is a fierce supporter of President Trump and gained national attention for her questioning of university presidents on antisemitism. She successfully pushed to raise the state and local tax deduction cap to $40,000.
* **Democratic response:** Hochul's campaign launched a **["SelloutStefanik"](https://substack.com/redirect/7c47fa30-f6bc-4d6e-8917-6d4eeba2709f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** microsite and video, attacking Stefanik as having a "deeply unpopular agenda"

* * *
# Melania Trump receives Patriot of the Year Award
**[First lady](https://substack.com/redirect/bceab90c-78cd-48e7-823d-d810ed5bc60d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Melania Trump received the **["Patriot of the Year" award](https://substack.com/redirect/7864664f-0960-4e09-bdcf-1774eecac0ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at the seventh annual Fox Nation Patriot Awards on Thursday night in Brookville, N.Y., one year after her husband received the same honor following his 2024 election victory.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/46ec0e1a-98b3-48f0-9a25-4953ffb7f589?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **International advocacy** : Trump has expanded her work on behalf of children during her second term as first lady. In October, she announced her diplomatic talks with Russian President Vladimir Putin helped reunite eight Ukrainian children with their families amid ongoing accusations Russia has abducted thousands of children during the war.
* **Child protection efforts** : The first lady supports the "TAKE IT DOWN Act," legislation targeting online exploitation and non-consensual sharing of explicit images. In May, she secured $25 million in President Donald Trump's fiscal year 2026 budget for housing and support for youth aging out of foster care.
* **[Other winners:](https://substack.com/redirect/0e1250ad-4efb-4f40-b30b-a1b54ee4aae5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Other honorees of the event included Erika Kirk for the inaugural Charlie Kirk Legacy Award honoring her late husband, former Hamas hostage Edan Alexande, West Point Cadet Larry Pickett Jr. for heroism, and athletes Alexa Anderson and Reese Eckard for fighting transgender inclusion in women's sports.

> **" Let's embrace the spirit of ambition.** Let's celebrate everyone who dares to think differently," Trump said while accepting the award. "For it is these courageous Americans who are the heartbeat of our civilization."
* * *
# **U.S. Military Conducts lethal strike on drug trafficking vessel in Caribbean**
The Department of War carried out **[a lethal strike](https://substack.com/redirect/ba06cf5c-9271-474a-be4f-f192699f78de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Thursday on a vessel trafficking narcotics in the Caribbean, killing three suspected narco-terrorists as part of President Donald Trump's escalating military campaign against drug trafficking organizations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ba06cf5c-9271-474a-be4f-f192699f78de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Artistic image, not photograph of vessel strike
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/65ae8882-f3cf-4884-8843-685091eba1c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Strike details** : Secretary of War Pete Hegseth announced the operation targeted a vessel operated by a designated terrorist organization in international waters. Video footage of the strike showed the moment the vessel was destroyed, and U.S. forces were harmed in the operation. "To all narco-terrorists who threaten our homeland: if you want to stay alive, stop trafficking drugs. If you keep trafficking deadly drugs--we will kill you," Hegseth said in a post on X.
* **Ongoing campaign** : The strike marks the latest in a series of deadly military actions authorized by the Trump administration against drug traffickers. Dozens have been killed in previous strikes as the administration pursues what officials describe as narco-terrorists threatening American lives.
* **Administration policy** : The Trump administration has compared drug cartels to ISIS and al-Qaeda, justifying the use of military force to combat the flow of deadly drugs into the United States.
* **Future operations** : Hegseth warned that vessel strikes will continue until drug trafficking stops, delivering a stark message to those involved in the trade.

* * *
# **House Republican proposes bill to block federal funds from NYC under Mamdani**
Rep. Buddy Carter, R-Ga., is introducing legislation Friday that would **[block all federal funding to New York City](https://substack.com/redirect/c0756055-b3ff-4fa6-9fd7-87714f127cf1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for as long as Zohran Mamdani serves as mayor, escalating Republican attacks on the 34-year-old democratic socialist who won Tuesday's mayoral election.
* **Bill details** : The two-page "MAMDANI Act" -- Moving American Money Distant from Anti-National Interests Act -- would rescind unnecessary federal funds and prohibit new federal money from being spent on New York City during Mamdani's tenure. The legislation is not expected to advance in the House.
* **Election context** : Mamdani defeated former Gov. Andrew Cuomo, running as an independent, and Republican Curtis Sliwa in Tuesday's race.
* **Political positioning** : House Republican leaders have sought to portray Mamdani as the new face of the Democratic Party following his win. Carter, who is running for U.S. Senate in Georgia, framed the legislation as protecting taxpayer dollars from "programs that will bankrupt the financial capital of the world."
* **" If New Yorkers want communism,** we should let them have their wish and not artificially prop them up with our successful capitalist system," Carter said. "Any New Yorker with common sense is welcome to move to the great, FREE state of Georgia."

* * *
# **Supreme Court allows Trump administration to enforce biological sex on passports**
The Supreme Court ruled 6-3 Thursday to allow the State Department to require passport applicants to **[list their biological sex](https://substack.com/redirect/616ef03c-96a5-4127-a137-79e9ea9607f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , delivering a victory to the Trump administration .
* **Court reasoning** : The majority found a lower Massachusetts court erred in blocking the policy, writing that "displaying passport holders' sex at birth no more offends equal protection principles than displaying their country of birth--in both cases, the Government is merely attesting to a historical fact without subjecting anyone to differential treatment."
* **Liberal dissent** : Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson criticized the conservative majority for routinely siding with the Trump administration on emergency cases, arguing the decision permits harm to vulnerable people as transgender individuals have been allowed to state their preferred gender on passports for more than three decades.
* **Policy context** : The requirement reverses the Biden administration's "X" gender option and is part of broader executive orders requiring transgender people to identify as their biological sex in gender-exclusive sports and military service. The class action lawsuit brought by transgender, nonbinary and intersex individuals will continue in lower courts.

name: Randy Villegas HQ
subject: Redistricting just reshaped this race. Let’s talk details:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress
body:
|
# [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118861389/581132610/1733485174?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTNlODhjNjEtZmZiYi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ilJ9hBTgfuVqIp0UUcJN0ejagJELSVu7GvEkdWbYJOM=)
Here’s a quick deep-dive into what Prop 50 does and why it matters -- especially for CA-22 and Randy Villegas’s people-powered campaign:
* **Prop 50 will shift this district by 4-5 points toward Democrats.** That’s a huge deal in a race this close. David Valadao has barely clung to this seat for years. With new lines that better reflect the communities Randy grew up in, we have a clearer path to victory.

* **Every major elections analyst now calls CA-22 a pure toss-up.** Immediately after Prop 50 passed, _Cook Political Report_ and _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ both moved CA-22 from “Leans Republican” to “Toss-Up.” We’ve always known a working-class, local leader like Randy can win here – now, we’ve got an even better shot.

* **Winning here could flip the U.S. House.** CA-22 is now one of the most Democratic-leaning competitive districts in the country. National Republicans know that if Randy wins, it could decide control of Congress -- which is why GOP super PACs are already gearing up to flood the airwaves with attacks.

That’s where you come in: Prop 50 gives us the map we’ve been waiting for. But it’s grassroots supporters -- not corporate PACs \-- who will power this campaign through the finish line. **[Midnight marks our FIRST big fundraising deadline since new maps were announced, and we need a strong showing. clean_body: | = Here’s a quick deep-dive into what Prop 50 does and why it matters -- especially for CA-22 and Randy Villegas’s people-powered campaign: Prop 50 will shift this district by 4-5 points toward Democrats. That’s a huge deal in a race this close. David Valadao has barely clung to this seat for years. With new lines that better reflect the communities Randy grew up in, we have a clearer path to victory. Every major elections analyst now calls CA-22 a pure toss-up. Immediately after Prop 50 passed, Cook Political Report and Sabato’s Crystal Ball both moved CA-22 from “Leans Republican” to “Toss-Up.” We’ve always known a working-class, local leader like Randy can win here – now, we’ve got an even better shot. Winning here could flip the U.S. House. CA-22 is now one of the most Democratic-leaning competitive districts in the country. National Republicans know that if Randy wins, it could decide control of Congress -- which is why GOP super PACs are already gearing up to flood the airwaves with attacks. That’s where you come in: Prop 50 gives us the map we’ve been waiting for. But it’s grassroots supporters -- not corporate PACs \-- who will power this campaign through the finish line. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being part of this fight. subject: We’re a team of trainers, staff, and badass organizers
body:
Youth organizers are vital to the powerful movement we’re building together. | | | Peter, our people-powered movement is built to last. Why? _Because we make sure youth organizers aren’t left out of the coalition we’re building:_ __[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAekMDT887VITlFf_D1bXsJIoO24UBk9MGwaI361_hFkM__nL2wRtKtTd-jbZA4C6lEDeqhLf8jrSW5pkMlABmy5V5FHr4umQSNQMCvqIvfXXB0OQz9Ky6lSP9xMwn_t-hL0DapmpDxSGtol-9Rzp_d2UyFuDPaVo7PDKUoFQR3-54Z8x1tHbePnYVenEzb-Baks2lU-GLH6XKaAxSF-pdtj3aXekvgTdrW4O9aruDAG4LrcCz-i3YuHmry4DWrFAzo83tqcQFgqZ5MLCFSv2sGoFQPWbxlr8-IZFgpU1nogPWM3zjDSoitTj7W3AqfS2VmbTMWyk9P4HaKBbp4JZ1Z-FXpcG1aDPDuf4NvaMxQwxY01TmkOKRb90EUOnGp0-8v3ec4GvqRxoMkBqIxVUwvr6AyNZy2rUboNIlfCWW3byEMA0-Ox9sAZOW8VRrkzaEG/4le/2ysvp1hlTQCVHw6z6HhEHQ/h0/h001.4gplObKaZk3Ea91GpRP63JIPAcdvnpKh-gqC8ORn6Qw) and liberation. **We’re a team of trainers, staff, and badass organizers — empowered by our ancestors and the power of our people — organizing youth, but we need your help to keep it up.** [**Can we allies?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAekMDT887VITlFf_D1bXsJIoO24UBk9MGwaI361_hFkM__nL2wRtKtTd-jbZA4C6lEDeqhLf8jrSW5pkMlABmy5ZV6maRX1TW6zIXLKvDQDKQWxTY3NpJl0shCp31NhJbaEnbALqD0ErpJ8_BybVpZNMmnCN5uP16bl2t4t4SC5wQcjJMrij89LRhTVU7JaeoUpYgXLfcZwSrgSHTawNMqQoyJyPoJGcEvNesEw8FWrR0Hn4THQO5Co0mo8Bg-DFzhyzgd9XVo_st7sy70cq8oerrF2ZGP1wDNjIrns7g8parZjvvcDdePhEruZkaPwlZG_FxosrfKE9GDmQ3fVL65ZDrTG4VZiMpTQN1idnAx31YROMcF3MNEElrfCB_3iSGonMfDIVhO0LJWn0JlQ_Cr--w6kDn_Tbgdg17sHpW1W3iy4mLTQ8gCiLLY4UPOh-ra/4le/2ysvp1hlTQCVHw6z6HhEHQ/h1/h001.jKHRrJRZoSqSHe2lzJFwFFHchb8VAkj1ozamX1OYuAs) At our recent **DMV Movement Building Training** , our team equipped the next generation of organizers with education and collective strategy over two days of training.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAekMDT887VITlFf_D1bXsJIoO24UBk9MGwaI361_hFkM__nL2wRtKtTd-jbZA4C6lEDeqhLf8jrSW5pkMlABmy5c4Wfdwc33FsBj2Np5uOuKzxso_Fz3HuC6hceJVTHRXlb030a_6JvJlZyckiYRlp1_591bveQ05uvdAGL8M2ByjN2zY6fwKskHmW5Qg-7MipvBDO0YtzD4ELsngMtCc5Df7tv30bDn4KuCs9RmxRTRJj4QuGHUuKu2srtsToyfI4oxTUL-sNRunyRKvmEEcA8jQOkgZZcqQR1Zfw_KYKPnyYxng8y4uKBx201t9mi1rcsa-B80rJGG9R5E6zO_Xntxqsrb2XSwFH4jcsaX6jP554wPeWtsNRHpzC-GVqFlHdpWEXeKtuRnxEyUd9fbklNf5EcxduU_rENRQuBNy1OtUrBe-6HCtf68p7ZDkGtcVx/4le/2ysvp1hlTQCVHw6z6HhEHQ/h3/h001.rxTEvoybfMGhQaPcoNATzDK6tPb_LUWWYF4TZhaHHik)
Trainings covered political education, storytelling, relationship building, strategy discussions, and campaign development — all aimed at expanding our organizing efforts to ensure _all youth_ have equal access to this vital education.
This movement of immigrant youth and allies are counting on support from people like you to keep building something real, rooted in community.

clean_body: Youth organizers are vital to the powerful movement we’re building together. | | | Peter, our people-powered movement is built to last. Why? Because we make sure youth organizers aren’t left out of the coalition we’re building: Through new training initiatives, United We Dream is empowering young people with the skills and courage to overcome authoritarian threats and build united communities rooted in dignity, joy, love, and liberation. We’re a team of trainers, staff, and badass organizers — empowered by our ancestors and the power of our people — organizing youth, but we need your help to keep it up. | | At our recent DMV Movement Building Training , our team equipped the next generation of organizers with education and collective strategy over two days of training. Trainings covered political education, storytelling, relationship building, strategy discussions, and campaign development — all aimed at expanding our organizing efforts to ensure all youth have equal access to this vital education. This movement of immigrant youth and allies are counting on support from people like you to keep building something real, rooted in community. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. ** Thank you, Matias, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?FFS_=F0=9F=99=84?=
subject: Boebert claims Democrats want to kill all Republicans
body:
This is the type of extremist rhetoric that is tearing our country apart and only pouring gasoline on the fire of political violence sweeping this nation.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001w6bBgovlfHhe1K8eU3pAd3oOhNw6XTDQ3isK1q2pqsHEYnxfUKfVJgREsLrc2GQaBgXRYSbxgJzDEaGzOiAuF-LdUiSo9RKheHRDLS9V7V1q_oGocQTm50zUqVqqFAp_swUYBFqi-SYYSJZl7Yx7Grod0eD2uBMdSuLZYv19lwXZnJmej817RUnOkFWJIxVi-BgBiqcsIfNv2ExDtcoR1g==&c=PnMVB6ssnQR1Hw1ruCAy9jH9Rpbn6TNHnDEE_Rp_4sDu1QVvI9Z7Bg==&ch=U_OwAYpXjJ48Drnmo9Uj1c9rBO4mQVfdU2CpwSgXiM_l7s_I-uUrzg==)
---
|

Peter,
On Tuesday, while Americans across the country voted to reject MAGA's extremism, Lauren Boebert was glued to her phone instead of doing her job--agreeing with a GOP operative who claimed that "the left wants us all dead."
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001w6bBgovlfHhe1K8eU3pAd3oOhNw6XTDQ3isK1q2pqsHEYnxfUKfVJgREsLrc2GQaBgXRYSbxgJzDEaGzOiAuF-LdUiSo9RKheHRDLS9V7V1q_oGocQTm50zUqVqqFAp_swUYBFqi-SYYSJZl7Yx7Grod0eD2uBMdSuLZYv19lwXZnJmej817RUnOkFWJIxVi-BgBiqcsIfMNlGepaVq7mA==&c=PnMVB6ssnQR1Hw1ruCAy9jH9Rpbn6TNHnDEE_Rp_4sDu1QVvI9Z7Bg==&ch=U_OwAYpXjJ48Drnmo9Uj1c9rBO4mQVfdU2CpwSgXiM_l7s_I-uUrzg==)
---

This is exactly the kind of reckless extremism dividing neighbors, endangering lives, and pushing America to the brink.
Boebert is too irresponsible and immature to be given a platform to speak for the people of CO-4. All she knows how to do is sow hate and division, while at the same time blaming Democrats for the very actions she engages in.
No one embodies hypocrisy like Boebert. She stokes the same political violence she pretends to condemn--helping orchestrate January 6th while she calls Democrats Reptiles and Jihadis, and branding Trans Americans as demons. And she's even called for the creation of a "holy army" to wipe out the left in Colorado.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001w6bBgovlfHhe1K8eU3pAd3oOhNw6XTDQ3isK1q2pqsHEYnxfUKfVJgREsLrc2GQaBgXRYSbxgJzDEaGzOiAuF-LdUiSo9RKheHRDLS9V7V1q_oGocQTm50zUqVqqFAp_swUYBFqi-SYYSJZl7Yx7Grod0eD2uBMdSuLZYv19lwXZnJmej817RUnOkFWJIxVi-BgBiqcsIfNQu7cu7Hiq2Q==&c=PnMVB6ssnQR1Hw1ruCAy9jH9Rpbn6TNHnDEE_Rp_4sDu1QVvI9Z7Bg==&ch=U_OwAYpXjJ48Drnmo9Uj1c9rBO4mQVfdU2CpwSgXiM_l7s_I-uUrzg==)
---

The people of CO-4 want a Congresswoman who fights for affordable groceries and health care, thriving small business and farms, and for wages that match the value of their blood, sweat, and tears. They don't want a representative who wields power like a weapon, stoking political violence while abandoning the very people she was elected to serve.
That's why Boebert's political career is nearing its end. Voters are rejecting her en masse--she is only in Congress because of just 546 votes and last time she faced our campaign, Trisha had the best performance of any Democrat ever in this district.
It's time for America to close the chapter on extremist politicians like Lauren Boebert who have delivered nothing to improve the lives of working-people. [If you agree, will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever is meaningful to you to help Democrat Trisha Calvarese defeat MAGA extremist Lauren Boebert?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001w6bBgovlfHhe1K8eU3pAd3oOhNw6XTDQ3isK1q2pqsHEYnxfUKfVJgREsLrc2GQaDktT30ypO1pX5fURbUm_t0PeEsaiIHTISR87lGT7Px5DYTfaw0erog8dNYQtQT7ltpBcP1yiBaSrO2Mu3WHbOdW9LdJXFK0UzzKLUVXORzAnYOebWuCdQWC0c9-B8PgY9dU7mhW6D8BENSHAQ8nIgGslqv6fIE5kP-x8gNCJBlg=&c=PnMVB6ssnQR1Hw1ruCAy9jH9Rpbn6TNHnDEE_Rp_4sDu1QVvI9Z7Bg==&ch=U_OwAYpXjJ48Drnmo9Uj1c9rBO4mQVfdU2CpwSgXiM_l7s_I-uUrzg==)

clean_body: This is the type of extremist rhetoric that is tearing our country apart and only pouring gasoline on the fire of political violence sweeping this nation. | | | | | == | Peter, On Tuesday, while Americans across the country voted to reject MAGA's extremism, Lauren Boebert was glued to her phone instead of doing her job--agreeing with a GOP operative who claimed that "the left wants us all dead." | == This is exactly the kind of reckless extremism dividing neighbors, endangering lives, and pushing America to the brink. Boebert is too irresponsible and immature to be given a platform to speak for the people of CO-4. All she knows how to do is sow hate and division, while at the same time blaming Democrats for the very actions she engages in. No one embodies hypocrisy like Boebert. She stokes the same political violence she pretends to condemn--helping orchestrate January 6th while she calls Democrats Reptiles and Jihadis, and branding Trans Americans as demons. And she's even called for the creation of a "holy army" to wipe out the left in Colorado. | == The people of CO-4 want a Congresswoman who fights for affordable groceries and health care, thriving small business and farms, and for wages that match the value of their blood, sweat, and tears. They don't want a representative who wields power like a weapon, stoking political violence while abandoning the very people she was elected to serve. That's why Boebert's political career is nearing its end. Voters are rejecting her en masse--she is only in Congress because of just 546 votes and last time she faced our campaign, Trisha had the best performance of any Democrat ever in this district. It's time for America to close the chapter on extremist politicians like Lauren Boebert who have delivered nothing to improve the lives of working-people. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Spiraling American political violence calls for radical peace. That's what Trisha will bring to Congress as the next Congresswoman for CO-4. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| With everything going on in Washington right now, it's never been more important that we flip the Senate next year.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5093%2E35263%2Eb7hGaM)
Hi there, In just a second, I am going to ask you to make a donation to support my campaign and Democrats running for Senate. I only need a moment of your time to explain why this is such an important request, especially today. With everything going on in Washington right now, it's never been more important that we flip the Senate next year and elect Democratic leaders who will fight for working families. But Republicans will stop at nothing — including spending _astronomical_ amounts of money — to hold and expand their Senate majority. Their #1 priority? Staying in power so they can continue ramming through their agenda to make life better for their billionaire buddies on the backs of working people. I won’t lie, we have an uphill battle ahead of us, and it will require a big team effort. But I know that if any team has what it takes, it’s this one. Last year, we defied the odds by helping me to win my toughest re-election battle yet _in a state that Donald Trump won_. We know what it takes to win, and together, we can help to deliver even more wins next year across the Senate map. **[Will you pitch in now to power my work in the Senate and help us win back our Democratic majority?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-nov25.xl9hz-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251107_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5093%2E35263%2Eb7hGaM)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-nov25.j5UyuQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251107_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5093%2E35263%2Eb7hGaM)

subject: Boebert claims Democrats want to kill all Republicans
body:
This is the type of extremist rhetoric that is tearing our country apart and only pouring gasoline on the fire of political violence sweeping this nation.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Cemd8XQF4owfgRtANi-YX3UjLhmkj6oij26CTiKP3Lig8zFoJXgivnADDT7Qyqfmz0L0c_rWOHQkuoHrgxd1mo4tvyn-a9CIdBgieL1iadEYxTtQYfVxecK4hbZL-tjbY3DuqzuW5mjYVrYPxCHxftAey2lsrVrOiZ8k4y_t__S7Cx3eYyRDClJq2OJmd_VyIhQugPeaBFwLVi0XctGlvnljz1KT2ONX&c=OqJatFeLJxGdBDU2kuNfbBXW5gC0ItjM_yh2MAtjJGhDvsoIx4udtQ==&ch=xrFKUDRwVQUi2ThvUYUlO6PYNFmw3Q3CCe3CN-XUXjjxHF21b25VhQ==)
---
|

Peter,
On Tuesday, while Americans across the country voted to reject MAGA's extremism, Lauren Boebert was glued to her phone instead of doing her job--agreeing with a GOP operative who claimed that "the left wants us all dead."
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Cemd8XQF4owfgRtANi-YX3UjLhmkj6oij26CTiKP3Lig8zFoJXgivnADDT7Qyqfmz0L0c_rWOHQkuoHrgxd1mo4tvyn-a9CIdBgieL1iadEYxTtQYfVxecK4hbZL-tjbY3DuqzuW5mjYVrYPxCHxftAey2lsrVrOiZ8k4y_t__S7Cx3eYyRDClJq2OJmd_VyIhQugPeaBFxUe7Xu107lkXy_pQZx14TB&c=OqJatFeLJxGdBDU2kuNfbBXW5gC0ItjM_yh2MAtjJGhDvsoIx4udtQ==&ch=xrFKUDRwVQUi2ThvUYUlO6PYNFmw3Q3CCe3CN-XUXjjxHF21b25VhQ==)
---

This is exactly the kind of reckless extremism dividing neighbors, endangering lives, and pushing America to the brink.
Boebert is too irresponsible and immature to be given a platform to speak for the people of CO-4. All she knows how to do is sow hate and division, while at the same time blaming Democrats for the very actions she engages in.
No one embodies hypocrisy like Boebert. She stokes the same political violence she pretends to condemn--helping orchestrate January 6th while she calls Democrats Reptiles and Jihadis, and branding Trans Americans as demons. And she's even called for the creation of a "holy army" to wipe out the left in Colorado.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Cemd8XQF4owfgRtANi-YX3UjLhmkj6oij26CTiKP3Lig8zFoJXgivnADDT7Qyqfmz0L0c_rWOHQkuoHrgxd1mo4tvyn-a9CIdBgieL1iadEYxTtQYfVxecK4hbZL-tjbY3DuqzuW5mjYVrYPxCHxftAey2lsrVrOiZ8k4y_t__S7Cx3eYyRDClJq2OJmd_VyIhQugPeaBFwUOt--j4fceO0FugbicSLR&c=OqJatFeLJxGdBDU2kuNfbBXW5gC0ItjM_yh2MAtjJGhDvsoIx4udtQ==&ch=xrFKUDRwVQUi2ThvUYUlO6PYNFmw3Q3CCe3CN-XUXjjxHF21b25VhQ==)
---

The people of CO-4 want a Congresswoman who fights for affordable groceries and health care, thriving small business and farms, and for wages that match the value of their blood, sweat, and tears. They don't want a representative who wields power like a weapon, stoking political violence while abandoning the very people she was elected to serve.
That's why Boebert's political career is nearing its end. Voters are rejecting her en masse--she is only in Congress because of just 546 votes and last time she faced our campaign, Trisha had the best performance of any Democrat ever in this district.
It's time for America to close the chapter on extremist politicians like Lauren Boebert who have delivered nothing to improve the lives of working-people. [If you agree, will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever is meaningful to you to help Democrat Trisha Calvarese defeat MAGA extremist Lauren Boebert?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Cemd8XQF4owfgRtANi-YX3UjLhmkj6oij26CTiKP3Lig8zFoJXgivnADDT7QyqfmSMlCWPqFT7aN7QG3oUg4Ie0MAAe1S87hnw8TPgV0vFHj07vq6SC6kfxAz08I7YyktQ796vSJZaxwAUCKztpa8oBU8jUgxFxzd_c173FRxdAcBZIYYUQ9bNVhd2uKXpi1MDCnFwmq1WqN_5pbhi1QFkIDQBBZs7vSEv5_fCdaIUo=&c=OqJatFeLJxGdBDU2kuNfbBXW5gC0ItjM_yh2MAtjJGhDvsoIx4udtQ==&ch=xrFKUDRwVQUi2ThvUYUlO6PYNFmw3Q3CCe3CN-XUXjjxHF21b25VhQ==)
---

I raised my right hand and swore an oath to protect our Constitution and defend democracy at home and abroad. What we’re seeing right now is the erosion of American democracy.

Donald Trump has deployed American troops against their fellow citizens and to police U.S. streets, sowing chaos, fear, and division. He’s even signaled that he’s considered invoking the Insurrection Act, a drastic measure to further his authoritarian rule.

These aren’t the acts of a democratically elected president, these are the actions of a dictator.

If you are concerned about the state of our country, then the immediate check we have on this runaway presidency is to elect Democrats to the House who will stand up to this extremism.

Over the next year, I’ll be traveling to battleground districts across the country to support a new generation of leaders who have the energy, vigor, and experience to stand up to this authoritarian administration and help us flip the House blue.

But I can’t do this alone — that’s why I’m reaching out to you today. Please, pitch in right now to help me put a stop to the chaos. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-nov25]

name: Center for Reproductive Rights
subject: ⚠️ Trump's dangerous VA abortion ban
body:
What you need to know | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118862211/581135009/2141984067?sourceid=1150942&utm_campaign=26emkge-1103aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=veteransday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzhkZDI2My0wMWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=txQX1YuN8g3Yf5VNcI81i2uMd_pjqNp6WRpEfjdOhCg=&emci=7d8dd263-01bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=838dd263-01bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118862212/581135010/2141984067?sourceid=1150942&utm_campaign=26emkge-1103aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=veteransday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzhkZDI2My0wMWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=txQX1YuN8g3Yf5VNcI81i2uMd_pjqNp6WRpEfjdOhCg=&emci=7d8dd263-01bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=838dd263-01bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=954237)
---|---
Dear Peter,

Trump and his administration are trying to **deprive veterans of their freedoms** —the same freedoms they put their lives on the line to protect.

In August, the Center for Reproductive Rights raised the alarm on a Trump admin rule that would ban abortion care and counseling through the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) health system. We asked you to submit public comments to urge the administration to abandon this cruel proposal.

**Veteran's Day—just next week—is a reminder that we cannot be complacent.** [**With your support, the Center is fighting on the frontlines to protect access to care for veterans and people _everywhere_.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118862213/581135011/2141984067?sourceid=1150942&utm_campaign=26emkge-1103aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=veteransday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzhkZDI2My0wMWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=txQX1YuN8g3Yf5VNcI81i2uMd_pjqNp6WRpEfjdOhCg=&emci=7d8dd263-01bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=838dd263-01bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=954237) | [**FIGHT BACK WITH US**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118862214/581135012/2141984067?sourceid=1150942&utm_campaign=26emkge-1103aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=veteransday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzhkZDI2My0wMWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=txQX1YuN8g3Yf5VNcI81i2uMd_pjqNp6WRpEfjdOhCg=&emci=7d8dd263-01bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=838dd263-01bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=954237 "FIGHT BACK WITH US")
---
This move includes the removal of a rape exception—especially chilling as **one in three women veterans report experiencing sexual trauma during their service.** Trump's ban would force people to carry pregnancies resulting from rape—compounding trauma with injustice.

If enacted, this would impact millions of people as one of the most extreme abortion bans in the country—prohibiting care even in cases of rape, incest, or when a veteran's health is at risk. **It would apply nationwide, even in states where abortion remains legal.**

Our veterans fought for us. [**Now, we have to fight for them.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118862215/581135013/2141984067?sourceid=1150942&utm_campaign=26emkge-1103aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=veteransday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzhkZDI2My0wMWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=txQX1YuN8g3Yf5VNcI81i2uMd_pjqNp6WRpEfjdOhCg=&emci=7d8dd263-01bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=838dd263-01bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=954237)
[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118862216/581135014/2141984067?sourceid=1150942&utm_campaign=26emkge-1103aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=veteransday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzhkZDI2My0wMWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=txQX1YuN8g3Yf5VNcI81i2uMd_pjqNp6WRpEfjdOhCg=&emci=7d8dd263-01bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=838dd263-01bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")

Onward,

Center for Reproductive Rights

P.S. [**Your support allows the Center to stay ready to respond to dangerous proposals like this one and raise the alarm before it's too late.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118862217/581135015/2141984067?sourceid=1150942&utm_campaign=26emkge-1103aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=veteransday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzhkZDI2My0wMWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=txQX1YuN8g3Yf5VNcI81i2uMd_pjqNp6WRpEfjdOhCg=&emci=7d8dd263-01bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=838dd263-01bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=954237)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=178286475&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4Mjg2NDc1LCJpYXQiOjE3NjI1Mzc2ODQsImV4cCI6MTc2NTEyOTY4NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uW1C5Z3HHEvyt6VVokKIZ9isTdvsIXEoQHt5x8H4k9c)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvYnJpYW5sZW5uZXkvcC93ZS13ZXJlbnQtc3BlbmRpbmctdGhpcy1vbi1pY2UtY3JlYW0_.vCba5Ra10dFtkJm4YbdVBvq9G-2JO7JB0N6tArhpRLw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/brianlenney/p/we-werent-spending-this-on-ice-cream?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

[](https://substack.com/redirect/e89fbecd-adfa-4fb8-8032-257358241389?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Back in 2010, Idaho built this massive database called _ISEE_ to track everything in our schools. Students, teachers, test scores, funding. It was supposed to show real-time data on how your kid's school was performing, so that lawmakers and others could make smart decisions with your tax dollars (it collects information from over 700 schools and more than 300,000 students).
But by 2015, the Legislature's own auditors said the system wasn't doing what it was supposed to do. It became a glorified calculator for federal paperwork - classic government efficiency, amirite?
So in 2022, the Governor, the State Board, and the Legislature committed millions in federal money to drag this dinosaur into the modern era. The original plan called for $18.9 million to get it done.
First, they spent an entire year trying to figure out who should do the work. _A whole year._ Instead of hiring someone who knew how to do all this they decided to get cute and experiment with a brand-new procurement process that nobody on staff had ever touched before. It bombed so spectacularly they scrapped the whole thing and haven't used it since. But now they'd burned a year and the federal spending clock was ticking.
(This was all before I showed up in the senate, BTW)
Fast forward to the 2024-25 budget, the Legislature looked the State Board dead in the eye and said: _" spend this federal COVID money on ISEE. That's it. Nothing else." _Crystal clear instructions a kindergartner could follow.
So what'd they do?
Well, I just found out about 30 minutes ago that The State Board took $1.8 million of that money and spent it on... _**whatever they felt like.**_ A dyslexia handbook. A STEM center. A math program. They outright ignored the Legislature's explicit orders. The State Board decided they knew better.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f6de01de-1d1c-45a8-8b80-0c10c93108dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
At the same time, they're burning through $6.2 million trying to meet federal deadlines they'd already blown by wasting that first year. It's a rushed, sloppy process. You know what happened to those warnings? Nothing. They never reached the lawmakers. Representative Wendy Horman (chair of budget committee) had zero idea they'd even hired a contractor to do this work. Apparently, a writer for an education publication had to tell her about it!
_Let that sink in ..._
The people controlling billions in education spending (the lawmakers) were completely in the dark about a multimillion-dollar contract. This is the transparency and accountability we're promised every time they ask for more money.
Then, March 2025 rolls around.
The federal government looks at this dumpster fire and says "We're out." They yank $8.5 million in funding because Idaho couldn't deliver. Two months later, the State Board puts the whole project on ice and a new executive director, Jennifer White, comes in and inherits a smoking dumpster fire that's 0% her fault.
This week, the State Board finally dragged themselves in front of lawmakers and confessed they'd blown that $1.8 million on unauthorized spending. White's said, and I quote: "We weren't spending this on ice cream. That being said, this won't happen again."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/32f3b5bc-7586-4613-be6b-389e3df25ac7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
That's the bar we're setting now?
As long as it wasn't ice cream, _we 're good? _I kind of wish it WAS ice cream, then at least we'd have something tangible to show for it.
_But instead, s_ chools are still stuck with a database that hasn't been meaningfully updated since 2010. You still can't get basic information about how your local schools are performing. School districts are still burning 1,500 hours a year feeding data into a system that gives you nothing useful back. West Ada (the state's largest district) is dedicating the equivalent of _nine months of full-time work_ just uploading information into this black hole.
The state's lit over $15 million on fire. There's no plan to finish what they started, and even if there was, it'll take at least two more years and nobody knows how much more money.
_**» These are the people demanding you hand over more funding...**_
_**» These are the people who fight tooth and nail against school choice... **_
_**» These are the people who tell parents they have no right to know what's being taught in classrooms...**_
_**» These are the people who insist they're the experts and you need to sit down and let them do their jobs!**_
Well, look at the job they're doing.
This is exactly why the school choice movement exists.
This is exactly why parents are pulling their kids out of government schools in record numbers. This is exactly why we're skeptical every time education bureaucrats come hat-in-hand asking for more money to "fix" the system.
They can't follow simple spending instructions from the Legislature. They can't meet basic federal deadlines. They can't keep elected officials informed about how they're spending public money. _They can 't deliver a working product after three years and $15 million._ They experimented with processes nobody understood, ignored warnings from their own staff, and then acted surprised when the whole thing collapsed.
But they want total control over your child's education. They want you to trust them with more of your money. They want you to believe that any criticism of their performance is an attack on teachers and students.
Here's the truth:
* Teachers are buying classroom supplies out of their own pockets while bureaucrats are lighting millions on fire and delivering nothing
* Students are stuck in schools that can't even provide parents with basic performance data
* Taxpayers are funding an education establishment that operates with zero accountability until an eductaion blogger starts digging through public records and forces them to come clean

If a private company blew $15 million, ignored client instructions, kept stakeholders in the dark, and delivered zero results, they'd be out of business. But in government education, _they just ask for more money and promise it 'll be different next time._
The education establishment loves to frame school choice as an attack on public education. No. School choice is the natural response to this level of incompetence. When the people running the system prove they can't be trusted with basic tasks, parents find alternatives. When bureaucrats treat tax dollars like Monopoly money (many such cases), voters demand options. When the establishment fights transparency and accountability at every turn, families vote with their feet.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/aafc1b4f-ed06-43f1-933a-da28840c77eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Idaho parents deserve better.
Idaho taxpayers deserve better. And the next time education bureaucrats come asking for more funding (which will be in a few months, the largest education budget EVER - over $3 BILLION last I saw), remember this disaster. Remember the $15 million that vanished with nothing to show for it. Remember the lawmakers who were kept in the dark. Remember the "it wasn't ice cream" defense.
Then ask yourself: _**do these people deserve another blank check?**_
This is why we fight for school choice. This is why we push back when Big Education demands more control and more funding. This is why we insist on transparency and accountability. Because when you peel back the curtain, this is what you find.
Every single time.

---

name: Team Fight Like Hell
subject: What SCOTUS is doing today, explained:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Our rights are worth fighting like hell for. |
#
---
Team, **Today, the Supreme Court is meeting behind closed doors to consider whether to take up a case that could threaten marriage equality in America.** If they agree to hear it, the justices could open the door to overturning the 2015 _Obergefell_ decision — the one that guaranteed marriage equality nationwide. We need to make it crystal clear: **the American people will not go backward.** **[Add your name to show that we’re standing united with Governor Whitmer that marriage equality belongs to everyone.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118862608/581136029/-92466412?contactdata=+hLQ+MHkh+zJwzQwTM2mwmfX9R5H5p1DitnnHZaEej6X2vP0iKB75bJmQyvxSsDnleyA9BEcBtF8RG0Xd/MtKo2PNedQ/YdvZiLDJ3g9yPmRYTmRHLLjGFXVFEQDKHWIztzuBoBRhyBxoGnPR3OwSg==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjY5N2ZmMmYtMDJiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ehcoS8QNLsCGuc-3CAWxsmE2hzzkgBb5yj9O6UKx_o4=&emci=f7b2e56b-73bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=b697ff2f-02bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=1028753)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118862610/581136030/-92466412?contactdata=+hLQ+MHkh+zJwzQwTM2mwmfX9R5H5p1DitnnHZaEej6X2vP0iKB75bJmQyvxSsDnleyA9BEcBtF8RG0Xd/MtKo2PNedQ/YdvZiLDJ3g9yPmRYTmRHLLjGFXVFEQDKHWIztzuBoBRhyBxoGnPR3OwSg==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjY5N2ZmMmYtMDJiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ehcoS8QNLsCGuc-3CAWxsmE2hzzkgBb5yj9O6UKx_o4=&emci=f7b2e56b-73bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=b697ff2f-02bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=1028753)
---
Here’s what’s happening: The case stems from Kim Davis, the Kentucky clerk who refused to issue marriage licenses to same-sex couples after _Obergefell._ **She’s now asking the Court to not only excuse her actions, but to overturn marriage equality altogether.**
If the Court decides to take up this challenge, it would be a sign that the conservative majority is ready to revisit rights many Americans believed were settled.
_Several justices have already signaled that they think the_ Obergefell _case was wrongly decided_ — and granting review in this case could be their first step toward dismantling it.
That’s why this moment matters. We cannot let the Supreme Court continue to roll back fundamental freedoms.
**Governor Gretchen Whitmer will always fight to protect the rights of LGBTQ+ people. But we need to show broad, public support to remind every lawmaker, every court, and every justice that equality is not up for debate.**
**[Add your name to join Governor Whitmer in standing up to protect the right to love who you love.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118862611/581136033/-92466412?contactdata=+hLQ+MHkh+zJwzQwTM2mwmfX9R5H5p1DitnnHZaEej6X2vP0iKB75bJmQyvxSsDnleyA9BEcBtF8RG0Xd/MtKo2PNedQ/YdvZiLDJ3g9yPmRYTmRHLLjGFXVFEQDKHWIztzuBoBRhyBxoGnPR3OwSg==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjY5N2ZmMmYtMDJiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ehcoS8QNLsCGuc-3CAWxsmE2hzzkgBb5yj9O6UKx_o4=&emci=f7b2e56b-73bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=b697ff2f-02bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=1028753)**

clean_body: Our rights are worth fighting like hell for. | Team, Today, the Supreme Court is meeting behind closed doors to consider whether to take up a case that could threaten marriage equality in America. If they agree to hear it, the justices could open the door to overturning the 2015 Obergefell decision — the one that guaranteed marriage equality nationwide. We need to make it crystal clear: the American people will not go backward. | | Here’s what’s happening: The case stems from Kim Davis, the Kentucky clerk who refused to issue marriage licenses to same-sex couples after Obergefell. She’s now asking the Court to not only excuse her actions, but to overturn marriage equality altogether. If the Court decides to take up this challenge, it would be a sign that the conservative majority is ready to revisit rights many Americans believed were settled. Several justices have already signaled that they think the Obergefell case was wrongly decided — and granting review in this case could be their first step toward dismantling it. That’s why this moment matters. We cannot let the Supreme Court continue to roll back fundamental freedoms. Governor Gretchen Whitmer will always fight to protect the rights of LGBTQ+ people. But we need to show broad, public support to remind every lawmaker, every court, and every justice that equality is not up for debate. | Because our rights are worth fighting like hell for. — Team Fight Like Hell Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. FightLikeHellPAC.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. name: Magsig for State Senate
subject: California Coalition of Law Enforcement Associations Endorses Nathan Magsig for State Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Nathan Magsig for State Senate 2026
body:
Magsig announces he has received the endorsement of the CA Coalition of Law Enforcement Associations, who represent over 150,000 law enforcement..

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d7174960d2b7/california-coalition-of-law-enforcement-associations-endorses-nathan-magsig-for-state-senate?e=6cdbd718cb)

# California Coalition of Law Enforcement Associations Endorses Nathan Magsig for State Senate
---
|
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** November 7th, 2025Contact: nathan@nathanmagsig.com
---
| | | | | | **Magsig - Law Enforcement’s Choice for State Senate**
**(Clovis, CA)** \- Today, the California Coalition of Law Enforcement Associations (CCLEA), representing more than **150,000 law enforcement professionals statewide** , announced its endorsement of **Nathan Magsig** for State Senate.
“ _We’re proud to endorse Nathan Magsig for State Senate_ ,” said the California Coalition of Law Enforcement Associations. “ _With a proven record of standing up for public safety and supporting the men and women who wear the badge, Nathan has earned the trust of law enforcement professionals across California. Our 150,000 members know he’ll fight to keep our communities safe.”_
Magsig expressed his gratitude for the endorsement, saying:_“It’s an incredible honor to have the support of the brave men and women who put their lives on the line to protect our communities. At the local level I have fought to ensure they have the tools, resources, and respect they deserve, and I will continue that fight in Sacramento.”_
The endorsement from CCLEA adds to Magsig’s growing list of supporters from public safety organizations, showing that he is Law Enforcement’s clear choice for State Senate.
View the full list of endorsements [HERE](https://nathanmagsig.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566959e132b9980afc6311201&id=38f050c1c0&e=6cdbd718cb)
---
| | ###
Nathan Magsig is a current Fresno County Supervisor, former Mayor of Clovis, and is running for the 12th Senate District. His family, wife Julie and their three children, reside in Clovis, CA.

[Learn more here](https://substack.com/redirect/b5eefd51-b99f-4cc2-9033-5c6bc376310b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/58cdc445-603c-4b8e-a818-94033d73b8c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## Lessons learned from Tuesday's elections...
The results of Tuesday's attorney general and gubernatorial elections are in.
It's got Republicans asking a lot of questions about what went wrong.
I've done a lot of thinking over the past few days about it, and I think it comes down to two key factors:
Messaging and mechanics.
It seems like Republican campaigns were asleep at the wheel in both these aspects.
So though the results are disappointing, they're not necessarily surprising.
The good news is that this is an opportunity to fix what went wrong before the 2026 midterms.
We can't afford another slip-up like this again.
Let's break it down...
