name: Cori Bush
subject: I grew up relying on EBT.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251107_foodstamps_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251107_foodstamps_act]
Nearly 42 million Americans and 650,000 Missourians rely on SNAP benefits, and right now, those benefits are hanging by a thread. Millions of families are at risk of going hungry because of government inaction.
I know what that feels like.
When my son was born premature at just 1 lb, 3 oz, food stamps helped us survive. He spent four months in the hospital. I stayed home for a year to care for him because his lungs were too weak for him to attend daycare. Having nutritious, readily available food through SNAP was a lifeline for my family.
Peter, my story is just one of millions. People are on food stamps for all sorts of reasons. In the richest country in the world, we should expect that everyone has enough to eat.
Instead, Trump and MAGA Republicans are cutting benefits and gutting the government one program after another to fund $200 million private jets for ICE agents and cut taxes for their billionaire donors. These are the SAME donors who came after us last time, and the same donors who supported our current Congressman.
On top of that, Trump’s pouring his energy into building a new ballroom in the White House, with donor money from the same ultra-wealthy crowd, while everyday Americans are left behind.
All the while, families in St. Louis are about to go hungry, and health care costs are skyrocketing.
That’s why I need your help. I won’t be bought by these same special interests looting our government and leaving our communities behind.
But I can’t do it alone. Your support powers this fight. Every dollar you give fuels a grassroots campaign that stands up to MAGA Republicans, holds billionaires accountable, and puts the people of St. Louis first. It funds organizing, advocacy, and action that keeps our community safe, fed, and heard.
If you can, chip in today. Help me keep fighting, for St. Louis, for SNAP, for every family at risk. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251107_foodstamps_act]

clean_body: [] Nearly 42 million Americans and 650,000 Missourians rely on SNAP benefits, and right now, those benefits are hanging by a thread. Millions of families are at risk of going hungry because of government inaction. I know what that feels like. When my son was born premature at just 1 lb, 3 oz, food stamps helped us survive. He spent four months in the hospital. I stayed home for a year to care for him because his lungs were too weak for him to attend daycare. Having nutritious, readily available food through SNAP was a lifeline for my family. Peter, my story is just one of millions. People are on food stamps for all sorts of reasons. In the richest country in the world, we should expect that everyone has enough to eat. We can’t overstate how important this election is.

**Social Security, Medicare, lower costs, and our democracy itself are all on the line.**

$1 fuels Democrats in critical red-to-blue districts like Christina Bohannan, Rebecca Cooke, and Janelle Stelson that will be key to flipping the House.

* * *
Saturday marked the start of open enrollment, and as a result of Republicans' failure to lead, health insurance costs are skyrocketing. This comes at a time when Americans are facing rising costs, and they’re already concerned about losing their healthcare after cuts in Trump's trash budget. Now, they're staring down health insurance plans that are hundreds — if not thousands — of dollars more than last year. **I’ve been clear about where I stand: Healthcare needs to be more affordable, not less. I’m ready to reach a deal that reopens the government, protects affordable healthcare, and delivers a better quality of life for hardworking Americans.** But Republicans refuse to negotiate, and House Republicans haven’t even been to work in DC in over a month! That’s not what putting the American people first looks like. I’m calling on my Republican colleagues to come to the table and get a deal done to end this shutdown — and I need you standing with me. [_**Sign my petition today and join me in calling on Republicans to take action to end the shutdown and protect affordable and accessible healthcare →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118865502/581146105/-1031394478?refcode=email_110725_healthcare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmM5MGVlNWQtMDZiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3KTHT2B91yPQOwX7YA4isPIG-GeZW3FsZq5mDUyiRA4=&emci=50b461a5-1cbb-f011-8194-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2c90ee5d-06bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=14434323) | | [Sign The Petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118865503/581146106/1054869212?refcode=email_110725_healthcare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmM5MGVlNWQtMDZiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3KTHT2B91yPQOwX7YA4isPIG-GeZW3FsZq5mDUyiRA4=&emci=50b461a5-1cbb-f011-8194-6045bda9d96b&emdi=2c90ee5d-06bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=14434323)

The audacity is _staggering_ , considering what he has actually done to Arizona families struggling to put food on the table. Here's Ciscomani's record on food assistance:
* **He voted for the largest cuts to food assistance in history.** Earlier this year, Ciscomani cast a key vote to rip food off Southern Arizonans' tables so billionaires could get a tax break.
* **He stayed silent when Trump cancelled 2 million pounds of food aid to Arizona.** This spring, the administration abruptly cancelled food assistance to our state — 448,000 pounds of which would have gone to the same food bank Ciscomani visited for his photo-op.
* **He skipped town instead of negotiating to keep the government open.** While more than 900,000 Arizonans risked losing SNAP benefits that help them feed their families, Ciscomani refused to go back to work and negotiate a deal to fund food assistance programs.

**Starting November 1st, federal food aid was halved for**** _over 900,000 Arizonans_** — all because Republicans like Ciscomani don't want to spend money that's already been set aside by Congress for exactly this purpose.
Arizona families won't forget this in 2026.
[**Can you support AZ Dems as we hold Ciscomani accountable and work to flip his seat blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118865498/581146099/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251107_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjk4YTEyMzgtMDZiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ABmIl0daKIdP7EHbDBrTWBRBtg5WAM72WsAN1_cl0GY=)
[CHIP IN TO FLIP AZ-06](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118865499/581146100/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251107_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjk4YTEyMzgtMDZiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ABmIl0daKIdP7EHbDBrTWBRBtg5WAM72WsAN1_cl0GY=)

Your donation keeps our mission alive: defending democratic norms, exposing corruption, and ensuring that power serves the people.

body:
new district, new campaign ad launched [watch now]
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118866032/581147533/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmFkMDRhMi0wN2JjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d4MSUFB_y7MhVWPM9H9SkhnQANmWMgxzdSZhe4y0mlc=)
Hi, it's Robert Garcia.
As a new member of Congress, I learned really quickly that to save our democracy, we need to fight like hell and stand up to bullies in Washington, D.C.
By now, you know that Donald Trump’s decision to rig maps in Texas and elsewhere has forced Californians to respond in kind with their own redistricting plan.
**But that means that my district got much more competitive. In fact, whereas in 2024, my old district voted for Kamala Harris by 32 points, my new district voted for her by less than half that. I’m taking on more new Republican voters than any other Democrat in California.**
**So today, I'm launching my campaign in my new district. ****[And with that, a brand new ad to share my priorities and what I’ll focus on if I’m re-elected to Congress in 2026. Take a look, and please consider donating $20 or more if you like it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118866033/581147536/789508428?refcode=251107_RG_camapaign-launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmFkMDRhMi0wN2JjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d4MSUFB_y7MhVWPM9H9SkhnQANmWMgxzdSZhe4y0mlc=)**

[WATCH NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118866035/581147538/-309737922?refcode=251107_RG_camapaign-launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmFkMDRhMi0wN2JjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d4MSUFB_y7MhVWPM9H9SkhnQANmWMgxzdSZhe4y0mlc=)
Redistricting was the right choice for California. In fact, our democracy depends on it.
This is our country, and I’m proud to fight for it alongside you.
Join us,
Robert Garcia

By now, you know that Donald Trump’s decision to rig maps in Texas and elsewhere has forced Californians to respond in kind with their own redistricting plan. But that means that my district got much more competitive. In fact, whereas in 2024, my old district voted for Kamala Harris by 32 points, my new district voted for her by less than half that. I’m taking on more new Republican voters than any other Democrat in California. So today, I'm launching my campaign in my new district. = = = Redistricting was the right choice for California. In fact, our democracy depends on it. This is our country, and I’m proud to fight for it alongside you. Join us, Robert Garcia = = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118866041/581147975/-2063340125?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTBiZTJiZS0wN2JjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bMQX6wSpO2TFJ9xQmzZD5wNCYzEpHUDqoHO7W3OMFfw=)
Friend,

I joined _WCPT 820 AM_ earlier this week to discuss what I’m fighting for right now – protecting healthcare, reopening the government, and demanding better for our communities.

I’m speaking with folks everyday who are making the impossible decision of choosing between paying for their sky-high healthcare premiums or putting food on the table.

And while millions of working families, children, veterans, and federal workers pay the price of the longest government shutdown in history, this administration is doing nothing to stop it.

**It’s cruel, plain and simple.**

There’s a glimmer of hope: On Election Day from Virginia to California, voters made their dissatisfaction heard loud and clear as Democrats were elected up and down the ballot.

Reclaiming the House majority next year is a key step in holding this administration accountable, and we need to keep the momentum strong. I’m facing multiple GOP challengers who want to stick to the status quo – not do what’s best for IL-13.

**[If you’re with me, and you’re able to chip in $3, it would go a long way toward protecting this seat and ending this administration’s cruelty.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118866042/581147997/-2063340125?refcode=em-11.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTBiZTJiZS0wN2JjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bMQX6wSpO2TFJ9xQmzZD5wNCYzEpHUDqoHO7W3OMFfw=)**

Nikki

name: Patty Murray
subject: re: the GOP's health care crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
It shouldn't take you more than a minute or so, but before you click that link, I want to make sure we're all on the same page.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118866283/581148364/419834691?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&refcode=jtk561-su-nd&recurring=0&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2U4ZGNjNS0wN2JjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bPjHezVWkMTtrpGfswfIJHh6kEi2Bp0s8FJoS2HXYzc=&emci=7b0d6fc4-adb9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=b7e8dcc5-07bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=13116610)
---
Peter,
As a top supporter, your input is invaluable to my work in the other Washington. That's why I'm personally inviting you to [participate in my Grassroots Health Care Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118866284/581148365/419834691?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&refcode=jtk561-su-nd&recurring=0&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2U4ZGNjNS0wN2JjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bPjHezVWkMTtrpGfswfIJHh6kEi2Bp0s8FJoS2HXYzc=&emci=7b0d6fc4-adb9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=b7e8dcc5-07bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=13116610) – and if you're able, I'd really appreciate hearing back from you before midnight.
It shouldn't take you more than a minute or so, but before you click that link, I want to make sure we're all on the same page:
The 2026 Affordable Care Act open enrollment period just started – **and over 22 million working Americans, including about 216,000 people in Washington state, are now confronted with health care costs that have more than DOUBLED on average, if not worse.**
That means in the richest country on Earth, millions of working folks might not be able to afford health insurance next year.
I'm talking about families with kids. Retirees who aren’t eligible for Medicare yet. Small-business owners, farmers – they'll just have to skip routine check-ups, necessary prescriptions, and lifesaving treatments. It's a disgrace.
By refusing to address this crisis, _**that**_ is the avoidable reality that Donald Trump and Republicans are more than happy to accept, and they even let the government shut down over it.
**But Peter, I am not.**
I played a critical role in getting ACA premium subsidies across the finish line in 2021 and extending them in 2022. And for the past few months, I've been fighting day in and day out to pass legislation to save them and keep families' health care premiums from skyrocketing.
Yet since the GOP Senate majority keeps stonewalling my efforts to save affordable health care access at every turn,**I need to make certain that keeping up this fight is what supporters like you want to see.**
**[Will you please let me know by joining my focus group before the end of the day? I'm going to stay in this fight, but I want to be sure I'm doing so in the best interests of people like you and your family.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118866285/581148366/419834691?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&refcode=jtk561-su-nd&recurring=0&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2U4ZGNjNS0wN2JjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bPjHezVWkMTtrpGfswfIJHh6kEi2Bp0s8FJoS2HXYzc=&emci=7b0d6fc4-adb9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=b7e8dcc5-07bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=13116610)**
| | [Add Your Voice](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118866286/581148367/419834691?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&refcode=jtk561-su-nd&recurring=0&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2U4ZGNjNS0wN2JjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bPjHezVWkMTtrpGfswfIJHh6kEi2Bp0s8FJoS2HXYzc=&emci=7b0d6fc4-adb9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=b7e8dcc5-07bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=13116610)
---
Looking forward to hearing from you,

Patty
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/q9iNeaDCVUi-n6xIKf7j9g2?unsubscribedata=Fv9b%2Bo%2F0VKKW5QjgNr7uYVqe%2FtzY8COGsaSnVXDA36Cp8h%2B%2Babcy7Fs%2BHNbi4LVYoivfSAjDuDI5thgja9aJOAEophGpOofkLfBpM6YzIRTc3Ypw8djDvxPPkN5u8%2F86fzLQNbWEPyqd7AmDwF5rxX%2FPIxq1hE%2BiZXiflnRrF%2BFxlt7HcvY6tZQoVmlA%2FUwe7t9O6HoXStBWm4KS8TCoFcBqHQKin6sBwYgAuWlXfw2ljAHF48NVe0BBwm5%2FzxQUdtsGJY3mAPOClPDlLiQMsZOi%2FQG6p7PszUEsRfufi%2F8DE4rkuG710R%2BkKa3iWVeZHxiClH%2BUh1RDn0GV%2FAovnltEVhaOs8ywItXuZBC5R5U5WQEdAJ5PhMRDVHlFsKWc303yOzd4RMMGD5M1EqYpnDMDN6WzrGQ5lIMXe3%2BnXXoO%2FrTmlmGZs21tqODNc254) People for Patty Murray

name: EMILYs List
subject: Abigail and Mikie represent the next generation of Democratic leadership
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118866579/581149293/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEK21_20251107_AbigailMikie_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1057316&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGU4ZDMwYS0wOGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h2pWRd0p_VQXXVNEh-oXzxmxuwIhD9c-x_ZnOX4fKJM=) Peter,

In 2019, Mikie Sherrill and Abigail Spanberger were roommates in Washington, D.C. as freshmen congresswomen. **Now, they're both the governor-elect in New Jersey and Virginia.**

Since their first congressional victories in the 2018 midterms to Tuesday's history-making gubernatorial elections, EMILYs List has stood by Abigail and Mikie every step of the way, and we're so proud to see them lead as governors. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118866583/581149307/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEK21_20251107_AbigailMikie_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1057316&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGU4ZDMwYS0wOGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h2pWRd0p_VQXXVNEh-oXzxmxuwIhD9c-x_ZnOX4fKJM=) **Abigail and Mikie represent the next generation of Democratic leadership, and they're both powerful models of what it looks like to run _and_ win in tough races.**

Last November, Donald Trump was only six points away from winning New Jersey and just five points away from winning Virginia. _But Abigail and Mikie both won their races by more than TEN points_.

**These victories set the trend for 2026, 2028, and beyond.** Abigail and Mikie's successes give us a blueprint for how to go forward, and we're already using what we've learned to recruit and support the next generation of Democratic pro-choice women running to take back the U.S. House next year. clean_body: | = Peter, In 2019, Mikie Sherrill and Abigail Spanberger were roommates in Washington, D.C. as freshmen congresswomen. Now, they're both the governor-elect in New Jersey and Virginia. Since their first congressional victories in the 2018 midterms to Tuesday's history-making gubernatorial elections, EMILYs List has stood by Abigail and Mikie every step of the way, and we're so proud to see them lead as governors. = Abigail and Mikie represent the next generation of Democratic leadership, and they're both powerful models of what it looks like to run and win in tough races. Last November, Donald Trump was only six points away from winning New Jersey and just five points away from winning Virginia. But Abigail and Mikie both won their races by more than TEN points. These victories set the trend for 2026, 2028, and beyond. Abigail and Mikie's successes give us a blueprint for how to go forward, and we're already using what we've learned to recruit and support the next generation of Democratic pro-choice women running to take back the U.S. House next year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for standing with our women, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Team Pappas for Senate
subject: What we know about NH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=3340%2E582294%2EyLvTNQ)
Chris Pappas knew that when he announced his run for the U.S. Senate, he was doing so in one of the swingiest states in the country.
He’s been elected to Congress here four times after all. Every single race has been competitive, and every single race saw national Republicans pour in millions to defeat him.
**We know this is not a safe blue seat, and we’re not running like this will be easy.** We’re building a campaign strong enough to fight back against Senate Republicans’ hand-picked candidate, John Sununu, _**and win.**_
[**That’s why we need your support now.**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251107_1_know.e-9_Kv&refcode=em20251107-1&t=2&akid=3340%2E582294%2EyLvTNQ) We’re building a people-powered campaign that has the same fight, the same grit, and the same grassroots spirit that has sent Chris to Congress before. We know we’ll need a grassroots team that’s stronger than ever to win in 2026.
[**So are you in? Will you donate $5 or whatever you can to support our campaign and keep New Hampshire blue?**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251107_1_know.e-9_Kv&refcode=em20251107-1&t=3&akid=3340%2E582294%2EyLvTNQ)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251107_1_know.e-9_Kv&amount=5&refcode=em20251107-1&t=22&akid=3340%2E582294%2EyLvTNQ)**
Thanks for being part of this team.
-- Team Chris Pappas for U.S. Senate
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251107-1&t=23&refcode2=3340_582294_yLvTNQ&akid=3340%2E582294%2EyLvTNQ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=24&akid=3340%2E582294%2EyLvTNQ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=25&akid=3340%2E582294%2EyLvTNQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=3340%2E582294%2EyLvTNQ)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

We know we’ll need a grassroots team that’s stronger than ever to win in 2026. Thanks for being part of this team. -- Team Chris Pappas for U.S. Senate New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?

body:
me vs. the establishment

Friend, Democrats need to grow a f*cking spine, and I'm tired of waiting for them to do it. I'm a fighter, and I've been doing it against the far right for my entire career. When I was reporting on Tucker Carlson and the rise of the alt-right, I saw the shift towards extremism that was taking place in the Republican Party. Democratic leadership is still not doing enough to stand up to Trump and help people who are in desperate need of change. If this moment is truly unprecedented, like they say in their fundraising emails, then why don't they start acting like it?! **This primary has a simple dynamic: it's me vs. the establishment.** None of my opponents have the same grassroots coalition, and nobody I'm running against has the same transparency as we do. No matter what the Democratic establishment and D.C. consultants may say, progressivism and the politics of hope are not untenable—they're our way forward. **Democrats have to be different, and that's why I'm running.** Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh, and if this isn't a sign of what's to come, I don't know what is.
As always, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click [**here**](https://ka4il.us/l/YrzuDdfR8xqd)**,** or if you'd like to unsubscribe from all future emails, click **here**.
**_Donald Trump is planning on attacking payment processor ActBlue in another attempt by his administration to push the limits of his power._**
The detainment of Mahmoud Kahlil, the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and the outright denial to follow a ruling made by the Supreme Court are all blatant oversteps that attack our right to free speech and due process and challenge the rule of law.
Friend, I've spent years watching Fox News and listening to their rhetoric get more and more extreme, and Donald Trump is doing exactly what they want.
**_Fascism is, and has always been, their end goal._**
Their vision is one of a militarized country where only certain people—a few dozen rich men—have a seat at the table, and dissidents like me are silenced.
Trump and Elon know that progressive movements like ours are in the way because I've made it abundantly clear that strongly worded letters, wearing matching outfits while holding up signs, and meaningless acts of symbolism **aren't my thing.**
As a member of Congress, I'm going to be unwavering in my fight for our communities.
I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation.
And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work.

name: Adelita Grijalva
subject: Enough is enough. I'm suing.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-grijalva?refcode=251107em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-grijalva?refcode=251107em]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-grijalva?refcode=251107em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-grijalva?refcode=251107em]
Hi, it's Adelita Grijalva — the Democratic Rep.-Elect being blocked from taking office.
Enough is enough.
I have filed a federal lawsuit to break Speaker Johnson's obstruction so that I can be sworn in immediately.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-grijalva?refcode=251107em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-grijalva?refcode=251107em]
This has now become the longest swearing-in delay in recent U.S. history.
We're going to court because if they can silence one district, they can try to silence us all. It's an unlawful breach of our Constitution — and an attack on the democratic process itself.
I'm fighting back with every tool available. But I can't do it alone. I need you in this fight with me.
Will you split a contribution today between Oregon Sec. of State Tobias Read and my campaign as we work together to win this fight, defend our democracy, and end this obstruction once and for all? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-grijalva?refcode=251107em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-grijalva?refcode=251107em]
It's been over a month since voters in Southern Arizona overwhelmingly elected me in a special election to represent them in Congress. We won by 40 points. The results have been certified. The people have spoken and they deserve representation.
This obstruction isn't just about politics. It's about a Speaker who's silencing an entire district because he doesn't like that my election threatens his razor-thin majority. It's an abuse of power that strikes at the foundation of our democracy and sets a dangerous precedent.
If that power is allowed to stand, any Speaker could override the will of the people and deny voters representation for months at a time.
This is a defining moment — not just for our district, but for our democracy. Every dollar we raise fuels this fight to hold Speaker Johnson accountable.
Please split donation right now between Tobias Read and my campaign to help us defend democracy and end this obstruction once and for all. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-grijalva?refcode=251107em]
Thank you,
Rep.-Elect Adelita Grijalva
Arizona's 7th District

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Can you do me a favor? (not asking for donations)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
What role does the internet play in the mental health crisis facing our kids? Let me know on this quick survey >>
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118867041/581150692/-2054079050?code=jtk970-su-nd&refcode=jtk970-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzVlNDZkZS0wOWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pb8Vz62taMsLGrSY-yi-iMjNjSyhTE3nGOt9J1vEJWA=)
---
Can you do me a favor?
On the campaign trail, I've met more parents, teachers, mental health professionals, and kids than I can count. Yet despite their many differences across the state, there's been one big issue on which they all could agree:
**Kids and teens are facing a mental health crisis, and social media and AI are only making it worse.**
**_[If you agree, will you please take a moment to complete this brief survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118867042/581150693/428164444?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk970-su-nd&refcode=jtk970-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzVlNDZkZS0wOWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pb8Vz62taMsLGrSY-yi-iMjNjSyhTE3nGOt9J1vEJWA=&emci=f42479fb-62bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=435e46de-09bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=1295540)_**
| | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118867043/581150694/428164444?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk970-su-nd&refcode=jtk970-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzVlNDZkZS0wOWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pb8Vz62taMsLGrSY-yi-iMjNjSyhTE3nGOt9J1vEJWA=&emci=f42479fb-62bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=435e46de-09bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=1295540)
---
As a dad to three amazing young women – _and first-generation digital natives_ – I know firsthand how tough it can be to protect our kids on the web.
The internet has transformed the world within my lifetime. We're still navigating uncharted waters, and that transformation is only accelerating. So now more than ever, we can't afford for our leaders to shy away. And as governor, my No. 1 responsibility will be to keep Colorado's kids out of harm's way.
My campaign is guided by the belief that we all share a responsibility to look out for one another and the next generation, whether that's in the classroom, on the street, or online. **And since this is a _people-powered_ campaign, every member has a role to play – including you, friend.**
**[Right now, the best way to join me in this mission is by taking a minute to fill out this short survey. Will you please help me fine-tune my plan to keep Colorado's next generation safe?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118867044/581150695/428164444?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk970-su-nd&refcode=jtk970-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzVlNDZkZS0wOWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pb8Vz62taMsLGrSY-yi-iMjNjSyhTE3nGOt9J1vEJWA=&emci=f42479fb-62bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=435e46de-09bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=1295540)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118867045/581150696/428164444?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk970-su-nd&refcode=jtk970-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzVlNDZkZS0wOWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pb8Vz62taMsLGrSY-yi-iMjNjSyhTE3nGOt9J1vEJWA=&emci=f42479fb-62bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=435e46de-09bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=1295540)

name: Andy Kim
subject: It’s hard to ignore what’s happening around us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Almost one in eight people in this country relies on SNAP to put food on the table.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118867158/581151072/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjI5OTE0OS0wYWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sm2Ygbg3tsdze-ZPM54wKulH22LbislASB5Ve3DEirw=&emci=6eba4b01-fcbb-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=bf299149-0abc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=26261389)
---

| | It's hard to ignore what's happening around us. Almost one in eight people in this country relies on SNAP to put food on the table. That means millions of families are asking themselves if they'll be able to give their kids breakfast tomorrow morning. Those are questions people are asking in New Jersey and in every state. And it leads me to ask something we should all be thinking about: _How did we get here?_ How did we reach a point where, in the richest and most powerful nation in the world, parents are rationing meals? Where kids go to school hungry and seniors cut pills in half so they can afford groceries? Let's be honest about it. President Trump isn't just sitting on the sidelines. **He's refusing to fund SNAP and using people's hunger as a weapon during a shutdown.** It's wrong and it needs to stop. SNAP isn't about politics. It's about making sure people don't starve in a country that has more than enough. It's about kids eating dinner. It's about dignity. So where do we go from here? We tell the truth. We stand up for one another. And we fight for a government that doesn't turn its back on people when they need help the most. I'm in this fight because I believe we can do better, and I won't stop until we do. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

clean_body: Almost one in eight people in this country relies on SNAP to put food on the table. | | | | It's hard to ignore what's happening around us. Almost one in eight people in this country relies on SNAP to put food on the table. That means millions of families are asking themselves if they'll be able to give their kids breakfast tomorrow morning. Those are questions people are asking in New Jersey and in every state. And it leads me to ask something we should all be thinking about: How did we get here? How did we reach a point where, in the richest and most powerful nation in the world, parents are rationing meals? Where kids go to school hungry and seniors cut pills in half so they can afford groceries? Let's be honest about it. President Trump isn't just sitting on the sidelines. He's refusing to fund SNAP and using people's hunger as a weapon during a shutdown. It's wrong and it needs to stop. SNAP isn't about politics. It's about making sure people don't starve in a country that has more than enough. It's about kids eating dinner. It's about dignity. So where do we go from here? We tell the truth. We stand up for one another. And we fight for a government that doesn't turn its back on people when they need help the most. I'm in this fight because I believe we can do better, and I won't stop until we do. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . As a soldier, I learned that when a team loses discipline, it loses focus. **Right now, the Republican Party is in total disarray -- and Marjorie Taylor Greene is at the center of it.** Just this weekend, she went on national television to blame her own party for failing to fix Obamacare. She called out her Republican colleagues by name, attacked their leadership, and threw her entire party under the bus -- all while the government is shut down and families are feeling the pain.
_She 's even ranting about extraterrestrials and demons..._** _What??_**

Friend,

I know I’ve reached out a few times this week, but this can’t wait.

After Prop 50 passed, elections analysts and even the _L.A. Times_ confirmed it: **I'm now the most vulnerable House Democratic incumbent in California.**

That means every Republican donor, super PAC, and Trump ally who wants to make a statement in the West Coast is zeroing in on my race.

We’re about to be the only show in town, and the stakes couldn’t be higher.

If we fall behind right now, we risk losing not just this seat, but one of our strongholds the GOP thinks it can flip under the new map.

I’ll be honest: asking for money has never been my favorite part of this job. But I can’t stay competitive in this fight without grassroots support.

**[So I’m asking you directly: will you chip in $3 before midnight to help us hit our emergency goal and show Republicans that California isn’t giving up without a fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118867563/581152686/-1516755731?refcode=em-11.7.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGMxNTE3ZjktMGJiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6JUbauixVhhoRr0iDs7YTAngUe6ofStbF1SnuTfyF1s=)**

Times confirmed it: I'm now the most vulnerable House Democratic incumbent in California. That means every Republican donor, super PAC, and Trump ally who wants to make a statement in the West Coast is zeroing in on my race. We’re about to be the only show in town, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. If we fall behind right now, we risk losing not just this seat, but one of our strongholds the GOP thinks it can flip under the new map. # Elon approved for $1Trillion Pay Package
Tesla shareholders on Wednesday **[overwhelmingly approved](https://substack.com/redirect/c69d7ec8-b1ae-4e1e-97bd-195317717fb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** CEO Elon Musk's audacious $1 trillion compensation package, granting him 25% voting control and shares tied to sky-high milestones like 20 million vehicle deliveries and 1 million robotaxis, defying proxy advisors' warnings.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c69d7ec8-b1ae-4e1e-97bd-195317717fb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Milestones Fuel Mega-Rewards** : The package unlocks 12 share tranches for hitting targets including an $8.5 trillion market cap, $400 billion in annual profits, and 10 million Full Self-Driving subscriptions over a decade.
* **xAI Investment Gains Traction** : Separate proposal for Tesla to fund Musk's AI rival to OpenAI securee majority support, despite abstentions.
* **Court Ruling Sparks Overhaul** : The approval revives Musk's 2018 pay plan that was invalidated by Delaware judges. Musk's new structure boosts his ownership from 13% to 25% of the company.

# Trump's AI Czar slams the door on "AI Bailout" chatter after OpenAI blunder
In a sharp rebuke to bailout buzz, President Trump's AI czar David Sacks declared Thursday no federal rescue for **[struggling artificial intelligence firms,](https://substack.com/redirect/7f2ffef3-df6f-4a9e-ae65-133f5ecf2907?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/7f2ffef3-df6f-4a9e-ae65-133f5ecf2907?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)dismissing OpenAI's CFO Sarah Friar's plea for a government "backstop" amid soaring infrastructure costs.
* **Sacks Rejects AI Intervention** : Emphasizing U.S. market resilience, Trump's crypto-AI advisor argues five major frontier AI companies ensure no single failure threatens innovation, avoiding "ridiculous" taxpayer-funded rescues.
* **Friar Clarifies Backstop Remark** : OpenAI's finance chief, after suggesting government support at a conference, posted on LinkedIn that her words were misleading, stressing private-sector leadership in building tech infrastructure.
* **White House Echoes Free-Market Stance** : Sacks' position signals Trump's administration prioritizing competition over subsidies.
* **Debate Fuels Industry Tensions** : The "bailout" exchange highlights growing rift between AI giants' infrastructure demands and federal aversion to bailouts, potentially reshaping public-private tech collaborations.

* * *
* * *
# Palantir CEO slams colleges as he hires high school grads
Palantir Technologies is **[upending tech hiring norms](https://substack.com/redirect/eca6772d-3ccb-4137-9610-8631a7b965ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by recruiting 22 high school graduates into a paid internship program, bypassing college entirely to combat "indoctrination" and crippling student debt, CEO Alex Karp announced Thursday.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eca6772d-3ccb-4137-9610-8631a7b965ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Merit-Driven Selection Process:** Palantir's Meritocracy Fellowship drew over 500 applicants, selecting just 22 based on Ivy League-caliber test scores for a rigorous four-month program blending U.S. history lessons with hands-on technical work.
**Karp 's Scathing College Critique: **CEO Alex Karp lambasted universities for intellectual flaws and workforce unreadiness, declaring all prior education "intellectually incorrect" and Palantir experience the ultimate tech credential.
**Path to Full-Time Success:** Top fellowship performers earn interviews for salaried roles at Palantir, where Karp insists pedigree fades--once hired, "you're a Palantirian," erasing divides from elite or modest schools.
**Industry-Wide Hiring Shift:** The initiative echoes skepticism from leaders like Meta's Zuckerberg, signaling a broader tech pivot to skills-based recruitment over degrees amid rising doubts about higher education's value.
* * *
* * *
# Meta leak reveals that 10% of its ads in 2024 were scam ads
Internal documents reveal Meta projected a **[staggering 10% of its 2024 ad revenue](https://substack.com/redirect/eca6772d-3ccb-4137-9610-8631a7b965ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** --about $16 billion--from fraudulent promotions for scams like bogus investments and illegal casinos, raising alarms over the tech giant's tolerance for digital deceit amid aggressive enforcement claims.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eca6772d-3ccb-4137-9610-8631a7b965ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Internal Projections Shock Revenue** : Leaked Meta files estimate $16 billion was earned from 2024 scam ads, spanning deceptive e-commerce schemes and banned medical products on Facebook and Instagram.
* **Daily Deception Scale Vast** : Facebook displayed roughly 15 billion "higher risk" fraudulent ads per day, and fueling $7 billion in annual sales from clearly deceptive promotions.
* **Business Risk Looms Large** : Documents highlight Meta's fears that abruptly curbing scam ads could derail financial forecasts, despite pledges to slash their prevalence.
* **Spokesperson Fires Back** : Meta dismisses 10% figure as "overly-inclusive" rough guess, insisting leaked docs distort its robust anti-fraud efforts and policy compliance reviews.

* * *
* * *
# Portnoy explodes at "Communist" who "hates America" threatens to leave NYC
Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy threatened to shutter his company's Manhattan office and **[relocate to New Jersey](https://substack.com/redirect/67bdd1bb-3be9-413b-b6f9-90f5a6b1f72d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after democratic socialist Zohran Mamdani's stunning mayoral victory Tuesday, blasting the Uganda-born assemblyman as a jobless "Communist" who "hates America" and vows rent freezes that could cripple business.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/67bdd1bb-3be9-413b-b6f9-90f5a6b1f72d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Portnoy 's Pre-Election Rant:** During a YouTube livestream, Portnoy vented frustration over Mamdani's potential win, calling him a "thirty-something-year-old Communist" unfit to lead due to zero real-world job experience.
* **Relocation Dilemma Exposed:** Weighing a move to Hoboken or Jersey City, Portnoy agonized over uprooting employees' lives in a "Catch-22," yet instructed finance teams to scout properties as a "principled stand" against the new regime.
* **Mamdani 's Radical Platform:** The victorious candidate pledges city-run grocery stores, expanded public housing, and rent freezes--measures critics warn will deter investment and spark an exodus of employers from the Big Apple.
* **Post-Victory Defiance Echoes:** On X, Portnoy shrugged off the election results with relief, noting he no longer resides in NYC.

* * *
* * *
# The end of the road for Ford's electric pickup truck?
Ford Motor Co. is **[weighing a dramatic retreat](https://substack.com/redirect/1180dcb0-45c3-4a9c-9cd9-0c5524f7989d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from electric vehicles, with reports Thursday revealing internal talks to permanently halt production of its flagship F-150 Lightning pickup after years of billions in losses and slumping sales amid fierce competition and regulatory headwinds.
* **Production Pause Persists** : Ford's F-150 Lightning assembly remains idled due to a supplier fire at Novelis, and the continued prioritization of gas and hybrid F-150 output to aid Ford's market recovery.
* **Sales Stagnation Exposed** : Year-to-date U.S. sales of the Lightning hover at 24,577 units, barely matching last year, with under 100,000 sold in total since the 2022 launch despite 200,000 initial reservations.
* **Losses Mount Relentlessly** : Ford's EV division has been bleeding billions annually, fueling a strategic pivot away from all-electric trucks as rivals like Stellantis scrap similar plans.
* **Hybrids Gain Priority** : Executives have emphasized gas and hybrid F-150 tucks as their primary focus, hinting at a flexible Lightning restart but signaling broader EV skepticism under Trump-era policy shifts.

body:
It was just three years ago that North Carolina was represented by a 7-7 even split.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118867886/581153791/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwMmNhYTA4LTBjYmMtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zo5O7NWPYPGNgS6jVeurDDz3ZnyJ7L2uzW3OAdHS3qI=&emci=6baefd2c-f1bb-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=a02caa08-0cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, The gerrymandered map North Carolina Republicans forced through last month is a disgraceful abuse of power. Because of their actions, North Carolina’s congressional map now favors Republicans in 11 of the 14 districts. _This is in a state where registered Democrats outnumber registered Republicans. _ And as recently as 2022, North Carolina’s congressional delegation was an even 7-7 split. The extreme bias now in North Carolina’s map is a direct result of Trump’s rabid attempts to steal every congressional seat he can in order to hold onto power and insulate himself from accountability. North Carolina Republicans were all too eager to jump on board and sell out their constituents with this extreme power grab. Look, all of this can seem overwhelming at times. But this is an issue that the vast majority of Americans agree upon. In fact, three out of four Americans think gerrymandering is unfair, and nearly 70% think it should be illegal. As Republicans try to make our democracy less and less fair, our movement to fight back is growing — and when we organize together, we can make sure the people behind these schemes face a real, undeniable backlash. **Together, we can guarantee that craven politicians like these Republicans face the music. There will be fierce legal challenges, and it’s our role to ensure voters know what they’ve been up to when it comes time to vote.** [**Pitch in to help the NDRC meet this moment in North Carolina, Texas, Missouri, and wherever Republicans attempt to wrest power from the people next.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118867889/581153794/-1263916904?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NorthCarolina_email_20251107-NDRC-Tier1-NorthCarolina_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251107-NDRC-Tier1-NorthCarolina_&utm_campaign=NorthCarolina&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwMmNhYTA4LTBjYmMtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zo5O7NWPYPGNgS6jVeurDDz3ZnyJ7L2uzW3OAdHS3qI=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: It was just three years ago that North Carolina was represented by a 7-7 even split. | Peter, The gerrymandered map North Carolina Republicans forced through last month is a disgraceful abuse of power. Because of their actions, North Carolina’s congressional map now favors Republicans in 11 of the 14 districts. This is in a state where registered Democrats outnumber registered Republicans. And as recently as 2022, North Carolina’s congressional delegation was an even 7-7 split. The extreme bias now in North Carolina’s map is a direct result of Trump’s rabid attempts to steal every congressional seat he can in order to hold onto power and insulate himself from accountability. North Carolina Republicans were all too eager to jump on board and sell out their constituents with this extreme power grab. Look, all of this can seem overwhelming at times. But this is an issue that the vast majority of Americans agree upon. In fact, three out of four Americans think gerrymandering is unfair, and nearly 70% think it should be illegal. As Republicans try to make our democracy less and less fair, our movement to fight back is growing — and when we organize together, we can make sure the people behind these schemes face a real, undeniable backlash. Together, we can guarantee that craven politicians like these Republicans face the music. There will be fierce legal challenges, and it’s our role to ensure voters know what they’ve been up to when it comes time to vote. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = This fight isn’t just about lines on a map — it’s about protecting the voices of voters who deserve to have representation in a healthy, strong democracy. Thanks for being a part of this fight. Marina Jenkins Executive Director National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. subject: Corporate giants shouldn’t own your toolbox
body:
| | | **Marie is fighting to make sure farmers can repair their own equipment without being at the mercy of giant corporations or expensive, proprietary software.**

[Add your name right away if you agree that farmers should have the freedom to fix what they own. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118868101/581154617/1067131788?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_180DO_251107_1_1&refcode2=8228a962-0cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI4YTk2Mi0wY2JjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GQ1s6hylJaG6kHFBMw1P6Nm2rEeevKZkJiGBHk1D3Qg=&emci=7428a962-0cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=8228a962-0cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=31138575)
---

Peter – When a tractor breaks down in the middle of harvest season, farmers don’t have the luxury of waiting weeks or paying thousands of dollars to get it fixed. They need to be able to grab their tools, make the repair, and get back to work.

That’s why Marie introduced the Freedom for Agricultural Repair and Maintenance (FARM) Act, a bipartisan bill that guarantees farmers the right to repair their own equipment.

[Will you add your name in support of Marie’s work to protect farmers’ independence and right to repair?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118868102/581154618/1067131788?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_180DO_251107_1_1&refcode2=8228a962-0cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI4YTk2Mi0wY2JjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GQ1s6hylJaG6kHFBMw1P6Nm2rEeevKZkJiGBHk1D3Qg=&emci=7428a962-0cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=8228a962-0cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=31138575)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118868103/581154619/1067131788?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_180DO_251107_1_1&refcode2=8228a962-0cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI4YTk2Mi0wY2JjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GQ1s6hylJaG6kHFBMw1P6Nm2rEeevKZkJiGBHk1D3Qg=&emci=7428a962-0cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=8228a962-0cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=31138575)**
---

Big manufacturers are locking farmers out of their own toolboxes – restricting access to the manuals, software, and parts needed to make basic fixes to their own equipment. For many small family farms, that’s the difference between staying in business and going under.

Marie knows that in America, we respect farmers, we respect stewardship, and we respect self-determination. While running the auto repair shop, she’s seen firsthand how unfair it is when corporate interests tell people they can’t fix their own tools. She’s fighting to make it right.

The FARM Act would restore balance by making sure farmers have access to what they need: the right parts, tools, and information to keep their equipment running and their farms producing.

It’s common sense, and it’s long overdue.

[Sign on now to support Marie’s bipartisan effort to guarantee farmers the freedom to fix what they own:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118868104/581154620/1067131788?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_180DO_251107_1_1&refcode2=8228a962-0cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI4YTk2Mi0wY2JjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GQ1s6hylJaG6kHFBMw1P6Nm2rEeevKZkJiGBHk1D3Qg=&emci=7428a962-0cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=8228a962-0cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=31138575)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118868105/581154621/1067131788?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_180DO_251107_1_1&refcode2=8228a962-0cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI4YTk2Mi0wY2JjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GQ1s6hylJaG6kHFBMw1P6Nm2rEeevKZkJiGBHk1D3Qg=&emci=7428a962-0cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=8228a962-0cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=31138575)**

When we stand up for our farmers, we stand up for independence, self-reliance, and the backbone of rural America.

– Team MGP

name: Stephanie Dominguez Walton
subject: As a Californian, this is personal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Please take a moment to read this.
| | **:** Please read this message from our President of the Board, Stephanie Dominguez Walton — [and then, if you can, chip in $7 today to help build upon Speaker Pelosi’s legacy by supporting the next generation of voting rights champions:](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96309?t=6&akid=21776%2E878179%2E4_Uayr) | [Chip in $7 now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96309?t=7&akid=21776%2E878179%2E4_Uayr)
---

As a third-generation Californian, Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s retirement hits me in a very personal way.

She has been a steady, principled defender of our democracy for decades — and her leadership has shaped what voting rights protections look like in this country.

I had the honor of meeting her. It’s a moment I’ll always carry with me.
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96309?t=8&akid=21776%2E878179%2E4_Uayr)
_(Left) VPP President of the Board Stephanie Dominguez Walton (Right) former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi_
What I admire most about Speaker Pelosi is how she fought to expand and protect access to the ballot — from championing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and H.R.1, to securing resources to ensure Americans could safely vote during the pandemic, to holding the line when our democracy was under direct threat.

**She taught us that being a voting rights champion means defending every voice, even when it’s difficult, even when it’s unpopular, and especially when the stakes are high.**

And throughout all of it, she invested in building the next generation of Democratic leadership — ensuring that younger, more diverse, and more community-rooted leaders had the support to step forward.

Now, as she steps back, Republican extremists across the country are working to undo the progress she made — passing discriminatory voter ID laws, purging voter rolls, and silencing the voices of Black, Brown, young, and working people through partisan gerrymandering.

So the responsibility to continue her work now rests with us.

[If you want to see Speaker Pelosi’s legacy live on, I’m asking you to donate $7 today to help support the leaders who are defending voting rights in this moment:](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96309?t=9&akid=21776%2E878179%2E4_Uayr)

clean_body: Please take a moment to read this. | | : Please read this message from our President of the Board, Stephanie Dominguez Walton — | As a third-generation Californian, Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s retirement hits me in a very personal way. She has been a steady, principled defender of our democracy for decades — and her leadership has shaped what voting rights protections look like in this country. I had the honor of meeting her. It’s a moment I’ll always carry with me. (Left) VPP President of the Board Stephanie Dominguez Walton (Right) former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi What I admire most about Speaker Pelosi is how she fought to expand and protect access to the ballot — from championing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and H.R.1, to securing resources to ensure Americans could safely vote during the pandemic, to holding the line when our democracy was under direct threat. She taught us that being a voting rights champion means defending every voice, even when it’s difficult, even when it’s unpopular, and especially when the stakes are high. And throughout all of it, she invested in building the next generation of Democratic leadership — ensuring that younger, more diverse, and more community-rooted leaders had the support to step forward. Now, as she steps back, Republican extremists across the country are working to undo the progress she made — passing discriminatory voter ID laws, purging voter rolls, and silencing the voices of Black, Brown, young, and working people through partisan gerrymandering. So the responsibility to continue her work now rests with us. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: It’s time to primary Chuck Schumer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

After the Democratic establishment spent years shouting, “Vote blue no
matter who,” many party leaders showed their hypocrisy when they refused
to endorse Zohran Mamdani in New York’s mayoral race.

The biggest culprit? Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer.

Sen. Schumer is the most senior Democratic leader in power right now — but
after spending years lecturing progressives for criticizing or refusing to
support corporate Democrats, he failed to endorse the official Democratic
nominee for mayor in the very city he lives in. Pathetic.

Even after Zohran beat Trump-endorsed sexual predator Andrew Cuomo in
Tuesday’s general election, Schumer would not disclose who he voted for,
saying:

“Look, I voted, and I look forward to working with the next mayor to help
New York City.”

It’s obvious why Schumer wouldn’t get behind Zohran: the out-of-touch
member of the Democratic old guard who has spent a career as the darling
of Wall Street is more committed to his corporate megadonors and AIPAC
than his own constituents.

After a year of watching Schumer’s failed leadership act as a doormat to
Republican authoritarianism, New Yorkers and Democrats everywhere deserve
better. That’s why it’s time to primary Schumer.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140955?c0=jd-em-20251107.it0ZAZ&source=em20251107-37174&t=1002&akid=37174%2E1203867%2E4eAewa ]If you agree that Chuck Schumer is no longer fit to lead the Democratic
Party, add your name in support of a primary challenge against him now!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140955?c0=jd-em-20251107.it0ZAZ&source=em20251107-37174&t=1003&akid=37174%2E1203867%2E4eAewa ]Add Your Name

Schumer had his chance to wake up from his corporate-funded slumber and
learn from last year’s devastating election losses. Nothing’s changed.
He’s still asleep at the wheel.

We must replace him with a fighter who’s ready to build and lead a true
opposition party.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251107-37174-footer&t=1004&refcode2=37174_1203867_4eAewa&akid=37174%2E1203867%2E4eAewa

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=37174%2E1203867%2E4eAewa

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
We can defend our fundamental right to vote. We can win this battle for our democracy, no matter how dark the last year has seemed. But we have to recognize that this fight doesn't start next summer, or when the calendar flips to January. The work has already started and we need your help to have the resources to sustain this mission not only to November but beyond.

Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
folks,
You've probably heard this a bunch already, Team -- but today is Election Day in several states. Governorships, state judicial positions, and more are on the ballot in places like Virginia, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania.
We're also now within one year of the midterm elections on November 3, 2026. In 364 days we'll be watching the polls closely around the country and waiting to hear who will take or maintain control of Congress in addition to 36 Governors races, plus thousands of other state, county, city, and town officials.
Why is this important? We're officially on the clock.
We've got one year to turn back the new wave of voter suppression we've seen since the 2024 elections. One year to fight suppressive bills across the country and defend access to the ballot. One year to defend mail-in voting from attacks from the presidency on down. One year to register and turn out as many new or lapsed voters as we can.
That's why we're asking for you to commit $26 for 2026, Team. Help support our work across the country and fight back against the opponents of voting rights who choose to protect their power instead of the rights of the people >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=110725_2&amount=26]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=110725_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=110725_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=110725_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=110725_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=110725_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=110725_2&amount=35]
Want to do more? Make sure your friends and family know about the full suite of Voter Tools on our website [https://voteractionproject.org/voter-tools/] to help them get ready to vote in 2026.
Voting is contagious. Voting is a habit. Turning out a new voter makes them more likely to participate in the next election. Voters who participate in two elections are way more likely to continue voting every time. We have to fight, voter by voter, to show them their voice matters and their vote is going to count.
So whether you vote by mail, drop your ballot in a drop box, vote early, or vote on Election Day, we must defend your fundamental right to cast that vote. Chip in with $26 or whatever you can today to make sure every voter turns out and every vote counts in the pivotal 2026 election >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=110725_2&amount=26]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Turnout Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=110725_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=110725_2&amount=20]

# **[Marine Corps Fires Senior Officers of Osprey Squadron](http://trk.libertyledger.-jEE9djQ)**
---
A dramatic leadership shakeup has rocked a Marine Corps MV-22B Osprey squadron based in Hawaii, with the Corps confirming that the entire top leadership team of Marine Medium Tiltrotor Squadron 268 has been relieved of duty. The removals — of the commanding officer, executive officer, and senior enlisted leader — come amid growing scrutiny over [...]

# **[FDNY Commissioner Resigns](http://trk.libertyledger._WuPA)**
---
In a move that sent a shockwave through New York City’s public safety apparatus, FDNY Commissioner Robert Tucker tendered his resignation less than 12 hours after Democratic Socialist Zohran Mamdani was declared the winner of the city’s mayoral election. Though officially framed as a routine departure, the timing—and the context—speaks volumes. Tucker, a prominent Jewish [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._WuPA)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Mamdani Says He Wants To Prove Government Can Get Things Done](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Fresh off his stunning win in the New York City mayoral race, socialist Zohran Mamdani wasted no time laying down the ideological marker for his administration. In his victory speech Tuesday night, Mamdani proclaimed that his tenure would prove “there is no problem too large for government to solve.” It was a bold statement — [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-QWOrZRuehtwYQ)

subject: personally asking Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
Give me 30 second to give you some context as to why:
| | | | |

| | | | |

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T31b44913-7c1d-4e42-9e8d-1c81cea80a34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Give me 30 seconds to give you some context as to why:](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7ab901f-4e7d-4bc2-ac6a-292367e6f1af/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| Speak Up PAC and Blue Amp Action are helping to hold the line against MAGA extremism. But beating back fascism – especially when Republicans are bankrolled by billionaires – takes serious resources. We’re facing a critical deadline in just hours. If we miss it, we’ll have to scale back. Trump and his Republican Party will rejoice. We can’t back down now because we risk losing our democracy entirely if we do. [Will you rush in a donation right now to Speak Up PAC and Blue Amp Action to help protect democracy before it’s too late? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15f92367-1103-4ea8-b04c-43406dd0ddcd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | |

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb956ec3-3dcb-4e7a-8cca-d71d6c2a6ccd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: Did you catch my MSNBC interview?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
We’ve seen from the elections results on Tuesday that people are fed up with the current administration.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118868793/581156919/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-11-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTBmMGVhNS0wZWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pz-VOdTEB4CwQYeq8MTbG2dEoP4BnF0msBz2tyvXauo=)
---
| _**I was on MSNBC yesterday to talk about the unacceptable failure of a Republican-controlled government that is prioritizing political games over the American people.**_
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118868795/581156921/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-11-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTBmMGVhNS0wZWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pz-VOdTEB4CwQYeq8MTbG2dEoP4BnF0msBz2tyvXauo=)
| | | [SUPPORT HILLARY ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118868796/581156923/32658279?&refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-11-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTBmMGVhNS0wZWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pz-VOdTEB4CwQYeq8MTbG2dEoP4BnF0msBz2tyvXauo=)
---
The heart of this issue often gets lost. It all can seem like a big power struggle.

The real question is: _**“What do the American people want us to do?”**_

We’ve seen from the elections results on Tuesday that people are fed up with the current administration.

I’m doing everything in my power to fight back. I remain ready and willing to work across the aisle to negotiate a deal that reopens the government while also keeping healthcare affordable and accessible.

On the ground here in Michigan, I’m working hard to ensure we can take back the House majority so we can finally put an end to this Republican extremist madness.

clean_body: We’ve seen from the elections results on Tuesday that people are fed up with the current administration. | = | I was on MSNBC yesterday to talk about the unacceptable failure of a Republican-controlled government that is prioritizing political games over the American people. = | | | = The heart of this issue often gets lost. It all can seem like a big power struggle. The real question is: “What do the American people want us to do?” We’ve seen from the elections results on Tuesday that people are fed up with the current administration. I’m doing everything in my power to fight back. I remain ready and willing to work across the aisle to negotiate a deal that reopens the government while also keeping healthcare affordable and accessible. On the ground here in Michigan, I’m working hard to ensure we can take back the House majority so we can finally put an end to this Republican extremist madness. = | | | = | = | = | = | = So grateful to have you by my side. – Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . clean_body: TRUMP TO THE DEEP STATE: Hands Off Our Social Security! Peter, President Trump is proposing a bold plan to ELIMINATE THE TAX ON SOCIAL SECURITY and put more money in YOUR pocket. But he can't do it alone. He needs your help to make this plan a reality. So we're asking: Our President is working around the clock to put more money in your pockets and stop giving it to big government - but he needs your help to put his HUGE plan into action. That's why we're asking YOU for your opinion. Thank you, GOP HQ Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Team Cooper
subject: Our opponent, in Big Pharma’s pocket
body:
We can’t afford those kinds of cost hikes.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=37%2E124072%2ENLVKP3)
Peter, could you afford it if your health insurance copays increased by almost 9X? That’s what the extreme Republican “big beautiful bill” could do to everyday Americans. _That’s what Roy Cooper’s opponent Michael Whatley would’ve voted for “in a heartbeat”._ **[This is what we’re up against in this race, Peter: A far-right puppet, ready and willing to force Americans to pay more for health care in order to give tax cuts to the wealthy. Can you help us defeat him and take back the U.S. Senate with a $25 contribution right now?>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1916?t=6&akid=37%2E124072%2ENLVKP3)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1917?t=7&akid=37%2E124072%2ENLVKP3)
---
This isn’t the first time Whatley and national Republicans have shown us where their loyalty lies — and it isn’t with their voters. When Michael Whatley led the Republican National Committee, they took more than $6.7 million from pharmaceutical and insurance industry interests.
Our opponent would rather sit in Big Pharma’s pocket than make sure Americans can afford to see a doctor. _And our Senate race against him is one of the most competitive in the entire country._
**[Roy doesn’t answer to Big Pharma — he answers to the people. If that’s the kind of leadership you believe this country deserves, can you rush a contribution right now?>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1917?t=8&akid=37%2E124072%2ENLVKP3)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
