Thanks so much,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=37%2E124072%2ENLVKP3)**

Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

clean_body: We can’t afford those kinds of cost hikes. | Peter, could you afford it if your health insurance copays increased by almost 9X? That’s what the extreme Republican “big beautiful bill” could do to everyday Americans. That’s what Roy Cooper’s opponent Michael Whatley would’ve voted for “in a heartbeat”. | This isn’t the first time Whatley and national Republicans have shown us where their loyalty lies — and it isn’t with their voters. When Michael Whatley led the Republican National Committee, they took more than $6.7 million from pharmaceutical and insurance industry interests. Our opponent would rather sit in Big Pharma’s pocket than make sure Americans can afford to see a doctor. And our Senate race against him is one of the most competitive in the entire country. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thanks so much, Team Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. ** mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper Victory Fund PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal. body:
It’s official: Elise Stefanik is running for governor, and her seat in Congress is wide open.
**It’s official: Elise Stefanik is running for governor, and her seat in Congress is wide open.**
I’m Blake Gendebien, the dairy farmer and Democrat running to replace Stefanik and deliver results for rural America.
**[Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today to become a Founding Donor and help us win this race?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97426?refcode=em20251107-9680&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1&akid=9680%2E614464%2EO7WPUH)**

name: Nellie Pou
subject: Nothing will stop me from doing the work
body:
Here's what I did last month...

| |
---
Hi friend, While MAGA leadership in Washington gave the House a never-ending vacation, dragging us into the longest shutdown in U.S. history, I spent the month doing what they refuse to do: showing up and serving our communities. I’ve been talking with families across our district about protecting healthcare, food security, and lowering costs — key issues that MAGA won’t negotiate on. All of this is a bargaining chip to them, and that’s unacceptable to me. I traveled to Washington in the hopes we could reopen the House and that Republican leadership would negotiate a deal. **No one was to be found. ** I also joined my 7 million fellow patriots at a No Kings rally to participate in the largest single-day protest in American history. Our message was clear: No one is above the law. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118868898/581157229/-200729754?refcode=251107_np_octrecap_img1&ms=251107_np_octrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNlOWM2ZTUtMGViYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9JTM34fZM5n41WvHvjG0z2-SlL_bm09YzgFdV4KmJ3A=) Photo credit: Tony Turner I worked tirelessly with Mikie Sherrill in the final weeks of her campaign. I stood with workers at labor events, engaged deeply with our Latino communities, and partnered with leaders across New Jersey to show that we’re united behind Mikie Sherrill and her fight for affordability, opportunity, and freedom in New Jersey. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118868899/581157230/-200729754?refcode=251107_np_octrecap_img2&ms=251107_np_octrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNlOWM2ZTUtMGViYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9JTM34fZM5n41WvHvjG0z2-SlL_bm09YzgFdV4KmJ3A=) This election was one of the most important in the nation — and this victory isn’t just about New Jersey. It’s about protecting our rights, defending our country’s institutions, and rejecting extremism. And our work isn’t over. I can only keep doing this important work because of my amazing team of supporters like you, friend. **[I hope I made you proud last month. Please chip in today to keep this energy going until our crucial reelection. Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118868900/581157231/-200729754?refcode=251107_np_octrecap_l1&ms=251107_np_octrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNlOWM2ZTUtMGViYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9JTM34fZM5n41WvHvjG0z2-SlL_bm09YzgFdV4KmJ3A=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118868907/581157238/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=251107_np_octrecap&ms=251107_np_octrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNlOWM2ZTUtMGViYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9JTM34fZM5n41WvHvjG0z2-SlL_bm09YzgFdV4KmJ3A=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118868908/581157239/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=251107_np_octrecap&ms=251107_np_octrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNlOWM2ZTUtMGViYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9JTM34fZM5n41WvHvjG0z2-SlL_bm09YzgFdV4KmJ3A=)

### About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. clean_body: Here's what I did last month... | | Hi friend, While MAGA leadership in Washington gave the House a never-ending vacation, dragging us into the longest shutdown in U.S. history, I spent the month doing what they refuse to do: showing up and serving our communities. I’ve been talking with families across our district about protecting healthcare, food security, and lowering costs — key issues that MAGA won’t negotiate on. All of this is a bargaining chip to them, and that’s unacceptable to me. I traveled to Washington in the hopes we could reopen the House and that Republican leadership would negotiate a deal. No one was to be found. I also joined my 7 million fellow patriots at a No Kings rally to participate in the largest single-day protest in American history. Our message was clear: No one is above the law. = Photo credit: Tony Turner I worked tirelessly with Mikie Sherrill in the final weeks of her campaign. I stood with workers at labor events, engaged deeply with our Latino communities, and partnered with leaders across New Jersey to show that we’re united behind Mikie Sherrill and her fight for affordability, opportunity, and freedom in New Jersey. = This election was one of the most important in the nation — and this victory isn’t just about New Jersey. It’s about protecting our rights, defending our country’s institutions, and rejecting extremism. And our work isn’t over. I can only keep doing this important work because of my amazing team of supporters like you, friend. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you for being in this with me. Nellie | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Nellie Pou for Congress PO Box 2696 Paterson, NJ 07509 United States

name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: A week out from Veterans Day, Democrats chose to hold up veterans' benefits AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
In Washington, I will never place politics over our veterans and their families! |
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=c1b45b6ef8&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | Patriot,
While Democrats in Washington, DC continue to vote against opening the government, **the very real cost of the shutdown is beginning to be felt by veterans all across our district.** As of November 1st, Nevadans across Nevada’s 4th Congressional District woke up to find it harder to provide for their families. Even more startling is that veterans' benefits all across the country are experiencing delays or loss of benefits. **At this point, the goal of Democrats in Congress seems to be inflicting as much pain as possible on America’s heroes in order to achieve their political objectives.******
---
| [TELL DEMOCRATS TO STOP THE SUFFERING](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=701816bf06&e=273c9a71fb "TELL DEMOCRATS TO STOP THE SUFFERING")
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=791fe50cac&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| [SEND A CONSERVATIVE FIGHTER TO WASHINGTON](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=cc769921ff&e=273c9a71fb "SEND A CONSERVATIVE FIGHTER TO WASHINGTON")
---
| Democrats in Washington are angry that President Trump’s One Big Beautiful Bill helped to end funding of healthcare for illegal immigrants. Now, our veterans cannot access critical services because **Democrats have chosen to prioritize illegal immigrants over their own voters, American citizens. **

When I'm in Congress, I'll refuse to engage the Democrats in their prioritization of illegal immigrants over American citizens. Radical Democrats have made their choice loud and clear; now we have the opportunity to make ours!

In order to do this, we have to defeat Steven Horsford! **Will you chip in to my campaign so that NV-04 can have a Congressman who does their job in Washington?**

We have a real opportunity to bring real, positive, conservative change to Nevada, but it will take all of us working together. **I am matching every single dollar that is being donated, so your donation will have 2X the impact! Will you join our movement to flip NV-04?**
---
| [👉 DONATE TO TELL DEMOCRATS TO STOP WITHHOLDING VETERANS’ BENEFITS](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=0aa5a0bcd3&e=273c9a71fb "👉 DONATE TO TELL DEMOCRATS TO STOP WITHHOLDING VETERANS’ BENEFITS")
---
| Your support today will help us take this fight to Washington—and show Democrats what it means to serve your constituents. Every dollar you give makes a difference in ensuring our men and women in uniform get the respect they deserve.

Together, we can end the dysfunction, restore leadership, and ensure America never turns its back on its heroes again.
---
| David Flippo
Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress
Nevada’s 4th Congressional District
**[www.Flippo4NV.com](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=35bd730756&e=273c9a71fb)**

body:

| |
---
| | Friend, We are 38 days into the Schumer Shutdown, and the Democrats continue to show they care more about political theater than the American people.
---
[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/9ZTK45taSVnkOsOJ6PNyOcYMUAtuyBIw0OgGTDGWy08SYcb_o4u1XEOs77J0ec4koeLvGgM_FyZ1mLuuZyS6ONYAQLNFU9wNAq-TjWxKBVFIsYffIqqAFZYDaGZ-xDumDcw90_rxLhlMDssa6PFR9FPUEuJkXxjvdBUdeRUEFPsq1Mw9pptltKN56ftTy54I21LsoBD7d-nfGJO6IlqYnZdMBdEthhmfZX0IUJpfiAD8HkycQ1vygA--35MC8-Po6ocahomjI5GLIjJ44TmC8EUPVavXQquYoqeyTNaEHeAbtNNGT_GSy02ws9TKiPPJ5dmwZoEkfIda5cq25ypykHIJ28MwXqDwcjGlHPtTZkkuqRqeeiI7IZ9BKLd4d0OsLE5IrjmBNU4EZUnrGabTbKC2Zr7puGCmj8xfv0d1O99UbigzplRpeYL5k3ay7ZQ/EwgC5tvDzoP8R9Vks6K8cy0MotZVPifc/14)
---
Democrats have voted 15 times to cut off SNAP, and I’d like to remind them they are hurting people by refusing to open the government. The American people are **_NOT_ LEVERAGE**.

Last weekend, I was thankful to head up Jellico Mountain and join in on something that Tennesseans do best—neighbors helping neighbors. Mission of Hope and Compassion Ministries' Mobile Food Pantry teamed up to help feed those in need, and it was a blessing to work alongside them.
---
[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/l8R0dNXHcifJj5YcohR6S4_grhFwqQVHF_OPBwoOu2YokuvAuGxCNUU7gvQDdZ2YiZCaxRd11bAPZxQ8ex6YDh-Ei7hyiH6eSs6qgKrjhCa_L55wQRyxWQZ0kAA4Ko2up9Uz5pMgTqSDC0_zTlJ-xSBhu-lMzglvOJ0UTIYTk2HC47qbMlUlGsNNgvpxxBpjkNwubumCY430WaJRg-hN7wwY4zEAA_i4llsqr1xTZYz8C4pdzjQrhPd-HfIa_zKhaeXKn4MblWmWiNXltGeHtRZh21OASxMP-KdpkKqQsAeRTAuX9mtHJXuWxArPPruGKfptSeK-Wl9A6oRK2QZuse1wZd0Z-ISDM178lUfeOD2rRNnFRA9p9SQMVkgAd12QHVy2lU6qVVk-aFxOv5RJ9M7OW_Mc_eFBMYM0g_AkmT6eHk2kag/syuzY9MpGrx4V3rvY2xvlkzqj2Kum8oS/14)
---
I’m hopeful Schumer and his gang will end this nonsense soon, but until then, I encourage all my supporters to lend a helping hand to those around them who may be struggling.

Thank y’all for sending me here,
Tim
---

name: Powered by People
subject: We can’t let Texans go hungry
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

The largest food assistance program in America is at risk right now.

And while millions of families worry about how they’ll put food on the
table, Trump is doing everything he can to delay, distract, and dodge
responsibility—using working families as pawns in his cruel political
games.

3.5 million Texans rely on SNAP to help feed their families. Without it,
more parents are skipping meals so their kids can eat, seniors are
stretching every dollar, and folks are struggling to get by.

So if Trump and his Republicans won’t act, we will.

At Powered by People, we’ve raised hundreds of thousands of dollars for
food banks across Texas. And we’ve staffed thousands of volunteer shifts
in every part of the state—because when our neighbors are hurting, we show
up.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251107.rrlmgD&refcode=ema20251107-240450&t=1002&akid=240450%2E444211%2E-q0llu ]Powered by People volunteers

Now we’re asking you to show up again. We’re teaming up with Feeding
America, a nationwide network of food banks, food pantries, and local meal
programs that are all working toward one simple goal: helping people get
the food and resources they need.

Food assistance shouldn’t be political. It’s about doing what’s right for
our neighbors.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251107.rrlmgD&refcode=ema20251107-240450&amount=3&t=1003&akid=240450%2E444211%2E-q0llu ]Will you chip in $3 today to Feeding America and help
make sure no Texan goes hungry because of Trump’s political games?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251107.rrlmgD&refcode=ema20251107-240450&amount=3&t=1022&akid=240450%2E444211%2E-q0llu ]DONATE $3

In solidarity,

Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=240450%2E444211%2E-q0llu

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Jasmine Truong @ Peters HQ
subject: New lines, same fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress
body:
---
| | Peter,

Tuesday’s results were a major victory for democracy – Prop 50 passed!

That means new, fairer Congressional maps in California. It also means the political landscape here in San Diego is shifting fast. Early analyses show Scott’s district will become more competitive – and national Republicans are already eyeing it as a pickup opportunity.

So today, our campaign is pivoting immediately. We’re updating our outreach plans, refocusing on new precincts, and training volunteers to connect with voters across every corner of the redrawn 50th District.

Scott’s message of progress – protecting reproductive freedom, investing in clean energy, and lowering costs for working families – resonates here. But to reach new voters, we need resources now.

That’s why we’re setting a rapid-response goal of $15,000 this week to fund our first round of voter contact in the newly drawn district.

clean_body: | | Peter, Tuesday’s results were a major victory for democracy – Prop 50 passed! That means new, fairer Congressional maps in California. It also means the political landscape here in San Diego is shifting fast. Early analyses show Scott’s district will become more competitive – and national Republicans are already eyeing it as a pickup opportunity. So today, our campaign is pivoting immediately. We’re updating our outreach plans, refocusing on new precincts, and training volunteers to connect with voters across every corner of the redrawn 50th District. name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: 1.4 million Michiganders will go hungry without SNAP.
body:
|
#
Friend, Let’s talk for a second about what’s happening with SNAP benefits. On November 1st, millions of people across the country lost access to their full SNAP benefits. That includes kids, seniors, and folks with disabilities -- people who rely on just a few dollars a day to eat. This didn’t happen by accident. The administration made a deliberate choice not to use a contingency fund to continue food stamps -- a fund Congress already set aside to make sure programs like SNAP aren’t disrupted in moments like this. And even after several courts have ordered the administration use the funds, this White House remains dug in. Why? To make a partisan point over budget negotiations. Look, there’s a lot of noise in Washington, but at the end of the day, this is about one thing -- hunger. Here in Michigan, 1.4 million people (that’s about 13% of our state!) rely on SNAP to put food on the table. With energy and health care costs rising, the timing couldn’t be worse. **That’s why I continue to demand the White House use the money available to fully cover SNAP. The dollars are there. clean_body: | Friend, Let’s talk for a second about what’s happening with SNAP benefits. On November 1st, millions of people across the country lost access to their full SNAP benefits. That includes kids, seniors, and folks with disabilities -- people who rely on just a few dollars a day to eat. This didn’t happen by accident. The administration made a deliberate choice not to use a contingency fund to continue food stamps -- a fund Congress already set aside to make sure programs like SNAP aren’t disrupted in moments like this. And even after several courts have ordered the administration use the funds, this White House remains dug in. Why? To make a partisan point over budget negotiations. Look, there’s a lot of noise in Washington, but at the end of the day, this is about one thing -- hunger. Here in Michigan, 1.4 million people (that’s about 13% of our state!) rely on SNAP to put food on the table. With energy and health care costs rising, the timing couldn’t be worse. That’s why I continue to demand the White House use the money available to fully cover SNAP. The dollars are there. And people’s food should not be used as a political football. | Democratic MI lawmakers suggest solution to potential food stamp suspension “While we fight for a budget that lowers costs and addresses skyrocketing health care premiums, the administration is making a deliberate decision to let families go hungry,” said McDonald Rivet. Peter, Right now, 42 million Americans -- including more than 900,000 people here in Washington -- are being held hostage by Trump's latest crisis. Here's what happened: A federal judge ordered Trump to release emergency SNAP funds. Families were counting on that food assistance. But instead of following the court order, Trump played games -- first claiming he needed "guidance" on how to do it legally (this from a 34-count convicted felon who's ignored judges all year), then flat-out telling reporters he won't release anything until he gets his way. The courts ordered him to feed hungry families. Trump said no. **SNAP is a lifeline for millions of working families**. It puts food on tables for veterans, keeps seniors from choosing between medicine and meals, and ensures children don't go to school hungry. In our district, thousands of families depend on this assistance to survive. And where is Marie Gluesenkamp Perez while Trump weaponizes hunger against our community? **House Democrats demanded the USDA take immediate action to fund SNAP. Every single Democratic member signed it -- except two: Jared Golden and Marie Gluesenkamp Perez.** Golden just announced he won't run for re-election. Maybe MGP should read the room and do the same. **This is Trump 's cruel agenda. And it's exactly why we can't afford representatives who capitulate.** The time for playing nice is over. Our community deserves representatives who will stand up for the vulnerable, not look for middle ground with MAGA while families go hungry. That's the leadership I'll bring to Congress. Working families first. Always. [**Chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help us fight back against Trump's cruelty -- and defeat Democrats who won't.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUBm_R6HfrwXVSlFiksTb7mapldpg9F_-OIgBxOB4PCWw2jZvfgJ-j-6er5xVteGaJUVYXUr7YRZAWO39c0IK4AN5ZXLS_1oRub-UYtz4syX9MkS-X4SW0_lqwWryT_G8c8qVQeFcTHKrzgXnanKPOd0PwJIZK32w2tfhbKqur6lyCJf7WofXZ3HrdE7Ia8yk3_uWA895ZRKBQUrs8xpT3iwaPU5Ahlo4dHL3_JJpfC9JoVmTDmnLf7jszX04Egf_C5USB2xHdO_pLh7D5H7d_zA/4le/vQwTrljhRhOADoRxJSbosg/h1/h001.tBa1zk3K1R2nWDr9GvuhnyywXKPG6oFmCq2SgNZXX1Q) I'll fight to protect and expand programs like SNAP that keep families fed and stable. name: J. Rodriguez
subject: He’s wasting your money on political theater
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:
Our AG is failing Florida families. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118869834/581160603/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_RR_110725&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjgwYTZjYTItMTNiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=twXHLvCLqVu9cElN0YWvESdGje5wjsbC7OMVBgN0kmo=&emci=ae574936-03bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=680a6ca2-13bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=32374386)
---
Peter — While Florida families deal with the highest insurance rates in the nation, skyrocketing utility bills, and rent they can't afford, what is our Attorney General doing? Suing doctors and women's health providers. | | “Florida sues Planned Parenthood over abortion pill messaging” _\- Miami Herald_
---
Let me be clear: **James Uthmeier is wasting your taxpayer dollars on political theater.**
He falsely claims these medications are unsafe. I'll tell you what isn't safe: families choosing between groceries and medicine, seniors getting scammed out of their savings, and workers having their wages stolen with zero consequences.
Florida's Attorney General should be suing the corporations price-gouging Floridians, not playing politics with women's healthcare.
**[As your next Attorney General, I'll focus on what actually matters: fighting corruption, lowering your costs, and taking on the powerful corporations making life in Florida too expensive. name: Team Clark
subject: We need you in this fight for progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katherine Clark for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118870480/581163039/1117401451?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_KMC_FR_WEL_GEN_NTL_2025_SR3_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzA0Zjc4ZC0xNGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9sMWWJGL9opysyzYG45lp6N1Xa4yHeOFlBnM-m9aSEQ=)
---
Peter, As the highest ranking woman in Congressional leadership, Katherine is used to being the only woman in the room — _literally._ **But she has never let that stop her.** In fact, it’s a driving force of her work to help women and families all across the country succeed. As the second woman ever to be elected to one of the top positions in House Leadership, she takes her role in helping Democrats retake control of the House seriously. At a time when Republicans are openly trying to take away women’s rights, and making life harder and more expensive for everyday families across the country, we must do everything we can to take back our House majority. Peter, Katherine is the voice at the leadership table for every House Democrat in Congress — and for every American. **She knows that fighting back against authoritarianism and the attack on our rights requires coordination and strength. She’s got a plan to win back the House. In fact, it’s a driving force of her work to help women and families all across the country succeed. As the second woman ever to be elected to one of the top positions in House Leadership, she takes her role in helping Democrats retake control of the House seriously. At a time when Republicans are openly trying to take away women’s rights, and making life harder and more expensive for everyday families across the country, we must do everything we can to take back our House majority. Peter, Katherine is the voice at the leadership table for every House Democrat in Congress — and for every American. body:
Split a donation between Juliana Stratton and EMILYs List |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118870417/581162834/-1301070791?refcode=WUEFHK22_20251107_StrattonSplit_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057317&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTFlOTY1OC0xNGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n31VINcmWiabbtEhC32pvuZc-wME0hnSDL51i80g9gk=) Peter, we named Juliana Stratton our _first_ U.S. Senate endorsement of the cycle because she knows that now is not the time to fold, but to fight for Illinois families. **[**Before I tell you more about Juliana Stratton, will you split a donation between her campaign and EMILYs List to send more Democratic pro-choice fighters to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118870420/581162838/-1301070791?refcode=WUEFHK22_20251107_StrattonSplit_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057317&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTFlOTY1OC0xNGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n31VINcmWiabbtEhC32pvuZc-wME0hnSDL51i80g9gk=)** | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118870424/581162840/-1301070791?refcode=WUEFHK22_20251107_StrattonSplit_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057317&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTFlOTY1OC0xNGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n31VINcmWiabbtEhC32pvuZc-wME0hnSDL51i80g9gk=)
---
Juliana has spent her career fighting for the people of Illinois — first as the chair of a local school council advocating for children and families, then, as a state representative championing education and equity. **Today, as lieutenant governor, she's standing up to Republicans as the Trump administration continues to target Chicago.**

As the first Black woman to serve as lieutenant governor of Illinois, Juliana has broken barriers and opened doors. But she's never forgotten where she came from or who she's fighting for, and she has the courage and vision to deliver real results in the Senate.

**Our endorsement signals our determination to elect another Democratic pro-choice woman to the Senate and delivers a major show of strength for Juliana. **

But she's running in a competitive, high-stakes Democratic primary in March, and she needs the _full_ support of our community to win.
****[**So, Peter, will you split a donation between EMILYs List and Juliana's campaign to help elect more Democratic pro-choice women?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118870432/581162844/-1301070791?refcode=WUEFHK22_20251107_StrattonSplit_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057317&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTFlOTY1OC0xNGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n31VINcmWiabbtEhC32pvuZc-wME0hnSDL51i80g9gk=)****

clean_body: Split a donation between Juliana Stratton and EMILYs List | = Peter, we named Juliana Stratton our first U.S. Senate endorsement of the cycle because she knows that now is not the time to fold, but to fight for Illinois families. = | = Juliana has spent her career fighting for the people of Illinois — first as the chair of a local school council advocating for children and families, then, as a state representative championing education and equity. Today, as lieutenant governor, she's standing up to Republicans as the Trump administration continues to target Chicago. As the first Black woman to serve as lieutenant governor of Illinois, Juliana has broken barriers and opened doors. But she's never forgotten where she came from or who she's fighting for, and she has the courage and vision to deliver real results in the Senate. Our endorsement signals our determination to elect another Democratic pro-choice woman to the Senate and delivers a major show of strength for Juliana. But she's running in a competitive, high-stakes Democratic primary in March, and she needs the full support of our community to win. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Deputy Chief Campaigns Officer, Federal and Gubernatorial, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 11/7/2025
body:
Meet Senator Iman Jodeh: Zohran Mamdani’s Radical Colorado Counterpart
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Happy Friday,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** At CSU, two social work instructors faced backlash after admitting they [made white students “uncomfortable” to “disrupt white emotional hegemony,”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) prompting a civil rights complaint. Meanwhile, Colorado Ethics Watch accused 12 Democratic lawmakers of [accepting illegal gifts from dark-money group](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) One Main Street Colorado to fund a luxury Vail retreat. And in northern Colorado, the[ Democratic Socialists of America celebrated major school board wins](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) across Greeley, Poudre, and Thompson districts—cementing their growing influence in local education.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** Democrats moved to [block proof-of-citizenship voting laws](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with a federal judge striking down Trump’s order requiring documentation to register—sparking backlash from 14 Republican-led states. The DOJ sought to [move Tina Peters into federal custody](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after Trump called for her release, reigniting debate over political prosecutions. Pro-life groups including Live Action and Students for Life launched a campaign to [permanently defund Planned Parenthood](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) before funding returns next July. And Congress used the Congressional Review Act to [overturn Biden-era BLM land plans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) that had restricted millions of acres from energy development, signaling a shift back toward resource access and accountability.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Montrose County Commissioner Sean Pond’s [“Erasing My Line in the Sand”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) argues Colorado’s “Blueprint” to flip the state blue is now complete—even in rural counties—due to complacency among conservatives. A.L. Goodwin’s “On the Five-Year Anniversary of 2020” denounces [Michigan’s prosecution of election attorneys](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as a dangerous rewriting of law after the fact. And Ahnaf Kalam’s “Meet Senator Iman Jodeh” exposes [Colorado’s own radical counterpart to New York’s socialist mayor,](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) criticizing Jodeh’s ties to pro-Hamas activists and her role in mainstreaming extremism under “progressive” politics.
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, November 7, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Meet Senator Iman Jodeh: Zohran Mamdani’s Radical Colorado Counterpart](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY AHNAF KALAM, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_New York City has inflicted Zohran Mamdani on itself—the socialist assemblyman who parlayed his anti-Israel bile and Islamist sympathies into the mayoralty, all while whining about “racist attacks” from those who dare call out his jihadist flirtations. Colorado, not to be outdone in this parade of self-destruction, has Iman Jodeh: our own state senator, the so-called “trailblazer” whose Palestinian fixation and alliances with terror cheerleaders make her a mirror image of Mamdani’s radicalism._
_Both peddle the same poison—elevating Hamas’s “narrative” over facts, hobnobbing with antisemites, and stoking divisions that rot the body politic. Now, with Mamdani’s win and the progressive purge of Aurora’s city council—race-baiting activists like Alli Jackson narrowly booting out realists like Danielle Jurinsky and Amsalu Kassaw—the left crows victory. But this isn’t progress; it’s the mainstreaming of fanaticism._
_Jodeh’s pro-Islamist credentials stretch back years, a sordid trail of alliances with hate-mongers and terror apologists that betray her oath to serve all Coloradans. Sold initially as a pragmatic reformer for Aurora’s crumbling suburbs, she’s morphed into a mouthpiece for radical networks, her “bridge-building” leading straight to the swamps of pro-Islamist ideology._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[A Conservative Tide in Montrose County Education, Tempered by a Disturbing Underbelly](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SEAN POND, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **Montrose County’s recall marks the fall of a conservative stronghold:** Commissioner Sean Pond argues that the ousting of Scott Mijares proves Colorado’s Democratic “Blueprint” has fully reached rural areas, showing that even 65% Trump counties aren’t immune to ideological shifts.
* **The ‘Blueprint’ strategy succeeded through local infiltration:** Pond traces Colorado’s transformation to decades of progressive focus on local offices, media control, and grassroots infrastructure—while conservatives assumed rural counties would remain safe and failed to build lasting systems of their own.
* **A call for realism and resilience among conservatives:** Pond urges conservatives to stop believing in silent majorities and instead act as a disciplined remnant—small but steadfast—warning that freedom, once surrendered, doesn’t rebuild itself.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[On the five-year anniversary of 2020, Michigan court moves goalposts on attorneys who exposed Antrim County’s machines](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY A.L. GOODWIN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **Michigan court rewrites legal standards in 2020 election case:** Attorneys Stefanie Lambert and Matt DePerno, who exposed tabulation errors in Antrim County, now face criminal prosecution after a Michigan judge inserted a new “Secretary of State authorization” requirement into jury instructions—a rule that did not exist in state law at the time.
* **Evidence revealed security vulnerabilities in voting systems:** Expert affidavits filed under oath detailed foreign network connections, remote logons, and weak cybersecurity in Antrim County’s 2020 election systems—evidence that was lawfully obtained during discovery but later targeted by federal “Arctic Frost” investigations.
* **Critics warn of precedent for political weaponization:** The article argues that retroactively criminalizing discovery sets a chilling precedent for attorneys and experts, allowing courts to punish lawful litigation and silence future election integrity efforts.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Colorado River reality check: The problem isn’t the compact, it’s overuse.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**BY STEVE HARRIS | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 7** _This is my final article on the centennial of the Colorado River Compact (CRC) and the 75th anniversary of the Upper Colorado River Compact (UCRC), collectively referred to as the ‘Compacts.’” In water time, the Compacts are not that old. I have been in the water business in the Colorado River basin for 50 years – half of the CRC’s life – and watched how people viewed the implications of the Compacts over time. The Compacts have gone from background documents to front and center of water discussions._
**[The Warning in New York’s Vote: A Nation Forgetting What It Knew](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**BY C. J. GARBO | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 7** _New York’s decision to elect an openly socialist mayor is not an isolated event. It is a symptom – an unmistakable sign that one of America’s greatest cities is entering the next phase of a cycle human history has recorded with brutal consistency. Every society that embraced central planning, concentrated state power, or moral relativism eventually arrived at the same destination: decline, disorder, and suffering that could have been avoided had wisdom not been discarded for ideology._
**[NYC Will Learn That Socialism Doesn’t Work](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY RUSS MINARY | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 7** _On Tuesday, November 4, Zohran Mamdani was elected as Mayor of New York City. Mamdani is only 34, has never held a real job and openly claims to be a socialist. His Muslim faith was a major part of his campaign. In a city with a lot of Jewish citizens, he won with a majority of votes in a 3-way race. His campaign consisted mainly of a nice smile and a promise to make just about everything ‘free.’ Free transportation, groceries, housing, healthcare and childcare. But he didn’t explain who was going to pay for all of the ‘free stuff.’_

**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---
|
---
**🗳️ DID YOU KNOW?** In 1758, young Virginia candidate George Washington spent his entire campaign budget—50 pounds—on 160 gallons of liquor for 391 voters. Buying votes with booze was common in England and had become a Virginia Election Day tradition, with barrels rolled out at courthouses and polling places.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** “The problem with socialism is that you eventually run out of other peoples’ money.” — British Prime Minister Margaret Thatcher
|

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I’m running for Governor
body:
I need 10,000 Day One Endorsements

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsSL/?__vbtrk=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
**Fellow patriot, I’m in.**
I’ve just announced my campaign for Governor of New York.

[ENDORSE ELISE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsSL/?__vbtrk=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
The tide is turning in the Empire State and the numbers show that voters are ready for a change:

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsSL/?__vbtrk=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsSL/?__vbtrk=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**That’s right.****Recent polling shows me LEADING the worst Governor in America Kathy Hochul, and I am just getting started.**
Friend, the stakes couldn’t be higher... AOC, Zohran Mamdani, and Kathy Hochul are going to destroy New York **[if we don’t stand and fight to stop them together](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsSL/?__vbtrk=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsSL/?__vbtrk=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Friend, that’s where you come in.** I am humbly asking for your Day One Endorsement.

[ENDORSE ELISE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsSL/?__vbtrk=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
I have a reputation in D.C. for winning hard races, from flipping a deep blue Obama district Republican in my very first campaign, to ousting Liz Cheney from GOP Leadership, I have never backed down from the tough fights that truly matter.
So, I’m asking you to stand with me for one more tough fight.
**_[Please join my campaign with your Day One Endorsement today](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsSL/?__vbtrk=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

_In Liberty,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsSL/?__vbtrk=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
Proud New Yorker
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsSL/?__vbtrk=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Team Wes Moore
subject: Sooner than you think, Peter
body:
This week’s elections sent a clear message.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=888%2E1086043%2EtfxkmZ)
Peter, Democrats had some BIG wins this week.
This week’s elections showed what happens when Democrats stay focused on delivering for working people.
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251107-1.NWQK4J&refcode=em-20251107-1&t=4&akid=888%2E1086043%2EtfxkmZ) [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251107-1.NWQK4J&refcode=em-20251107-1&t=5&akid=888%2E1086043%2EtfxkmZ)
Wes campaigned with Abigail Spanberger in Virginia and Mikie Sherrill in New Jersey, and now there will be two more Democratic governors with Wes in the fight for progress.
**They’re fighting for affordability, public safety, and opportunity — and we won’t let up.** But Republicans will quickly gear up for the next fight, and our 2026 race is approaching sooner than you think. We have to be ready.
**[Now, it’s our time. We have to take advantage of this momentum while we can. Will you chip in any amount to power Wes Moore to reelection today?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251107-1.NWQK4J&refcode=em-20251107-1&t=6&akid=888%2E1086043%2EtfxkmZ)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251107-1.NWQK4J&amount=5&refcode=em-20251107-1&t=25&akid=888%2E1086043%2EtfxkmZ)**
Thanks for stepping up today, Peter.
-- Team Wes Moore

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251107-1&t=26&refcode2=888_1086043_tfxkmZ&akid=888%2E1086043%2EtfxkmZ)**

name: Save the Redwoods League
subject: Shutdown: Our parks are suffering
body:
How the shutdown hurts redwoods parks staff, and local communities| | | [View in browser](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118871247/581165896/-751278817?utm_source=ea-mar&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gov-shutdown-response-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ5MDA2YTYwLTE2YmMtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WJAVXyqFHHX_ZCIUZqe6SfjguFrwQzjkYvz-3Pud-uI=&emci=31ab87df-68bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=49006a60-16bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=1504551)
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118871248/581165897/779512579?utm_source=ea-mar&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gov-shutdown-response-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ5MDA2YTYwLTE2YmMtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WJAVXyqFHHX_ZCIUZqe6SfjguFrwQzjkYvz-3Pud-uI=&emci=31ab87df-68bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=49006a60-16bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=1504551)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
We are now facing the longest federal government shutdown in U.S. history. Its impact on public lands is profound and deeply personal for those who care for them. As president of Save the Redwoods League and former superintendent of Redwood National and State Parks during the 2018 shutdown, I’ve seen firsthand how these closures harm our coast redwood and giant sequoia forests. When rangers and resource staff are sidelined, vandalism (including burl poaching), illegal camping, and off-trail hiking all increase. And the human toll is just as urgent. Park employees have missed multiple paychecks, and local businesses like hotels, restaurants, and outdoor shops are losing vital income they won’t recover. To those who protect our parks, this is more than a job. It’s a calling. And right now, they need our support. Like the redwoods, our parks and their stewards are resilient. But they shouldn’t have to weather this storm alone.Read our [full statement](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118871249/581165898/1674730207?utm_source=ea-mar&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gov-shutdown-response-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ5MDA2YTYwLTE2YmMtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WJAVXyqFHHX_ZCIUZqe6SfjguFrwQzjkYvz-3Pud-uI=&emci=31ab87df-68bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=49006a60-16bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=1504551) and learn how you can stand in solidarity.
---
[ HOW YOU CAN HELP ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118871250/581165899/1674730207?utm_source=ea-mar&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gov-shutdown-response-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ5MDA2YTYwLTE2YmMtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WJAVXyqFHHX_ZCIUZqe6SfjguFrwQzjkYvz-3Pud-uI=&emci=31ab87df-68bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=49006a60-16bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=1504551)

| Thank you,

Steve Mietz

clean_body: How the shutdown hurts redwoods parks staff, and local communities| | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, We are now facing the longest federal government shutdown in U.S. history. Its impact on public lands is profound and deeply personal for those who care for them. As president of Save the Redwoods League and former superintendent of Redwood National and State Parks during the 2018 shutdown, I’ve seen firsthand how these closures harm our coast redwood and giant sequoia forests. When rangers and resource staff are sidelined, vandalism (including burl poaching), illegal camping, and off-trail hiking all increase. And the human toll is just as urgent. Park employees have missed multiple paychecks, and local businesses like hotels, restaurants, and outdoor shops are losing vital income they won’t recover. To those who protect our parks, this is more than a job. It’s a calling. And right now, they need our support. Like the redwoods, our parks and their stewards are resilient. But they shouldn’t have to weather this storm alone.Read our and learn how you can stand in solidarity. | | | Thank you, Steve Mietz CEO & President Save the Redwoods League | | Top photo courtesy of National Park Service | | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States CONNECT WITH US | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- |

name: Team Ilhan
subject: SNAP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1946%2E791427%2EkyU9uz)
Friend, a President who uses the food security of his fellow Americans as a bargaining chip is no President at all.
Trump’s unnecessary cuts to SNAP benefits, which feed tens of millions of Americans every day, including millions of children, prove that his loyalty is not with the American people but with the billionaires and their tyrannical accumulation of wealth and power under Trump’s leadership.
Sign on today to tell Donald Trump: **You are not our king and we are not your subjects.** **[Add your name in support of restoring full SNAP benefits and reopening the government without cuts to healthcare and food assistance.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-nov25-snap/?source=em251107-1-180&akid=1946%2E791427%2EkyU9uz)
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-nov25-snap/?source=em251107-1-180&akid=1946%2E791427%2EkyU9uz)**
In a time of immense wealth, where the billionaire class has more money than they know what to do with, it’s a disgrace that working people are paid so little that they have to rely on SNAP to survive each day.
In the past few weeks, folks have been forced to decide between paying rent and getting enough food for their kids. Food banks are seeing a surge in demand and are struggling to keep up. Some have to reckon with whether driving to a food pantry is even worth the gas money.
What’s worse is that SNAP funding was untouched in past government shutdowns. Which means that Trump is making a deliberate choice to underfund this program to try to punish Democrats for holding the line on protecting the Affordable Care Act.
**The food security of tens of millions shouldn’t be a pawn in Trump’s political game. It should be off limits.**
That’s why we are asking you today: [**Sign on to our petition calling on both the Trump administration and Republicans in Congress to fully fund SNAP and find a real solution to this shutdown crisis. We can’t allow Americans to go hungry while Donald Trump and his billionaire buddies live like kings.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-nov25-snap/?source=em251107-1-180&akid=1946%2E791427%2EkyU9uz)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-nov25-snap/?source=em251107-1-180&akid=1946%2E791427%2EkyU9uz)**
Thank you in advance for adding your name.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1946%2E791427%2EkyU9uz)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1946%2E791427%2EkyU9uz)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1946%2E791427%2EkyU9uz)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1946_791427_kyU9uz&akid=1946%2E791427%2EkyU9uz)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: how Democrats can prepare for 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
[please read] Here’s a five step plan:
#
Peter – fter all the exciting victories for Democrats this week, you might be wondering how we can start preparing for 2026. Here’s our five step plan:
**Step 1: Rest**
Whether you knocked doors, made calls, chipped in a few bucks, or just paid attention + spread the word, your energy helped elect the Democratic leaders who will fight back against Donald Trump + the GOP. Use the days + weeks following this election to rest, recover, reflect, and recharge for the fight ahead.
**Step 2: Re-engage**
Once you’re all rested up, it’s time to re-engage. Find a new candidate (or two... or three...) or an issue to support ahead of the 2026 midterms. Do some research about who and what is on your ballot, then decide how you want to take action.
**Step 3: Invest**
There are two main ways you can invest in a candidate or cause you care about: Time and money. **[If you can, chip in $5 to your favorite candidate, campaign, or grassroots movement like ours, which supports Democrats running in some of the most competitive races across the country.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97490?refcode=em20251107-9687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9687%2E614464%2E6b-cFx)** If you would prefer to volunteer your time, connect directly with the campaign you’re eager to support to learn about ways to get involved.
**Step 4: Organize**
Simply having conversations with your friends, family, and neighbors about the candidates and issues you choose to support is one of the most powerful tools to organize before an election. Start talking, get curious, and stay productive!
**Step 5: Win**
Focusing our energy, investing our resources, and organizing our communities are our best chance to WIN the 2026 midterms – and that work has to start TODAY.
**[So please, if you’re ready to help us elect the next generation of Democrats across the country next year and beyond, consider rushing a donation of $5 or more today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97490?refcode=em20251107-9687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9687%2E614464%2E6b-cFx)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97491?refcode=em20251107-9687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=9687%2E614464%2E6b-cFx) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97491?refcode=em20251107-9687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=9687%2E614464%2E6b-cFx) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97491?refcode=em20251107-9687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9687%2E614464%2E6b-cFx) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97491?refcode=em20251107-9687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9687%2E614464%2E6b-cFx) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97491?refcode=em20251107-9687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9687%2E614464%2E6b-cFx) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97491?refcode=em20251107-9687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9687%2E614464%2E6b-cFx) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97490?refcode=em20251107-9687&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9687%2E614464%2E6b-cFx)
---
Thank you,
– State Democrats HQ

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Crazy idea (one last try)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
I'm not sending this message to millions of people.

**I'm writing with a bit of a crazy idea.**
I'm not sending this everyone on our email list. It's only going to a small number of folks because I want to try something a few people think is a bit crazy.
There are two things going on right now:
I have a book coming out in a few weeks. It's called "Young Man in a Hurry." It's a good book. Very personal. Not your normal political book at all. But of course, there will be a bunch of political stories you'll enjoy. I think you'd like it.
At the same time, we just spent a bunch of money on passing Prop 50, so now I need to refill that coffers at my Campaign for Democracy for the fights ahead -- including helping other states pass redistricting to stop Trump from rigging the next election.
So here's the part that may be a little crazy.
If you make a contribution of ANY AMOUNT, I'll send you a copy of my new book when it comes out. The average cost per book is $22.45 including shipping. If you can give that, great. If you can only give $5, great. If you want to cover the cost for a few folks who can only give a few bucks, great.
[**But make a contribution of ANY AMOUNT today and I will send you a copy of my new book, "Young Man in a Hurry." If we raise more than costs, every dollar will go toward helping Democrats fight back against Trump's effort to rig the next election.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggn-book-any?refcode=em251107-1&refcode2=2776_4767699_ymsaWA&akid=2776%2E4767699%2EymsaWA)

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: This isn’t the first or last time AIPAC will come after our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1247%2E251025%2ETMVYbH ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1247%2E251025%2ETMVYbH ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

Last month, AIPAC sent an email to its donors attacking me by name.

[ A ]A graphic that says 'This is an email AIPAC wrote to its donors: The
open Senate race in Michigan will be pivotal in deciding the future of the
U.S.-Israel relationship. Congresswoman Haley Stevens, a proven champion
of our mission, faces vocal detractor, Abdul El-Sayed, whose anti-Israel
rhetoric makes clear he would be a dangerous addition to the Senate.'

This isn’t the first or last time they’ll come after our campaign.

That’s because inside our party, there’s a power struggle being waged
between the progressive grassroots movement for justice and the
AIPAC-establishment wing that wants to silence it.

One of the most critical battles in that fight is happening right here
with our race in Michigan.

AIPAC is already funneling money to boost our primary opponent because
I’ve spoken out for peace, accountability, and an end to the genocide in
Gaza.

I’ve also been outspoken in saying our tax dollars should be invested in
improving life here at home, not ending life overseas.

I want to let that sink in. That’s why I’m such a big threat to them.

But let me be clear, this campaign isn’t just about me.

We’re fighting to prove that Democrats who speak with moral clarity can
win. That our movement can overcome the millions of dollars AIPAC and
corporate PACs will throw at us. That when working people stand up to
would-be oligarchs, we win.

So by pitching in today, you’re sending a message to the entire Democratic
Party that the future belongs to those who fight for justice, not those
who bow to money and influence.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251107-1-ak.R3XGs_&amount=10&refcode=em20251107-1244&t=1004&akid=1247%2E251025%2ETMVYbH ]Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us take
on AIPAC and show the strength of this grassroots movement?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251107-1-ak.R3XGs_&amount=10&refcode=em20251107-1244&t=1023&akid=1247%2E251025%2ETMVYbH ]Donate $10 ››

In solidarity,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1024&akid=1247%2E251025%2ETMVYbH
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1025&akid=1247%2E251025%2ETMVYbH

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: Cynthia Lummis
subject: Let’s be honest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lummis for Wyoming
body:
If we want to prevent a repeat of these elections in 2026, conservatives must start ramping up our fundraising now! | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3148702dc49440dd9c51f2b48dbb1e13&_e=3Cb1JwF8BKIas4uHC0w0gbDGVbhQ-sfwGC_XHRaeIIiD9fUmeQDppwbqkOqv_M85zUtJ7pvmVdImBC1Uje4wJ-PijyNrcXkZPFUi7Q9lYIbWlFD7KGdinJD13zRdmzUeM3NW7wFPIgT4dgTWygLW1OHYsfnr3sbVD_Xude69bYD9dYiIvqWGICc6_Se_9haRAcnc2EubWKfd27obYNkSdsVBeKHiWUEPmvtZgSaut5NAhvJv9y7p_7a1TRCKeYGPh6wmdYY4pGEVhpxfPW9rNSXjuzYurogs9TQEDj0UoSZD2po6Cc6fH0ZAJJabSvC_6jfY3UdE47GOb43h8nfLK05be40f0pcohG2cC7yT7yOPg-IBUB082QSK-jSQWTtTUA7eR_dSP4Zsm9gf6dW-kaqR8vpBW7YCVuanX5_lbkvGe0mC90m4qlHbPHZwmLBte3GejS6MpKw3Aa0f2UnGyjDzRtD4zDnyhSaQXmAsxOgRUIkHcpMB8f6kWzCLoHhjs0JR_eaIfm_BKME_G3ycFx-459qjT3xZ4f5VPyr7Rze2CtPGR19aENfly9wXEtJEchLl9ddjAW8J_7Uu2JS67yBBk1-vpZ_zVSYzqy71s9YXQghcwwBYZTmFJ7wlXi7s-4uX3h_RZQIaoXlyIHv2EMLoTMRBxvI5OZD82Drjt5VOVteIh7bzrYT24Q7xNhjPgzGoT8fUGO5EGtN5dHWlZXReuIN_yLnSG_DjsJP6gr3dRg2x3C1kfg4rsaGxW4y0c-fPQzNmFubF3VtTiXTa2xn27ylI8t7-VGe71Qfc5rg%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Yesterday, we saw what happens when conservatives are outgunned. From California to New Jersey, to New York, to Virginia, Democrats cleaned up.

Let’s be honest – _they wiped the floor with us._

**If we can’t be honest about how this happened, there’s no way we can prevent a repeat in 2026.**

Conservatives appear to have become complacent after our sweeping victories in 2024, thinking we could simply coast while enjoying the fruits of our labor.

But all the while, the Left has been openly preparing and plotting for their comeback. Democrats outraised and outspent us at every turn in these elections, and we lost big time.

What’s worse, the Democrat party has taken an even harder left turn, _becoming more radical and unhinged than ever._

We can’t count on that being the key to their demise again. They just walked away with massive victories.

clean_body: If we want to prevent a repeat of these elections in 2026, conservatives must start ramping up our fundraising now! | Fellow American, Yesterday, we saw what happens when conservatives are outgunned. From California to New Jersey, to New York, to Virginia, Democrats cleaned up. Let’s be honest – they wiped the floor with us. If we can’t be honest about how this happened, there’s no way we can prevent a repeat in 2026. Conservatives appear to have become complacent after our sweeping victories in 2024, thinking we could simply coast while enjoying the fruits of our labor. But all the while, the Left has been openly preparing and plotting for their comeback. Democrats outraised and outspent us at every turn in these elections, and we lost big time. What’s worse, the Democrat party has taken an even harder left turn, becoming more radical and unhinged than ever. We can’t count on that being the key to their demise again. They just walked away with massive victories. So, here’s the truth: If we want to prevent a repeat of these elections in 2026, There’s no ifs, ands, or buts about it. Democrats beat us because their base is more fired up and is raising boatloads. We can only stop them by gathering the resources to ensure we’re not outgunned again. Show me what you got, fellow American. Yours in the fight, Senator Cynthia Lummis | Follow Cynthia Lummis | Paid for by Lummis for Wyoming Don't want to receive any more of our emails? clean_body: | = Peter, last November, Mariannette Miller-Meeks won the race for IA-01 by just 799 votes. We think it's time for an annual review of how that's going for the district: Long story short,it's not going well! If we told you the full story, we'd mention how she's voted to cut healthcare for thousands of Iowans, approved wallet-breaking tariffs, refused to hold in-person town halls, run away from constituents desperate for answers, and the list goes on. In any other job, performance like this would get you fired immediately. The good news for us is we're one step closer to delivering Miller-Meeks her pink slip. Roll Call officially named Mariannette Miller-Meeks as the third most vulnerable Republican going into the 2026 midterms. Miller-Meeks thinks because she has the backing of D.C. elites and corporate donors, she can just sail right into re-election while Iowans suffer through her bad policies. name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: Tennessee corruption just got a stamp of approval by a corrupt president
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Trump pardons corrupt TN Speaker
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K9G0MA8ZEYW1AD62H1GDQGWE_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K9G0MA8ZEYW1AD62H1GDQGWE_1)
---
| | | | Dear Peter, Former Republican Speaker Glen Casada and his top aide and co-conspirator were supposed to report to federal prison for ripping off Tennessee taxpayers. **Now they're skipping down the sidewalk free and feeling fine, mocking those who prosecuted them for their crimes. **

Why? Corrupt Donald Trump just handed them unconditional pardons. No justice - just a pardon for political corruption.

---
| _**If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.**_
---
| | [ FIGHT BACK ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K9G0MA8ZEYW1AD62H1GDQGWE_2)
---
| Here's what they did: Casada & Co. defrauded Tennessee through a state-funded legislative mailer scheme. **They were convicted on more than a dozen public corruption charges.** Justice was ready to be served.

Until Trump, a personal fan of misusing public office for his own financial gain, stepped in and prevented justice.

This sums up the MAGA movement: break the law, reward yourself and your allies, protect the corrupt, and blame everyone else. Trump again sends a crystal-clear message to Tennessee Republicans: You can cheat. You can steal from taxpayers. You can abuse your power. He’s got your back.

**As long as you're loyal to Trump, you're untouchable.**

We can't stop the President's pardons. But we CAN stop the culture of corruption that thrives in Tennessee Republican circles. We can elect Democratic leaders who actually hold people accountable for ripping off the state...who put Tennessee families ahead of party loyalty...who believe the rules apply to everyone.

The election cycle begins now, and Tennessee voters deserve a real choice.

**Will you chip in today to help elect Tennessee House Democrats who will fight corruption instead of rewarding it?**
---
| _**If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.**_
---
| | [ FIGHT BACK ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K9G0MA8ZEYW1AD62H1GDQGWE_3)
---
| This is what we're up against. But together, we can build a better Tennessee.
—Tennessee House Democrats

P.S. Share this with your network. People need to know what just happened.
---
| | | |
---
| _Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
---

body:
Peter,

Because of you, we hit our October fundraising goal — and I can't thank you enough.

Every time we set a challenge, you step up. Not for me, but for the Kentucky values we share like compassion, decency, and hard work.

Your ongoing support is what keeps us moving forward and helps ensure we have the resources needed to protect public education, create good jobs, and stand up for families not just across the commonwealth, **but nationwide.**

That's what In This Together PAC is all about: **Helping good people do good work at _every_ level. **Now, as we turn the page to November, we've got a chance to get ahead on our fundraising and prepare for the challenges to come.

name: Carol Obando-Derstine
subject: Do your job, Ryan Mackenzie.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carol for PA
body:
Families are struggling to feed their kids because Ryan Mackenzie and Republicans in Washington shut down the government and let SNAP benefits lapse.

| Peter,

Recently, I spent time at a soup kitchen in Allentown. It was packed – the biggest crowd they’d seen in months.

Families are struggling to feed their kids because Ryan Mackenzie and Republicans in Washington shut down the government and let SNAP benefits lapse.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118872252/581168563/-1183399276?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzAwNjUwMTYtMWFiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wp-A6yhLFFxrlKlOV7RTLUYSHdIezB4gfycGU6LXATg=&emci=ec162a10-1abc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=30065016-1abc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=2418100)
I know how hard families work to fight hunger. In the early 2000s, I ran a food pantry in northern New Jersey. I saw the sacrifices parents made by skipping meals so their kids could eat. I saw how programs like SNAP can make a difference.

This didn’t have to happen. And Ryan Mackenzie refuses to come back to the table and do his job.

I’m calling on Ryan Mackenzie to end the shutdown and protect essential services – and I need your voice next to mine.

[_**Will you add your name to demand that Ryan Mackenzie get back to work and show up for his constituents?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118872253/581168564/-1183399276?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzAwNjUwMTYtMWFiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wp-A6yhLFFxrlKlOV7RTLUYSHdIezB4gfycGU6LXATg=&emci=ec162a10-1abc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=30065016-1abc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=2418100)

clean_body: Families are struggling to feed their kids because Ryan Mackenzie and Republicans in Washington shut down the government and let SNAP benefits lapse. | Peter, Recently, I spent time at a soup kitchen in Allentown. It was packed – the biggest crowd they’d seen in months. Families are struggling to feed their kids because Ryan Mackenzie and Republicans in Washington shut down the government and let SNAP benefits lapse. I know how hard families work to fight hunger. In the early 2000s, I ran a food pantry in northern New Jersey. I saw the sacrifices parents made by skipping meals so their kids could eat. I saw how programs like SNAP can make a difference. This didn’t have to happen. And Ryan Mackenzie refuses to come back to the table and do his job. I’m calling on Ryan Mackenzie to end the shutdown and protect essential services – and I need your voice next to mine. | – Carol * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

# [The Sandwich That Beat Trump's DOJ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=178235374&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MjM1Mzc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjI1NTE4ODgsImV4cCI6MTc2NTE0Mzg4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.-ThUF99JUmVOBziZNsKf1HiPvH-OR4nN44h9OwHzHOg)
### A D.C. jury just told Pam Bondi and Trump's prosecutors to stuff it -- proving that humor and common sense still survive in the age of MAGA madness.
| | [David Shuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster) and [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---
| Nov 7
---
| [](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)| | [](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=178235374&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MjM1Mzc0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MjU1MTg4OCwiZXhwIjoxNzY1MTQzODg4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.oGHRmhtasIHYR6xxv_Q8yLwyeKRmjoZ_c2-bDWpJAgs&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
