name: Joe Jaworski
subject: Momentum is building: Texas leaders are standing with us
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski Campaign
body:
I’m proud to share some big news. Our campaign for Texas Attorney General has now been endorsed by more than one hundred leaders across the state. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/last-night-14190529?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=f3864bf38c&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , I’m proud to share some big news. Our campaign for Texas Attorney General has now been endorsed by **more than one hundred leaders across the state,** including current and former elected officials, community organizers, and Democratic Party leaders who know what it takes to win and to serve. These endorsements come from every corner of Texas—from Houston to El Paso, from the Valley to the Panhandle—and they share one common belief: it’s time to restore honesty, integrity, and independence to the Office of the Attorney General. These leaders know me, they know my record, and they know this campaign is about something bigger than politics. It’s about returning the law to the people. I’m honored to have their support and I’m grateful to have yours. **Together, we’re building a coalition ready to fight corruption, defend our freedoms, and deliver justice for every Texan.** Now we have to keep this momentum going. [**Will you join these leaders by contributing to our campaign today? Together, I know we can win.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=043d9dc40e&e=5d8d80652b) Onward,
**Joe Jaworski**

****

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Winning this election was just step one. Now, it's time to deliver for Virginia.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118876239/581182040/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-11-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ0ZWE1NmUtMjViYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xLVQ6rnKeg-AJSRYY_ziLI4bxlV-K1c_e5b7k3ZzG94=)
Since our historic victory up and down the ballot on Tuesday, Abigail Spanberger is seizing the moment to share her agenda with a national TV audience:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118876240/581182041/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-11-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ0ZWE1NmUtMjViYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xLVQ6rnKeg-AJSRYY_ziLI4bxlV-K1c_e5b7k3ZzG94=)
As Abigail told Good Morning America, winning this election was just step one.
_Now, it's time to deliver for Virginia._
The contributions to emails like this one helped us lay the groundwork to win big across the Commonwealth — and we're going to need a lot more of them to follow through and enact Abigail's plans to lower costs, strengthen public schools, and grow Virginia's economy.

clean_body: Winning this election was just step one. Now, it's time to deliver for Virginia. = Since our historic victory up and down the ballot on Tuesday, Abigail Spanberger is seizing the moment to share her agenda with a national TV audience: = As Abigail told Good Morning America, winning this election was just step one. Now, it's time to deliver for Virginia. The contributions to emails like this one helped us lay the groundwork to win big across the Commonwealth — and we're going to need a lot more of them to follow through and enact Abigail's plans to lower costs, strengthen public schools, and grow Virginia's economy. = = = = = = = Thank you so much, Spanberger for Governor HQ By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Let that sink in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
The government has been shut down for over a month, Peter. It’s the longest shutdown in U.S. _history._ _Let that sink in._ Republicans hold the presidency, the Senate, and the House, but they refuse to come to the table and negotiate with Democrats on a bipartisan solution to reopen the government — and the American people are paying the price. Health care costs are going to spike for millions of Americans at the end of the year if Republicans don’t take action. Federal workers are _still_ being forced to work without pay. And now SNAP benefits have expired, which will force millions of people into hunger. Thankfully, courts have ordered the Trump regime to start paying out SNAP benefits. But their cruelty — by putting hungry families on the political chopping block — shows their true colors. The Trump regime doesn’t care about Americans, unless they’re one of his billionaire buddies. **[I’m fighting every day to end this shutdown, protect Americans from rising health costs, and feed hungry families. If you stand with me, add your name today to join me in calling on Republicans to end this shutdown:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118876261/581182120/-972382851?contactdata=LpeTcGK7fbho8e8SnKwWIm/OfQk3OXidhpEEFaZHdT4RP2hMDTGtT9kNbJ1pmcnD+ql7JBGu36woO1itYJ4P/5TXETACn/YAuPyqKMEUWppPQvs++A+G0gaKFFgtarNgFWx3Kmqq7hZsc+WYaKksuj7H0HbMlPYgoL4bxwNKkHs=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWNlNGRmOS0yNWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4foZ1Hi2Gjs_9vSSp8kGSF6Wd-mTAGJxWlnaM2O1srw=&emci=4fd93c41-1ebc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=79ce4df9-25bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=23190490)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118876262/581182121/-972382851?contactdata=LpeTcGK7fbho8e8SnKwWIm/OfQk3OXidhpEEFaZHdT4RP2hMDTGtT9kNbJ1pmcnD+ql7JBGu36woO1itYJ4P/5TXETACn/YAuPyqKMEUWppPQvs++A+G0gaKFFgtarNgFWx3Kmqq7hZsc+WYaKksuj7H0HbMlPYgoL4bxwNKkHs=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWNlNGRmOS0yNWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4foZ1Hi2Gjs_9vSSp8kGSF6Wd-mTAGJxWlnaM2O1srw=&emci=4fd93c41-1ebc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=79ce4df9-25bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=23190490)

name: Sharice (personal)
subject: This email is a little bit of a breather
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
I know my team and I had been reaching out a little more often than usual over the last few months

I know my team and I had been reaching out a little more often than usual over the last few months. So first and foremost, I wanted to say thank you for bearing with us. For weeks, everything was pointing to today becoming the official kickoff of the Kansas GOP’s special session on redistricting. But after we rolled up our sleeves, put in the work, and kept up the pressure, Kansas Republicans dropped that idea — for now — just a few short days ago. So here’s where we are: It’s been a good week for everyone here at Campaign HQ. Just hours after Democrats handily won elections in Virginia, New Jersey, Georgia, and all across the country, Kansas GOP leadership finally took the hint. _Maybe, just maybe, Kansas voters weren’t too excited to spend nearly half a million dollars in taxpayer money on a political power grab, all while families are struggling during the National GOP’s government shutdown.**Who would’ve thought?**_ But this doesn’t mean everything is sunshine and rainbows here in Kansas. Families are still hurting. Kids are still going hungry. And the Kansas GOP hasn’t dropped their gerrymander for good. Instead, they’ve announced a new plan: Regroup in January. So yes, every member of this team deserves a moment of celebration. We achieved a real victory here in KS-03, and all across the country this week. But our work isn’t done. National Republicans and Kansas GOP leadership alike saw what happened too — and we all know they won’t just pack up and walk away. **So if you’re still with me, I’d appreciate any help you can provide ahead of the latest bout in this long, costly battle for Kansas’ future. We can’t win this without you.** Here’s the best link to give: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/davids-email-nov25**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118876314/581182405/-46554286?refcode=email_110725_breather&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTAzOGY3ZS0yNmJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ALUHL_3XE_iW4_3x0bJwCFOIkpg-SH0K9oTujcnlbjU=) Regardless of whether you’re able to chip in right now, I’m extremely grateful to have your support at this uncertain moment for our campaign. Thanks, and have a great weekend. Sharice _Sent from my iPhone_

clean_body: I know my team and I had been reaching out a little more often than usual over the last few months I know my team and I had been reaching out a little more often than usual over the last few months. So first and foremost, I wanted to say thank you for bearing with us. For weeks, everything was pointing to today becoming the official kickoff of the Kansas GOP’s special session on redistricting. But after we rolled up our sleeves, put in the work, and kept up the pressure, Kansas Republicans dropped that idea — for now — just a few short days ago. So here’s where we are: It’s been a good week for everyone here at Campaign HQ. Just hours after Democrats handily won elections in Virginia, New Jersey, Georgia, and all across the country, Kansas GOP leadership finally took the hint. Maybe, just maybe, Kansas voters weren’t too excited to spend nearly half a million dollars in taxpayer money on a political power grab, all while families are struggling during the National GOP’s government shutdown.Who would’ve thought? But this doesn’t mean everything is sunshine and rainbows here in Kansas. Families are still hurting. Kids are still going hungry. And the Kansas GOP hasn’t dropped their gerrymander for good. Instead, they’ve announced a new plan: Regroup in January. So yes, every member of this team deserves a moment of celebration. We achieved a real victory here in KS-03, and all across the country this week. But our work isn’t done. National Republicans and Kansas GOP leadership alike saw what happened too — and we all know they won’t just pack up and walk away. So if you’re still with me, I’d appreciate any help you can provide ahead of the latest bout in this long, costly battle for Kansas’ future. We can’t win this without you. Here’s the best link to give: = Regardless of whether you’re able to chip in right now, I’m extremely grateful to have your support at this uncertain moment for our campaign. Thanks, and have a great weekend. Sharice Sent from my iPhone | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . | | = | PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS Sharice for Congress 13851 W. 63rd St. #303 Shawnee, KS 66216 United States

As your attorney general, I know firsthand what it takes to stand up to Trump’s bullying.
My office has taken his administration to court 43 times (and counting!), and we’ve succeeded again and again at blocking his lawless actions:
Leaving Coloradans hungry by refusing to fund SNAP as required by law?
**Blocked. ❌** Compromising your sensitive information and sharing it with shady DOGE employees?
**Blocked. ❌** Endangering the important role AmeriCorps workers play in communities all over Colorado?
**Blocked. ❌** Withholding Colorado’s education, transportation, law enforcement, and other funding that we depend on?
**Blocked. ❌**
---
I could go on, friend, but the point is: Attacking our state’s workers, our sensitive data, our economy, and our civil rights is not just wrong, it’s illegal. And I am fighting back.
**[That’s why I’ll always keep fighting for Colorado when Trump tries to bully us. Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NPR: Judge rules suit challenging DOGE and Elon Musk's power over government can continue [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NPR_MuskDOGELawsuits.png]
Folks -- Elon Musk may have left government "service", but it appears he cannot hide from lawsuits over misused authority.
A U.S. District Court judge ruled that a lawsuit alleging Elon Musk and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) are illegally wielding power over federal government operations can move forward. The ruling highlights often-conflicting descriptions of the power that Musk and the DOGE entity have been given to implement Trump's agenda, and how efforts to downplay that power in court have been undermined by public statements and actions.
We want to know how you feel about these lawsuits. Will you take our one-click survey today?
Are you in favor of stopping DOGE from wreaking further havoc on our federal government?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=110725_3yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=110725_3no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=110725_3&amount=20]

_**E[ndless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference: ](https://substack.com/redirect/c99ac3c7-7191-4e6c-afaf-de2c202f7e0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_

* * *
Hey folks,
Joe Walsh joined me live for another episode of _Welcome to the Party, Pal_ , and we went all in. Democrats crushed this week's elections, Trump literally fell asleep mid-press conference, and everyone's suddenly claiming "the Democratic Party is back." We broke down what that really means -- and why it's pissed-off voters, not party elites, leading the charge.
It's one of our sharpest, funniest, and most honest episodes yet. You don't want to miss this one.
* [**00:02:11**] Joe and I dive straight into the post-election spin: Hakeem Jeffries declares "the party is back," but who really made Tuesday happen? Spoiler: grassroots Democrats.
* [**00:06:58**] The "back" debate -- do the wins mean renewal, or are we just winning because Trump is that bad? Why complacency is the real threat.
* [**00:17:45**] "Sleepy Don" -- Trump nods off behind Dr. Oz, and we talk about media double standards and why independent, pro-democracy voices matter now more than ever.
* [**00:28:33**] Affordability and anger: Trump's economy, grocery prices, and the lie Republicans can't spin away -- because people _live_ the economy every day.
* [**00:36:58**] Joe Walsh's "maybe I'll run for president" moment -- and a raw talk about authenticity, courage, and why both parties need leaders who sound like real people.

clean_body: | Peter, Mike Collins here. And I'm going to be real with you, Just one buck. But before I do, I need you to understand why. The Radical Left has spent years trying to destroy everything that makes America strong- They say folks like us are " DANGEROUS." They want to CONTROL your speech, your paycheck, and your vote. Well, not on my watch. I didn't come from money. I came from hard work, turning wrenches, hauling freight, and building something out of nothing. And that's why I'm running for the U.S. Senate, to finish what we started with President Trump: 👉 SECURE the border. 👉 CUT wasteful spending. 👉 PUT AMERICANS first again. The Democrats have billionaires and Silicon Valley cash. But me? I've got YOU, the grassroots patriots who believe in this country as much as I do. So here's my ask: Not because $1 funds a campaign. But because it proves that real Americans, NOT career politicians, are taking our country back. Every time you give, even a single dollar, it sends a message that Georgia is DONE being ignored. Let's show Schumer and his dark-money allies that this fight belongs to the people -- not the elites. | For Georgia. For America. For freedom. - Mike Collins PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE PO Box 6491 Athens, GA 30604 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this, please .

Fellow Patriot,

It's been just under 300 days since President Trump and I returned to the White House, and already, _**America is BACK.**_

From the moment we stepped into the West Wing, we got to work cleaning up Joe Biden's mess and restoring sanity, sovereignty, and strength to this great nation.

We're cutting regulations, shutting down globalist nonsense, and putting the needs of American families FIRST.

_**But now we want to hear directly from YOU.**_

**[That’s why we’ve authorized the Official 300 Day Oval Office Survey, and I’m asking you personally to take a moment to share your thoughts with us. >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/WbRXVk2D_8Xj4yAm3or17xMbYVqJyE7V3hs5r-NUAokTYn3VgYiVUmvpwi6V1LPKLivPmieaxEez8M-FLsOVIf3Bw2yzQzFAI2xFt9VlUd-3vxx-iU1fE0qmLwIB8-MfCUfLsP68wIywv0MBAvWkBFJ2lql6r2p_Ba8sHCW9eTx2MhyHhp2DbaW36qnUaTW_hpJd0pyvrVeL-FX6R7UJmSduQOgi3FgfDdQIAuAD-rofJ7ZUycBIIVi8ns7ehmdg4EDvGjYXZyYAG8Gy6fwjmiRQvOKkraQmVCVHIxx8wkZudsD1drPM3A87iEFd1XpqNC-6gURhGyPEdPyjz1kJ8yO9RqD_j4ca2m_Yhj6yeGawP7ultk_xtfUFHJm9jMWMPKxkvL_Zlj5Jq5re04zoGdk44b0Zmy28rTSGPN__-WmFPH08FY1he6yeEbH7WZ9P-bVVcx5dSD27YeNW236O430Rwy0gn0U_WITgMNkJ08du8pIClB-PioqedKJ1qG_oNhP3z14I_4LqqIhbIRMo2x-ZGtEq9_BVtIcA8TTWNK0litv4Ly5f2k9Q2RLoYXRrTCMgwFclMlGisoWkHvR1lJU92pH94gnldZKzmXjpFGqnCJ24SI52PI_C_X9KfMWlBuqSRPKcpcV11sCIeSsaRBxb7lahWNh60M--9pG4wdAaBphUjLTUTLDJLrg247uyFwIoQagCfRof9ubV0AkhHadAwrHQ-JFsF_FH1UhDNtBouBKKWTPpm39Z9UwUyUz5Ro81luJbvtHtlNJbD4KaqbxixTh48HMIFh7dPkQ7eMSDhvlKvcO09bOly3qBmvwPl-UHcj9Z1yi1HL0HGxc9JsBdzxVYVmPYWc3iLSzBKMdTNYuWnL60-el3cMHdux6bxPZLYGSYQAJmzz_bibU6srXBXxfWyGcTmrRowvMgdU6dKIp44gdltJ5le9VhJl37NNsUt0Urq9-l4-ZKEj-pTpqBYn3ya28clhY_WgDxByw30b91_jJLjN_FdPXSZzcfipOGalQGA7Na/VP2a-eoexCDb3f2QHUwyws-jJ0yi2Ki4/14)**

[RESPOND TO VP VANCE](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/5xNKsmU5hoLjCOvq8U7IytkjvJ0YDgfFn0WgaX8d3gtYPncdXvk7ayqQxMXeM6lhIibH2a9YlDin__UEE5XOPUY8XJqNCrnkS5KXZ_f7NwnxmiwVfK-_MxVvkK19DTruDP0kg86Gi8obH2G3zGwEU1ANblyswkwprF1lYby0bWQ57OG_4Cvekt5OEChMd39v-iTeOH45npd8KqUnm9M4Zs3q62eo2FsR_-Jo1FojmBR85FERZ5F4PRwzhHgLLYLpnvaV21Aho1CEYL3y7aECIoMYIKvqD2irkZUwRsIi3ejaEDmVap_prSi1YrJ6TMYRKwKL3e58-As2gD9v08QCWO-IZux7Dz-T3Sbph-JHRJRP0iuY_sshtWP9lpkl_rb2LjuDqeoQqCIkHntk4nkLRmE0M54QDbZoPKPkFr3PZFQAku7MlhuS_NWWW3H_u9DMefCuZsPYnOEVziAoYRqlwdTmTCy6h-X3Q_6UUaIjvVTzx6ULL0Np7znasY0VDlrPLxyfif1YLARZZLKRanxwP2bqd8aFsmtc4K47AY3luqx9EqG0_AOoakib8ZI_60JEJAD5FePI-gmgL4VxuVWKohM3eso5YSd0dvynYsx5NB1sFkNn92jxKj1fmUFgSt7v-mWcA-CMPt654HOyqvIdTWVn7cktd08gVublJCVZUztB8wStP3nzfao_wvktL5YFZjVX6Gllm6QSBh0uaKrdrNENj6uVa3cRR20SJ2IRU1otFgx3GGXnhiAyxBwIiKLS3kObQUfxF2_VNjG8NWWqYZ9A-QPTNBuJwTIOCBOxFxfU67hZQCVXF-Od8P63LkbCmD1aqDzyavj94Yh-3zrFo07NUUYR1aARXKZ9WPNf1GCqJ7VDfsXTx6aPzTWPf3sZwRnaKfzrrWjU23WzhylgY_Spudo-7ZJB36nxnyETopJq3y-lHpjUV02iJ2Wu-Y4DD0BNjr78pHzAqy2jZ9iBMw-kxCwdOSNC5XykA7Id-wiYo0p1iSA0bXL7hkrvZdChZpRcQJ9_AOx0/BrnERWgfzhLlPPZ93RqT52YawM0b3Nr9/14)

This is your chance to weigh in on the future of our movement, the policies we're fighting for, and how we keep up the momentum against the radical left.

The media doesn't want to talk about our historic wins.

clean_body: I only want you reading this. Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this To: America First Patriots From: Vice President JD Vance Re: The First 300 Days Date: 11/06/2025 Fellow Patriot, It's been just under 300 days since President Trump and I returned to the White House, and already, America is BACK. From the moment we stepped into the West Wing, we got to work cleaning up Joe Biden's mess and restoring sanity, sovereignty, and strength to this great nation. We're cutting regulations, shutting down globalist nonsense, and putting the needs of American families FIRST. But now we want to hear directly from YOU. This is your chance to weigh in on the future of our movement, the policies we're fighting for, and how we keep up the momentum against the radical left. The media doesn't want to talk about our historic wins. They're too busy twisting every word we say, ignoring our booming economy, and spreading lies about our America First agenda. They want you silenced. We want you heard. That's why your voice matters more than ever before. You're not just part of a movement, you're the reason this movement is unstoppable. So before midnight tonight, I need you to do two things: 1. 2. Let's keep winning. Let's keep fighting. And let's make sure this country is never handed over to the radicals ever again. For America, Vice President JD Vance Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

You've been selected for this opportunity because

## **THIS WILL ONLY TAKE 10 SECONDS...**

**CONGRATULATIONS!**
So you’ve been selected as a _**[WHITE HOUSE ADVISOR TO TRUMP](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7e060e91f4ca4677818a34743751d89c&_e=LL4VejF5obgouB3_COgqNWPKw5WfnYGRg_WdwgeqIPcBT9tqwMvhDJQq7izkTEWIPmhlhVQ1XKX_JNfzCKTkF-pts-btXLZ7wmkR3D4HkT6KzWZFD_bYbifEhUl6SZt9wUAgxHvceZmKg6j8pbfTfdOmyQS-8HVx-tuTgCoA3nFHp_0U3cB0jnCDwa3LUf2g8Y16gvSmMpw2iMCyJdAADslMb0QcGC4Tk1I5vO4DcO_Jq3VnQoJS1odd33TMJLjBFeaM4Bixlv4MAQ-cKpdOvmEu8XVLsjxUrysjSuSH3YrfOoWX44WLFBAyC8RsCStFQ96RIebQSRTNgyZZs7Ruub6cB7q8pkiVTBpWTf3_0DEu0QHlol0sQEnRMPVPVL7_X7bGK3ZFxwjqLgatuuYVo0I5S5XyMm1ajSawiD75I9Ro1iWD-qlbHc522h3-YVHu1NBvrc18-82j6jpAgCBZ6G_zKIi6ouG3kE-Y-YVfvlGbHZWO_YzKUiKicWH05h0OJWQE9e76EiKBKprYclqXWxanZe9hSYtBPEmrzjTx6wJGuxRTWsznYz48Qhlk-995BGsSvpuf2sKm8pceasaONvz1xwehipwMnLB9Yd0IHZ7ARzBFgI79ejIoNzAXkpHC7eV3WqUwquZItOJaDWLETgEESXCeeQi23xCndWw-sOkZiuyu-dw4_npBtEJ79xD2lxBdnN83NPWcCllHeNt84UjNFkTxxCEt6wY2E83TsUvdMFnUyrBp2x8tOT5qntY_)**_ , and we need your thoughts IMMEDIATELY. If not, you may miss this **once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.**
**Because of the government shutdown, I can only keep this position open until midnight, so act fast because I really want YOU to be my White House Advisor!**
Your support of me and the MAGA movement has meant the world to me. We have truly been through it all together, this is why...

### I love you & I’m crossing my fingers that you still feel the same way about me.

President Donald Trump **[shot back at a reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/dfcb0970-7da0-490f-b152-795e9ddc4ccc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during today's meeting with Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban for criticizing his economic agenda and claiming he does not want to talk about affordability.
"When did I not want to talk about it, I talk about it all the time!" Trump told the reporter, frustrated.
**[Watch what happened next:](https://substack.com/redirect/dfcb0970-7da0-490f-b152-795e9ddc4ccc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# **LEAKED MEMO: They 're Trying to Take Out RFK Jr**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/201ed5e2-317b-497a-8719-3df81b35ac5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Dear Reader,

A leaked memo from a secret Big Pharma meeting reveals they're plotting to destroy RFK Jr's political future...
Here it is:
Is Big Pharma TERRIFIED of RFK Jr. uncovering the **[biggest health controversy](https://substack.com/redirect/201ed5e2-317b-497a-8719-3df81b35ac5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of them all?

**[>>Click here to discover what this RFK Jr controversy is.<<](https://substack.com/redirect/201ed5e2-317b-497a-8719-3df81b35ac5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/201ed5e2-317b-497a-8719-3df81b35ac5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Hungarian Prime minister jokes about hiring Leavitt after media takedown**
Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban jokingly asked President Donald Trump if he could hire White House **[press secretary Karoline Leavitt](https://substack.com/redirect/8f451855-4ac9-4880-8e28-3763556632d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after she delivered a spontaneous defense of the administration's economic record during a White House meeting Friday .
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0e66c638-2d71-40bc-bbf6-5e4a9b08e0fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **The scene** : During a meeting focused on Hungarian energy and trade, reporters questioned Trump about affordability concerns, prompting him to call Leavitt into the Cabinet Room. She immediately launched into a sharp critique of media coverage, accusing reporters of refusing to acknowledge that Trump "inherited the worst inflation crisis in modern American history" and is fixing it in "10 short months."

* **Orban 's request**: After Leavitt's remarks, Orban leaned toward Trump and asked, "Can I get her for us?" Trump responded, "Karoline, the prime minister would like you to work for him in Hungary," before jokingly adding, "You know what, that's a very good decision you just made. Please don't leave us, Karoline."

* * *
# **Twice-deported illegal immigrant assaults ICE officer during Houston Arrest**
A Salvadoran illegal immigrant with a criminal history including child sexual assault **[brutally attacked an ICE officer](https://substack.com/redirect/f8d43cbc-e0fb-4b9c-ac0a-22db3a25b56a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with a metal coffee cup during a Monday arrest in Houston, leaving the agent with facial burns and a severe laceration requiring 13 stitches, the Department of Homeland Security announced.
* **Suspect 's history**: Walter Leonel Perez Rodriguez was previously removed from the U.S. in 2013 and again in 2020 but illegally re-entered both times. His criminal record includes convictions for sexual assault of a child under 17, child fondling and multiple DUIs. He is now in ICE custody facing prosecution for the assault.
* **Rising violence** : DHS reports a 1,000% increase in assaults against homeland security law enforcement officers in the line of duty. DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin said officers are "facing record-high assaults" as "they lock up pedophiles and other depraved criminals to keep American families safe."
* **Broader operation** : The assault occurred during a massive 10-day ICE operation in Houston that resulted in over 1,500 arrests, including 17 gang members, 40 aggravated felons, one convicted murderer and 13 sexual predators. Nearly one-third of those arrested had been previously ordered removed by an immigration judge.
_" This repeated criminal illegal alien is about to find out the hard way that there's a new sheriff in town--and under President Trump and Secretary Noem, anyone who lays a hand on our ICE officers will be prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law," McLaughlin said._

* * *
# **Sydney Sweeney Addresses Viral Jeans Ad Controversy, Trump and Vance Defense**
Actress Sydney Sweeney broke her silence on the political firestorm surrounding her **[American Eagle jeans campaign](https://substack.com/redirect/4d331e14-aa94-431b-a39c-8a9d06ce1d8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , calling it "surreal" that President Donald Trump and Vice President JD Vance publicly defended the advertisement that drew criticism from progressives.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/efbe8b87-cb54-4442-8ead-3982c91793c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Political reactions** : Trump expressed support for the ad after learning Sweeney is a registered Republican, telling reporters "now I love her ad." Vance mocked Democrats on the "Ruthless" podcast, joking they should "continue to tell everybody who thinks Sydney Sweeney is attractive is a Nazi" and questioned whether they "learned nothing from the November 2024 election."
* **Progressive criticism** : The campaign, marketed as "Sydney Sweeney has great jeans," faced backlash from some progressives who accused it of promoting whiteness and eugenics by comparing her "jeans" to "genes." Sweeney, known for roles in HBO's "Euphoria" and "The White Lotus," pushed back against claims the ads hurt American Eagle's performance, saying reports of declining in-store visits were "all made up."
* **Moving forward** : In the GQ interview promoting her latest film "Christy," Sweeney said she's focused on her work rather than public speculation about her beliefs. "I know who I am. I know what I value. I know that I'm a kind person," she said. "And so I don't really let other people define who I am."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/aca29680-d67e-4bb6-bc1e-5ac64b9dbef2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
# **Senate Democrats Offer Shutdown Deal With One-Year Obamacare Extension**
Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer showcased an alternative plan Friday to **[end the government shutdown](https://substack.com/redirect/842f0aac-5004-47a6-8309-4a96dfa50ea7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , proposing a one-year extension of expiring Obamacare subsidies and a bipartisan committee to negotiate further after reopening.
* **Democratic proposal** : After 14 failed House votes on the continuing resolution, Schumer announced the plan on the Senate floor backed by the full Democratic caucus. The proposal would extend Affordable Care Act tax credits for one year and create a committee for future negotiations, acknowledging the GOP position that talks won't happen until the government reopens.
* **Republican response** : Senate Majority Leader John Thune and Republicans were set to meet Friday afternoon to discuss the Democratic offer. Thune had planned to vote on the House-passed plan and attach spending bills, but that strategy was abandoned after he said "wheels came off" bipartisan negotiations. The Senate is likely to vote for a 15th time on the same plan Saturday.
* **Worker pay blocked** : Sen. Ron Johnson's bill to ensure federal workers and military receive pay during current and future shutdowns was blocked by Sen. Gary Peters, D-Mich., over concerns it gives President Donald Trump too much power to choose "which federal employees are paid and when." Thune criticized the move, accusing Democrats of keeping federal employees "hostage" for leverage.

DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin said officers are "facing record-high assaults" as "they lock up pedophiles and other depraved criminals to keep American families safe." Broader operation : The assault occurred during a massive 10-day ICE operation in Houston that resulted in over 1,500 arrests, including 17 gang members, 40 aggravated felons, one convicted murderer and 13 sexual predators. Nearly one-third of those arrested had been previously ordered removed by an immigration judge. " This repeated criminal illegal alien is about to find out the hard way that there's a new sheriff in town--and under President Trump and Secretary Noem, anyone who lays a hand on our ICE officers will be prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law," McLaughlin said. Sydney Sweeney Addresses Viral Jeans Ad Controversy, Trump and Vance Defense Actress Sydney Sweeney broke her silence on the political firestorm surrounding her , calling it "surreal" that President Donald Trump and Vice President JD Vance publicly defended the advertisement that drew criticism from progressives. Political reactions : Trump expressed support for the ad after learning Sweeney is a registered Republican, telling reporters "now I love her ad." Vance mocked Democrats on the "Ruthless" podcast, joking they should "continue to tell everybody who thinks Sydney Sweeney is attractive is a Nazi" and questioned whether they "learned nothing from the November 2024 election." Progressive criticism : The campaign, marketed as "Sydney Sweeney has great jeans," faced backlash from some progressives who accused it of promoting whiteness and eugenics by comparing her "jeans" to "genes." Sweeney, known for roles in HBO's "Euphoria" and "The White Lotus," pushed back against claims the ads hurt American Eagle's performance, saying reports of declining in-store visits were "all made up." Moving forward : In the GQ interview promoting her latest film "Christy," Sweeney said she's focused on her work rather than public speculation about her beliefs. "I know who I am. I know what I value. I know that I'm a kind person," she said. "And so I don't really let other people define who I am." | | ---|---|--- Senate Democrats Offer Shutdown Deal With One-Year Obamacare Extension Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer showcased an alternative plan Friday to , proposing a one-year extension of expiring Obamacare subsidies and a bipartisan committee to negotiate further after reopening. Democratic proposal : After 14 failed House votes on the continuing resolution, Schumer announced the plan on the Senate floor backed by the full Democratic caucus. The proposal would extend Affordable Care Act tax credits for one year and create a committee for future negotiations, acknowledging the GOP position that talks won't happen until the government reopens. Republican response : Senate Majority Leader John Thune and Republicans were set to meet Friday afternoon to discuss the Democratic offer. Thune had planned to vote on the House-passed plan and attach spending bills, but that strategy was abandoned after he said "wheels came off" bipartisan negotiations. The Senate is likely to vote for a 15th time on the same plan Saturday. Worker pay blocked : Sen. Ron Johnson's bill to ensure federal workers and military receive pay during current and future shutdowns was blocked by Sen. Gary Peters, D-Mich., over concerns it gives President Donald Trump too much power to choose "which federal employees are paid and when." Thune criticized the move, accusing Democrats of keeping federal employees "hostage" for leverage. * You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

Friend,
Please join us for the **2025 Republican Party of Virginia Advance** , **December 5–7** at **Kingsmill Resort in Williamsburg**.
This year’s Advance is more than a conference—it’s a working session to **bring every Republican together** and **set a unified plan** for 2026 and the road to 2027. Grassroots leaders, elected officials, candidates, activists, students, and supporters from across the Commonwealth are all invited.
**Event Details**
**Location:** Kingsmill Resort, Williamsburg, VA
**Dates:** December 5–7, 2025 **What to expect**
* Strategy briefings and county-level planning for 2026–2027
* Training tracks: field, finance, communications, and digital
* Conversations with Republican leaders and issue experts
* Fellowship and networking in a historic Virginia setting

**Your role matters.** We’re assembling the people who knock the doors, make the calls, fund the efforts, carry the message—and win elections. Come ready to contribute and leave with a concrete plan for your locality.
**Register today** to reserve your spot and secure the Kingsmill room block.
We look forward to seeing you in Williamsburg.

clean_body: Raising the age of retirement to 70 years old | ❌ DON’T IGNORE! ❌ DON’T LOOK AWAY! ❌ DON’T MISS THIS URGENT WARNING! FIRST: Republicans like Senator Rand Paul proposed raising the retirement age to 70 years old! NO! THEN: The Trump administration began drawing up an executive order that could result in the biggest Social Security cut in history! NOW: We need to know that top Democrats like you in your locality disagree with this dangerous plan! The only way we can fight back is if we have a foolproof strategy and that starts with accurate data. Answer before our critical 11:59pm deadline! | | Thanks for stepping up! name: The Resistance Lab via Team Jayapal
subject: [RSVP] The next Resistance Lab session is next weekend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251107-5604-footer&t=1001&akid=5604%2E420207%2E9QEeZd ]Pramila Jayapal

Peter,

Authoritarianism is on the rise — and it’s never been more urgent for us
to build power together.

That’s why Pramila launched the Resistance Lab, a grassroots training
series to help people like you understand how democracies fall, how
everyday people have fought back with nonviolent resistance, and what we
can do right now to resist authoritarianism in our own communities.

Our next training is coming up on Sunday, November 16, and you can attend
virtually OR host a local training session with your friends, family, or
community. [ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/50885?utm_source=em20251107-5604&t=1002&akid=5604%2E420207%2E9QEeZd ]Click here to RSVP here or sign up to host a training now!

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/50885?utm_source=em20251107-5604&t=1003&akid=5604%2E420207%2E9QEeZd ]Resistance Lab Invite

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/50885?utm_source=em20251107-5604&t=1004&akid=5604%2E420207%2E9QEeZd ]RSVP For The Resistance Lab

This is not your average Zoom meeting. Resistance Lab was developed with
global experts in democratic backsliding and non-violent resistance
movements around the world, in combination with Pramila’s 20+ years of
frontline experience organizing for justice.

You’ll walk away with:

* A deeper understanding of how authoritarianism rises
* Proven tactics used by nonviolent resistance movements to fight back
* Immediate, concrete actions you can take to organize in your community

And if you’re thinking about hosting a session but not sure you’re
qualified, don’t worry! You don’t need to be an expert — just someone
who’s passionate about standing up against authoritarianism.

When you sign up to host, we’ll send you everything you need: tech help,
discussion guides, and a step-by-step agenda. Just pick a spot (your home,
a café, a community center, etc.), and a way to stream the Zoom session (a
TV and computer work great). We’ll handle the rest!

More than 15,000 people in all 50 states have already joined the
Resistance Lab. Whether you’re joining solo or bringing your community,
this training is for you. So please spread the word, invite your people,
and help build this resistance movement together.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/50885?utm_source=em20251107-5604&t=1005&akid=5604%2E420207%2E9QEeZd ]RSVP now to secure your spot for our Resistance Lab training on Sunday,
November 16th.

In solidarity,

Team Jayapal

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251107-5604-footer&t=1006&refcode2=5604_420207_9QEeZd&akid=5604%2E420207%2E9QEeZd

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5604%2E420207%2E9QEeZd

Paid for by Pramila for Congress.

subject: They are taking our healthcare and our food.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | **** **Happy Thankstaking?** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQspAbPSpPuaj1jgwGWpjiBAgePscIpYXv9ygB3e1J1-ofldDfPIzOIMQlLP18Jn8YfJ6FdO4z5Q1z1bBnTP8kn57tC4TtxmMOMAy-mRqmVOpog6nm78Ae3iew9RKwZFpiF-EiEhnBotgrtlsKFOXGPUtsW-gp5i4U3CykEbJqPqhA4t-HXHGEbL79R3yfMZfEKfiT4as7xlHCfyZn6sLCxScrS5A4Ef8cNj7a0LWr8Mo6je0b_FxSGZXnaPGdtZUP2oy9E3Q_zc02XUVeXWgwy8EjTVGhp3-iJRSsLXDAD7ObypXBsThza_1p0qCxt5Fmpg/4le/gLATbV1tT8qjhmwynx4Otw/h0/h001.wPLRD6LOcFwK0lQ90ZMv7Q9Rf7FJGNjVb9Cfpj8BSgU)
****[The depravity knows no bounds. Chip in the help us end it!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lF1r9A7M_bciJtnWSGvvOWQS1CDVag4TwG6ukLiG8IycRMzG5Z-R7a2RlNA7-IEkj3jSgaC0rJC1eKvCA2NaHuLfi2-qt3tzScrRbTDVYGegNMA2QL_ZNXQFfYisQRg_s4yQyMfIWjnRf0VsumpK2znFOmoonKKSSisHPBo6xlt_mMm6z9nSA8jvdikwMfPClMrw8zwK86vpTw3fGDmwdbgL4JLDoX1o31po_xKxdD4c7_cXoX7NE53XtSIIbw5Vx6186saDYOtvvpy9IU1cWOfpASya7xMabQg_qJhEJUwW4hoYhCXPOgxS4n6z0leQIw/4le/gLATbV1tT8qjhmwynx4Otw/h1/h001.cNn86VLGFqfVgAM3Zf_CST428I74F__M5LlciUxYh8U)**
* * *
Right now, millions of vulnerable Americans, including children, seniors, and people with disabilities, are facing a cruel political fight _over basic necessities._ In addition to stripping healthcare from millions, Republicans have allowed SNAP to lapse, weaponizing hunger by cutting off access to food for those who rely on this vital program. The MAGA rhetoric surrounding these cuts is equally outrageous. Rep. Clay Higgins adds insult to injury by suggesting those who are struggling to make ends meet are “smoking crack.” Disgusting. **At Able Dems, we fight to elect Democrats with disabilities and allies who will advocate for policies that protect us. Healthcare, nutrition, and social support aren’t luxuries,****_they’re essential rights._** [**Friend, we need your support to fight back against these cruel cuts. Chip in $10 to help elect candidates who will stand up for people with disabilities and ensure families aren’t punished for politics.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsv6G13xDJkcAT3eWN2WUkZ5RZdU1bDt9STNIU2detLRXk_xEiRU5N_PG5ec77Ha8Qh9jkKzoHgDlenfIyxDNP3W1UK5myb6qzbJcbn6VoUyweuHL548sz5Wtb9d33ETjfoh37Rl456qmf0ac_f8qoviQdLAtB5I5N_2uMn3trMiBb8mp99HFJ8OKZPcbKahjTsHhkSIEwl1phSkbHOrrhcda1Ew2CeK0hd0x23X_2dWVAaavYg40ZOogJ6juo7Ut8lYiPWsuGg8Y3ypOOCoI49DGqKC6Ui-Om87JI1CUcnVSi0NiDjI3FUV48NNfRypasQ/4le/gLATbV1tT8qjhmwynx4Otw/h2/h001.X7VGvId_P6flvZ9ajJMfFrwXtRcuUIzgw193MmXkGzo) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | ** Happy Thankstaking? ** Right now, millions of vulnerable Americans, including children, seniors, and people with disabilities, are facing a cruel political fight over basic necessities. In addition to stripping healthcare from millions, Republicans have allowed SNAP to lapse, weaponizing hunger by cutting off access to food for those who rely on this vital program. The MAGA rhetoric surrounding these cuts is equally outrageous. Rep. Clay Higgins adds insult to injury by suggesting those who are struggling to make ends meet are “smoking crack.” Disgusting. At Able Dems, we fight to elect Democrats with disabilities and allies who will advocate for policies that protect us. Healthcare, nutrition, and social support aren’t luxuries,**they’re essential rights. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Republican mockery and cruelty make it harder for people with disabilities to access the support they need. SNAP isn’t just food assistance. It feeds low-income seniors, people with disabilities, unemployed families, and the working poor. These are real people, many with disabilities, who now face immediate risk because of political gamesmanship. Your donation helps elect candidates who will stand up for people with disabilities and ensure families aren’t punished for politics.** Because no one should have to choose between medicine, rent, or food, and no political stunt should make that choice for them \- Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
Millions of children and families face hunger unless we force the Trump administration to act
| | |
---
Friend,

For Halloween, Donald Trump and his ultrawealthy friends held a Great Gatsby-themed party at Mar-a-Lago as SNAP benefits expired.
_That’s right._ While millions of children were losing access to the food they need to grow up healthy and strong – millionaires and billionaires sipped champagne while dressed as literary symbols of the moral decay of wealth.
Let’s be clear about what’s happening here: We _have_ the funds to send SNAP recipients their FULL benefits this month. But Trump is cruelly choosing not to do it. **And when Jacky and Democrats tried to pass a bill to prevent him from illegally withholding the money, it was blocked by Senate Republicans.**
It won’t be long before millions of children and families start going hungry because of Trump and the GOP’s actions. **That means funding SNAP is even more urgent right now than reopening the government.**
**We’re demanding the release of emergency SNAP funding – and we need at least 1,000 Democrats like you to join us before midnight:**

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Your donation in action
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251107-1614-foote&t=1001&akid=1614%2E342411%2EarMXnY ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Every donation starts as a single, personal choice — and that sets
something powerful in motion.

When you give to the Squad Victory Fund, it’s not about the amount — it’s
about becoming a part of a movement and turning your support into real,
tangible change.

Imagine your donation going on its own journey:

First stop: the corridors of power. Your contribution helps us defend our
progressive champions who are in the halls of Congress, standing up to
corporate greed, fighting back against authoritarianism, and demanding a
people-first agenda that works for everyone.

Next: neighborhoods and communities. It fuels grassroots organizing,
helping turn individual voices into unstoppable collective power, fighting
for justice and opportunity at every level. Every step taken and every
story shared — your donation is there for it all.

Then: the front lines of progress. Your support translates into meaningful
action. It fuels our progressive campaigns, helps pass bold policies for
working families, and helps fight back against far-right extremism.

Finally: the growing movement. Your contribution multiplies through the
work of our leaders, organizers, and advocates across the country. Every
person who’s inspired to join our fight helps strengthen our movement and
build lasting power for our future.

Peter, your
support isn’t just a donation — it’s a catalyst for change. The Squad
amplifies the voices of the working class, challenges the status quo, and
delivers real, transformative change on the issues that matter most. But
we can’t do this work without you.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251107-movement.LkZrbd&refcode=em20251107-1614&amount=3&t=1002&akid=1614%2E342411%2EarMXnY ]Can you pitch in $3 today to keep our movement strong?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251107-movement.LkZrbd&refcode=em20251107-1614&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1614%2E342411%2EarMXnY ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1614%2E342411%2EarMXnY

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Val Hoyle
subject: Republicans want to cancel flights and close airports
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118879324/581190840/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODQyODI3Mi0yZmJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mczhot4bmIkDfSO71ryJJTkrZx2soZL8P167H7hxMm8=&emci=8adb7586-2bbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=88428272-2fbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter – Republicans chose to shut down the federal government and now, **airlines are being forced to cancel hundreds of flights this weekend and into next week** leaving American passengers annoyed and frustrated at airports across the country. Instead of funding a responsible budget that pays for our wants and needs as a country, Republicans are refusing to negotiate, which will ultimately raise our insurance premiums, defund SNAP food assistance, and strip every bit of buffer from our budgets that they can. It's spineless and cowardly. And the longer they hold out on funding the government, the more cancelled flights and closed airports we're going to see. **I'm ready to pass a bipartisan budget – but I will not vote for one that raises your insurance premiums, keeps kids hungry, or fires so many air traffic controllers we have to cancel flights.** The Republican majority needs to get back to Washington and do their jobs. When they're ready, I'll be here. _Val_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Val Hoyle instantly:

clean_body: | | | | Peter – Republicans chose to shut down the federal government and now, airlines are being forced to cancel hundreds of flights this weekend and into next week leaving American passengers annoyed and frustrated at airports across the country. Instead of funding a responsible budget that pays for our wants and needs as a country, Republicans are refusing to negotiate, which will ultimately raise our insurance premiums, defund SNAP food assistance, and strip every bit of buffer from our budgets that they can. It's spineless and cowardly. And the longer they hold out on funding the government, the more cancelled flights and closed airports we're going to see. I'm ready to pass a bipartisan budget – but I will not vote for one that raises your insurance premiums, keeps kids hungry, or fires so many air traffic controllers we have to cancel flights. The Republican majority needs to get back to Washington and do their jobs. When they're ready, I'll be here. Val | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Val Hoyle instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. clean_body: RED! Our records show that your 2025 State Republican State Leadership Membership remains inactive, and we're on the cusp of a catastrophe. The Radical Left is jumping at this opportunity. Our team is working tirelessly to defend our nation from the spread of socialism in the states, but we need your help to put a stop to it once and for all. We can't stress enough the gravity of this situation. | REPUBLICAN STATE LEADERSHIP MEMBERSHIP NOTICE ACCOUNT HOLDER: 2024 MEMBERSHIP: LAPSED 2025 MEMBERSHIP ENROLLMENT: PENDING You have 24 hours to reactivate your membership for 2025 and send a resounding message to the Radical Left. Your membership card is more than just a symbol of your patriotism - it's a powerful tool in our fight for the future of our nation. Don't let it lapse. Sincerely, Republican State Leadership Membership Services * By providing your mobile phone number, you are consenting to receive calls and texts and P2P messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from RSLC and its affiliated PACs. name: Kathy Hochul
subject: Let’s reject Trump’s favorite, Peter
body:
Please read this note from NY Governor Kathy Hochul — who has a critical update on her race.

– Roy Cooper

Peter, it’s Kathy Hochul — and I’m running for Governor to defend New York from Donald Trump, Elise Stefanik, and their extremist agenda. I’ll explain more in a minute, but if you’re short on time, will you split a $10 donation between myself and Roy Cooper before you go to help stop Trump and Stefanik from flipping New York red? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_hochulsplit?amount=10]

Peter, let me tell you a bit about my new opponent for Governor, Elise Stefanik:

1. She boasts about being Trump’s “top ally” in D.C.

2. She’s repeatedly voted to cut billions of dollars from Medicare.

3. She brags about being the deciding vote for Trump’s cruel budget bill that strips healthcare from 1.5 million New Yorkers.

Unlike Stefanik, I stand up to Trump. No one — no matter how powerful — will stop me from fighting for every single New Yorker.

But I’ll be blunt: Special interest donors have already rushed Stefanik $12 million to take me down — and if I can’t fight back, we’ll risk New York flipping red. Which is why I have to ask: Will you step up and split a $10 donation between my campaign and Roy Cooper before it’s too late? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_hochulsplit?amount=10]

As Governor, I’ve stood up to Trump at every turn:

→ I took him to court over his illegal tariffs — and won twice.

→ I restored $35 million in Planned Parenthood funding after his devastating cuts.

→ I reversed $187 million in counterterrorism cuts.

Trump and his Republican megadonors have already rushed millions to Stefanik to take over New York, and it’ll take a surge of grassroots support to stop them.

So I’m asking one more time: Can I count on you to split a $10 donation between my campaign and Roy Cooper to help me defeat Elise Stefanik, and keep Trump’s extreme agenda out of New York for good? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_hochulsplit?amount=10]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Kathy Hochul and Roy Cooper:

SPLIT $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_hochulsplit?express_lane=true&amount=5]

SPLIT $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_hochulsplit?express_lane=true&amount=10]

SPLIT $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_hochulsplit?express_lane=true&amount=25]

SPLIT $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_hochulsplit?express_lane=true&amount=50]

SPLIT $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_hochulsplit?express_lane=true&amount=100]

SPLIT ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvf_email_hochulsplit?express_lane_other=true]

Thank you,

Kathy

Contact us [info@roycooper.com] |
Privacy Policy [https://roycooper.com/privacy-policy/]

Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602

Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.

Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. subject: Lauren Boebert just crossed another line

body:

| | **Friend,** **Lauren Boebert just crossed another line** Last week, Lauren Boebert and her boyfriend dressed up for Halloween — him as an ICE agent, and her mocking immigrant families. While ICE continues to terrorize immigrant communities and tear families apart, she decided to turn that pain into a punchline. That’s not just bad judgment - it’s racist, dehumanizing, and cruel. And this is who’s representing Colorado’s 4th District. Someone who mocks the vulnerable, divides neighbors, and uses hate to score clicks. Lauren Boebert and I couldn’t be more different. While she hides behind pre-screened town halls and soundbites written by DC consultants, I’m out here traveling across Colorado - holding real town halls, answering the tough questions, and listening to the people she’s forgotten. She runs on hatred, bigotry, and division.
I’m running on common-sense solutions that actually unite us. Because I live my values - I don’t just talk about them. **Folks, I’m running because I believe leadership isn’t about mocking or dividing people - it’s about showing compassion, standing up for what’s right, and actually helping our communities.** The good news? Here in Colorado, people see the difference - while Lauren Boebert mocks and divides, we’re coming together to lift each other up, hold real conversations, and fight to make sure every family can afford the food, gas, and healthcare they need to live with dignity. **[Colorado families deserve leaders who lift people up - not tear them down. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: If you can, please pitch in to support food banks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Donald Trump has made the decision to let people across this country go hungry.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2696%2E4032634%2ELN2IqM)
---
42 million Americans rely on SNAP benefits for food assistance. Trump is threatening to cut off those benefits — using hungry children, veterans, and seniors — as a political bargaining chip in shutdown negotiations. He wants to force people to go hungry until he gets his way. After a judge ordered Donald Trump to make SNAP payments, the wannabe king declared he would block SNAP benefits. In other words, he’s threatening to defy a court order, break the law, and delay payments. I’m fighting back on this. I’m fighting to ensure Trump follows the law and these payments get to the families who rely on them ASAP. While that happens, millions are living in limbo and food banks have been overwhelmed during the chaos. [**If you’re able, please split a donation to support the United Way of Massachusetts Bay and Merrimack Valley, United Way of Central Massachusetts, and the Food Bank of Western Massachusetts to support food distribution efforts here in Massachusetts. $28 or any amount you can pitch in will make a huge difference right now.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3215?amount=28&t=8&akid=2696%2E4032634%2ELN2IqM)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3215?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2696%2E4032634%2ELN2IqM)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3215?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2696%2E4032634%2ELN2IqM)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3215?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2696%2E4032634%2ELN2IqM)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3215?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2696%2E4032634%2ELN2IqM)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3215?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2696%2E4032634%2ELN2IqM)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3215?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2696%2E4032634%2ELN2IqM)
---

---
This crisis will reach every state. It will require all of us to step up and link arms to protect people at risk of going hungry. I want to be very clear: Donald Trump has made the decision to let people across this country go hungry. The funding for SNAP is available and was approved by Congress. But Trump’s telling fifteen million hungry children: Eat dirt. He’s telling a million hungry veterans: Eat dirt. He’s telling eight million seniors: Eat dirt. That’s how little Donald Trump cares about the children, veterans, seniors, and people in this country. Meanwhile Trump has no problem finding money for the things he cares about. He’s managed to round up millions for a gold-encrusted ballroom, for Argentina’s bailout, and a Great Gatsby-inspired Halloween party. But he’s withholding funding to keep people in our country fed. This is a manufactured hunger crisis created by Donald Trump. I’m fighting back and pulling every lever I can to get this funding to families. One important action we can take right now is to support food assistance programs across the country that are standing in the gap and getting families the support they need right now. [**So if you can, please split a donation to support the United Way of Massachusetts Bay and Merrimack Valley, United Way of Central Massachusetts, and the Food Bank of Western Massachusetts.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3215?t=14&akid=2696%2E4032634%2ELN2IqM) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3215?t=12&akid=2696%2E4032634%2ELN2IqM)
---
| [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/365?t=4&akid=2696%2E4032634%2ELN2IqM) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/367?t=5&akid=2696%2E4032634%2ELN2IqM) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/368?t=6&akid=2696%2E4032634%2ELN2IqM) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/369?t=7&akid=2696%2E4032634%2ELN2IqM)
---|---|---|---

## **THIS WILL ONLY TAKE 10 SECONDS...**

**CONGRATULATIONS!**
So you’ve been selected as a _**[WHITE HOUSE ADVISOR TO TRUMP](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=42d79c9a2a3c44af9e2ec580379418f0&_e=9bFIuf1XcDhH4XwAxU11JOJoAyms77erIRGxb6akumQFk8Tk2_pfcH4iG2WpqioJr7-pl5_jyvRPrxUtF0SuhFsgAOcCVFUO2GCfjvO5X9BvBYNwwX75-I-L69zpgGgUpncoIB58IaUvzWidfLyAYfXntiInL2jcm67Fu0JRsP0CwOjEpZNiUpYfztsHiyziZOXFc8bv-dYCDORXuhFupE0fS-_nsnr7G-FPmeagQalwdL80iaOte-7wlN0FYg9DIpcIfdwwrsdkEtGcy9GvE6cfab9fhON3IGzq3ypOfxSPAYldAmQaumjLHa2ve8M88LWDfDrWEwdEhBJhqQYqkZkOccF_zLrPt8qeDUVr9Encq1uKAYsnlXtrrNX13gwbw2vHl4snmPU7yD2ObsxV-pNh5mj5MStvSGFY1F0qkZmLOcKtjkbJt7ycgVKoV5enuFpeB-2ZcWGrEa330A0Q6sG4hT79W5u2shxnM4dSQbbrMc6raSaEN2EEMuEcIA9NPhjAWNaHD1JpvQhm0_fVOKfLGt8D96mM56EDleEKWmWsom6TjS-XnDuUaHBZDj1g7KYGKW8VMWzEvp1Bgf_Rd-A5mFakI5gaM2AazCvi89eFdPAaj4AOHV-8l_QBUKp-K049yTaPZ9g9ScNvl1S7ozIXiZNhMPtbYIE61iBEjIhctn14uv_xHITNxrn8rZzGZ0EG-DcAYRr6p42gz4Eei7qT0xB9jGMKlWydAXkCL4mN2bs9YUn1wvfcWenm6x93)**_ , and we need your thoughts IMMEDIATELY. If not, you may miss this **once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.**
**Because of the government shutdown, I can only keep this position open until midnight, so act fast because I really want YOU to be my White House Advisor!**
Your support of me and the MAGA movement has meant the world to me. We have truly been through it all together, this is why...

### I love you & I’m crossing my fingers that you still feel the same way about me.

name: Team Benson
subject: Momentum on our side — let’s turn it into a victory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
It’s clear that we have momentum on our side – but we need to turn this raw energy into doors knocked, TV ads run, voters contacted.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=963%2E181023%2EjT7Ifo)
Team _
It’s hard to believe that we’re less than a year out from next year’s elections. But after the big wins for Democrats this week, we’ve got momentum on our side.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251107_PM2_V1_S1&t=2&akid=963%2E181023%2EjT7Ifo)
Team Benson showed up big time at our one-year out rally.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251107_PM2_V1_S1&t=3&akid=963%2E181023%2EjT7Ifo)
As Jocelyn put it: One year from now, Michigan will make a choice about the kind of future we want.
**The work we do between now and then — organizing, listening, and standing up for one another, will shape that future.**
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251107_PM2_V1_S1&t=4&akid=963%2E181023%2EjT7Ifo)
It’s clear that we have momentum on our side – but we need to turn this energy into doors knocked, TV ads run, voters contacted. _That’s how we win._
And that is going to take resources, so we have to ask:
**[Will you make a $10 donation to support Jocelyn Benson’s campaign for governor?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251107_PM2_V1_S1&amount=10&t=5&akid=963%2E181023%2EjT7Ifo)**

clean_body: It’s clear that we have momentum on our side – but we need to turn this raw energy into doors knocked, TV ads run, voters contacted. Team It’s hard to believe that we’re less than a year out from next year’s elections. But after the big wins for Democrats this week, we’ve got momentum on our side. Team Benson showed up big time at our one-year out rally. As Jocelyn put it: One year from now, Michigan will make a choice about the kind of future we want. The work we do between now and then — organizing, listening, and standing up for one another, will shape that future. It’s clear that we have momentum on our side – but we need to turn this energy into doors knocked, TV ads run, voters contacted. That’s how we win. And that is going to take resources, so we have to ask: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | A year sounds like a long time, but we promise, time is going to fly by. There’s no time to waste when the stakes are this high. Thanks for being on the team! — Team Benson

name: Josh Harder
subject: Thank you, Nancy Pelosi
body:
We owe a debt of gratitude. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118880036/581193263/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDA3NmMyYWItMzRiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AZZj1V9csWGJ9Djnl5WAU65H1eljM5ZPXEaajXqZ5tQ=) | Peter, This week, Nancy Pelosi announced she will not seek re-election. I wanted to take a moment to share with you what her leadership has meant to me, to California, and to our country. In 2007, Nancy Pelosi became the first woman to serve as Speaker of the House. She broke a momentous glass ceiling and proved that women not only have a place in Congress, they should be running it. She built coalitions that passed landmark legislation like the Affordable Care Act, Dodd-Frank Wall Street reform, and the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act. She has been called the “most consequential Speaker in American history,” and I don’t know a single person in Washington, including Republicans, who disagree. You know you’re good at your job when even your opponents admit how effective you are. I’ve also been lucky to know Nancy Pelosi as both a mentor and a friend. Each time I bring my daughters Karina and Lillian to the Floor to vote, the first person they run to is Nancy. You can’t make it up. She adores kids, and when you see her with them, it’s clear why she’s always said her work is “for the children.” **She has devoted her entire life to serving our country, and while I’m sad for myself and for the House, I couldn’t be happier for her and her family for this new chapter.** [_**We’re not losing her yet, but I want to make sure we take this moment to say thank you. Will you add your name to this card to thank Nancy Pelosi for everything she’s done for California and for our country?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118880037/581193264/227105659?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDA3NmMyYWItMzRiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AZZj1V9csWGJ9Djnl5WAU65H1eljM5ZPXEaajXqZ5tQ=&emci=cd7bf3be-2dbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=4076c2ab-34bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=6455652) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118880038/581193265/227105659?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDA3NmMyYWItMzRiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AZZj1V9csWGJ9Djnl5WAU65H1eljM5ZPXEaajXqZ5tQ=&emci=cd7bf3be-2dbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=4076c2ab-34bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=6455652) – Josh
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. [**Josh doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money, so please chip in now to our campaign!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118880039/581193266/1618730853?refcode=E16123-20251107-NancyPelosi-footer-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDA3NmMyYWItMzRiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AZZj1V9csWGJ9Djnl5WAU65H1eljM5ZPXEaajXqZ5tQ=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118880040/581193267/-1860252395?refcode=E16123-20251107-NancyPelosi-footer-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDA3NmMyYWItMzRiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AZZj1V9csWGJ9Djnl5WAU65H1eljM5ZPXEaajXqZ5tQ=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118880041/581193268/1618730853?refcode=E16123-20251107-NancyPelosi-footer-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDA3NmMyYWItMzRiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AZZj1V9csWGJ9Djnl5WAU65H1eljM5ZPXEaajXqZ5tQ=) If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: I don’t believe in healthcare, labor, and human dignity because I’m an extremist.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
I believe these things because I was a waitress.
#
The right wing would have you believe that my American values are something out of the communist manifesto:
But I don’t believe in healthcare, labor, and human dignity because I’m an extremist.
**I believe these things because I was a waitress**.
Because I’ve worked double shifts to keep the lights on.
Because I did lose a parent to cancer and I saw my mom open the hospital bill a couple of days later.
Because on my worst day, **I know what it feels like to feel left behind**.
I don’t want any of us to live like this anymore. We deserve better.
But together, we've built a movement that is pushing harder than ever for guaranteed healthcare, bold action on our climate crisis, and so much more.
[Help us continue the fight by making a grassroots donation today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251107-2.BHYzIq&refcode=em20251107-10169-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10169%2E2526796%2E8-8ApT)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251107-2.BHYzIq&refcode=em20251107-10169-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10169%2E2526796%2E8-8ApT)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251107-2?refcode=em20251107-10169-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=10169_2526796_8-8ApT&akid=10169%2E2526796%2E8-8ApT)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251107-10169-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=10169%2E2526796%2E8-8ApT)**
